It took this guy approximately ZERO days to confirm our worst suspicions.

Mamdani, a self-declared socialist, wants to "globalize the intifada" and import values into the West that will destabilize our civilization.

_Everything about him runs counter to America First_.

**The fact that he could win in arguably America 's greatest city proves that, while we won Congress and the White House, the fight for the heart, soul, and future of America still rages on.**

**Fellow Conservative, the future of Trump 's agenda will be decided on the streets of Los Angeles, Chicago, and New York.**

While I frequently run into those who think that conservatives should just throw up their hands and leave New York to its fate, it's a mistake.

New York symbolizes America to the world.

It's the nerve center for the entire global economy. It has America's most famous sports teams, museums, buildings, and more. It is the global capital of finance, media, and the arts.

America simply giving up on New York is like the British Empire giving up on London or the Roman Empire giving up on Rome.

**And of course, that 's exactly why Marxists like Mamdani want to conquer it.**

If we won't fight for one of our nation's crown jewels, then we deserve to lose it.

Turning Point PAC is taking back critical swing states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire from radical socialists like Mamdani.

But we can't do it without you, Fellow Conservative.

**Please donate today to make America First the law of the land in 2026, 2028, and beyond.**

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Let me introduce you to Zohran Mamdani: The socialist candidate for mayor of New York City. It took this guy approximately ZERO days to confirm our worst suspicions. Mamdani, a self-declared socialist, wants to "globalize the intifada" and import values into the West that will destabilize our civilization. Everything about him runs counter to America First. The fact that he could win in arguably America 's greatest city proves that, while we won Congress and the White House, the fight for the heart, soul, and future of America still rages on. Turning Point PAC is working harder than ever to . We must ensure that radical socialists like Mamdani do NOT gain power in cities, counties, and states across the country. Help us and by donating today. Fellow Conservative, the future of Trump 's agenda will be decided on the streets of Los Angeles, Chicago, and New York. America simply giving up on New York is like the British Empire giving up on London or the Roman Empire giving up on Rome. And of course, that 's exactly why Marxists like Mamdani want to conquer it. If we won't fight for one of our nation's crown jewels, then we deserve to lose it. name: David Hogg
subject: This is a culture we have to break
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Peter,

I’m always direct in these emails. Papering over bad news doesn’t help our
team win.

It is a hell of a lot harder to slow, derail, and stop Trump from crashing
the economy, disappearing people, and leading our country into ruin with a
weak Democratic Party.

With a 26% approval rating, that is where we are right now. If the
midterms were held today, we would lose.

And yeah, a few members of the old-school Democratic establishment are
pissed at me for calling us weak. They can’t understand why Leaders We
Deserve would consider primarying old, ineffective congressmen who are
asleep at the wheel during the most consequential moments in our political
history.

In today’s party politics, there’s an unwritten rule. If you win a seat,
it’s yours for life. No one serious in your party will challenge you. That
is a culture we have to break.

I am doing this so that we have a stronger party. We stand a significantly
better chance at defeating MAGA if we can build a more effective
Democratic Party that gives voters a real alternative — a vision for the
future they believe in.

The answer lies in building the party we all know we could be. A party
that restores people's faith in Democracy by using it to revive the
American Dream through lowering costs and fighting special interests. To
do that requires serious change, though.

Yes, there are incredible Democratic leaders that we already have who are
stepping up. But unfortunately there are far too many who are asleep at
the wheel and completely failing to meet the moment. That is unacceptable.

We cannot recycle the same playbook and expect different results. So
Leaders We Deserve launched a $20 million fund to usher in the next
generation.

1. Primarying asleep-at-the-wheel Democrats in deep blue seats. It might
seem counterintuitive to do this in blue seats, but people decide
their votes based on what they think about Democrats and Republicans
overall. The weak, ineffective, out-of-touch members of Congress are a
liability for us all.
2. Supporting young, frontline Democrats running in tight red-to-blue
races. Making sure the next generation of leaders in tough districts
have our full support, and that the old, ineffective guard doesn’t
weigh them down.Second item

When we challenge the status quo, some incumbents will rise to the
occasion and emerge stronger, reminded of who they serve. Others will
demonstrate exactly why they need to be replaced. Either way, the party
gets stronger, and the American people win.

This $20 million initiative is ambitious. But it’s not a random number
pulled out of a hat. Based on how much these elections cost, it’s the
amount of money that we think makes a serious dent in the way people think
about the Democratic Party. It allows us not just to run in one or two
important races, but to run in several and make a genuine splash.

But here’s the catch. That $20 million only happens if we raise it
together. I’m not independently wealthy. We don’t have a cadre of secret
billionaires waiting in the wings to fund this effort. This isn’t a
lottery ticket.

This action plan for a renewed, stronger Democratic Party comes down to
each of the people reading this email doing what they can with what they
have. If we all rise to that level, we will hit this $20 million goal and
the plan will work.

I know that everyone reading this email isn’t in a position to donate.
That is okay. And I believe we can fund this effort successfully in a
truly progressive way. Here’s how:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

⇢HIGH EARNERS: If you have done well and can afford it, please consider
investing more for those who can’t.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250710_1_resendpissedatme?refcode=em20250710-2368&amount=1000&refcode2=2368_587540_0l2EGw&akid=2368%2E587540%2E0l2EGw ]Click to donate $1,000, [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250710_1_resendpissedatme?refcode=em20250710-2368&amount=500&refcode2=2368_587540_0l2EGw&akid=2368%2E587540%2E0l2EGw ]$500 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250710_1_resendpissedatme?refcode=em20250710-2368&amount=100&refcode2=2368_587540_0l2EGw&akid=2368%2E587540%2E0l2EGw ]or $100 or as much as you can.

⇢MEDIUM EARNERS: Give what you can. What’s more important is that we’re
all in this together. If thousands of people give small amounts each
month, this plan will still work.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250710_1_resendpissedatme?refcode=em20250710-2368&amount=25&refcode2=2368_587540_0l2EGw&akid=2368%2E587540%2E0l2EGw ]Click to donate $25 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250710_1_resendpissedatme?refcode=em20250710-2368&amount=5&recurring=true&refcode2=2368_587540_0l2EGw&akid=2368%2E587540%2E0l2EGw ]or $5 each month.

⇢EVERYONE ELSE: If you are not in a position to donate, that’s okay. We
each have a role to play in this plan, and yours might be to do all of the
free things you can do. Get active on social media. Tell your friends
about what we’re doing. Forward this email around. You are just as
important in this fight.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

We’ll check in periodically with you on our progress here. But I really
believe that today we’re going to make a big step in the right direction
on fundraising for the plan.

Thank you for reading, especially a long email like this one. It means a
lot to me personally to be in this work and this fight with teammates as
dedicated as you. The energy I draw from people like you is what keeps me
fighting every day. So thank you.

David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1001&akid=2368%2E587540%2E0l2EGw
Update Your Information: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=2368%2E587540%2E0l2EGw

Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE #192
Washington, DC 20003
info@leaderswedeserve.com

[PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE]

body:

**“Texas Plans Mid-Decade Redistricting After Pressure from White House” — Democracy Docket** Peter, After mounting pressure from Donald Trump, Governor Abbott just announced plans for a _rare_ mid-decade redraw of the Texas congressional map. Make no mistake: This is just another right-wing tactic to cling to their slim, unearned majority in the House of Representatives and steal the midterm elections. Republicans know their policies are unpopular, so they’re using every tactic they’ve got to suppress our voices — including extreme gerrymandering. The NDRC is committed to pushing back against this anti-democracy attack to ensure Texas maps are fair and its elections reflect the will of the people. But we need the full strength of this grassroots movement behind us. clean_body: Can you make a donation to help fight back against right-wing efforts to rig maps in Texas? | “Texas Plans Mid-Decade Redistricting After Pressure from White House” — Democracy Docket Peter, After mounting pressure from Donald Trump, Governor Abbott just announced plans for a rare mid-decade redraw of the Texas congressional map. Make no mistake: This is just another right-wing tactic to cling to their slim, unearned majority in the House of Representatives and steal the midterm elections. Republicans know their policies are unpopular, so they’re using every tactic they’ve got to suppress our voices — including extreme gerrymandering. The NDRC is committed to pushing back against this anti-democracy attack to ensure Texas maps are fair and its elections reflect the will of the people. But we need the full strength of this grassroots movement behind us. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Take a look at Attorney General Eric H. Holder’s reaction: = Let’s be clear: Texas’ congressional map already favors Republicans. They are seizing an opportunity to manipulate maps even further in a blatant power grab. We can’t let them get away with this attempt to lock in a partisan advantage in the middle of a crisis. Now is the time to scale-up our fight to protect democracy, fair maps, and fair representation in Texas and across the country.= Thanks so much — we’ll keep you posted on what happens next. name: Colin Allred
subject: I have an exciting announcement to make
body:
Colin Allred here, and I have some exciting news to share: I officially launched my campaign last week to be Texas’ next U.S. Senator.
Will you split a donation of $5 between my campaign and Tobias Read right now to help me reach 50,000 Founding Donors in the first days of my campaign for Senate? I need your support so we can flip Texas blue and take on the corrupt politicians like John Cornyn and Ken Paxton, who are rigging the economy against hard-working Texans. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-allred?refcode=250710em]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-allred?refcode=250710em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-allred?refcode=250710em]
Here's why you giving $5 today matters more than ever:
- Republicans are already in a messy primary, with front-runner Texas AG Ken Paxton trying to throw doctors in jail for providing abortion care.
- Now, not just one but TWO brand-new polls show me leading in this race.
- With Trump and the GOP wreaking havoc on our economy, our fundamental rights, and our democracy, we need leaders who will take on corruption.
People are fired up – and they’re ready to fight back!
That’s why I’m asking for $5 today . Seriously, it can make a HUGE difference in these early days of our grassroots campaign.
I know $5 might not sound like much when you think of the tens of millions the GOP and their rich mega donors have. But it adds up quickly! If everyone reading this chips in, we'll hit our goal in minutes, and we'll be that much closer to finally bringing Texas the leadership we deserve.
Will you be a Founding Donor of this campaign by giving $5 now to split between my campaign and Tobias Read , so that I can reach voters in every corner of Texas and win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-allred?refcode=250710em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-allred?refcode=250710em]
I want to finish the job we started last year, but I need your help to do it.
– Colin Allred
Tobias Read is Oregon's Secretary of State. To support him directly, please donate here. [https://www.tobiasread.com]
Colin Allred is running for U.S. Senate in Texas. You can support him directly here. [https://colinallred.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Mark Harris
subject: The Midterms Are Coming — We Can’t Let the Left Flip the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Harris for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/markharrisforcongress.com/the-midterms-are-coming-we-cant-let-the-left-flip-the-house?e=4024c5123e)
---
| | [ ](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=2502338cc6&e=4024c5123e)
---
| **Dear Friend,** I’m proud to be fighting for an America First agenda in Congress alongside President Trump. The priorities we’re focused on — securing the border, protecting free speech, supporting our farmers, and ensuring our education system is free from foreign influence — don’t just impact the 8th District, they shape the future of our entire nation.

Here’s what we’re fighting for:
* **Border Security:** _A nation without borders isn’t a nation. Strong enforcement protects our communities and our economy._
* **Free Speech & Religious Liberty:** _Silencing pastors or everyday citizens threatens the core of our freedoms. That’s why I support the Free Speech Fairness Act—to ensure your voice is never silenced._
* **Supporting Farmers & Our Military:** _Our farmers feed America, and our military defends it. Both deserve unwavering support, not globalist policies that weaken them._
* **Education Reform:** _Foreign adversaries have no place in our classrooms. We need parent-led, truth-based education that puts kids—not bureaucrats—first._

The midterms are fast approaching, and the Left is going to do everything they can to flip the House. They’re pouring millions into races like ours because they know our America First agenda is working — and they want to stop it.

We can’t afford to fall behind. [**Your donation of $25, $50, or $100 will help us defend our values, hold the line, and keep America strong.**](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=4f97f37955&e=4024c5123e)
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=1791b7fc2f&e=4024c5123e "DONATE NOW!")
---
| _Thank you for standing with us._

Sincerely,

Mark Harris

| | Hi Peter –

Representative Zoe Lofgren has been fighting tirelessly to uphold our Constitution and protect our democracy from Trump and his far-right allies in Congress.

All while Trump loyalists like Roger Stone defame her name and reputation – _in hopes of replacing her in Congress and growing their MAGA majorities.

_But Zoe’s former colleagues, Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger, are speaking out to defend her and working to help keep her in Congress.
---
| | [ **Chip in now to join Zoe in the fight against Trump and his MAGA allies >>** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111274353/556713681/-1467160713?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-10_LIZ_ADK_ES-27436&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGM2NWE2YS1mMjVkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bIuPXe4WsbNZ-oLLN67EKRUeQnrbaWesjL06YZFt10E=)
---
Last week, Trump’s cronies in Congress passed one of the most destructive pieces of legislation:

→ Cutting healthcare for nearly 11.8 million Americans;
→ Cuts to SNAP benefits (which help more than 40 million Americans);
→ Increasing the budget for immigration detention centers and ICE;

subject: Rep. Jeffries just broke his silence:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
“The American People will remember.”
| Folks, Hakeem Jeffries just _BROKE HIS SILENCE_ ⬇️ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91873?t=6&akid=20542%2E878179%2EzGjm_a) **_THIS is the bold response we need right now in the face of MAGA extremism._**

Rep. Jeffries is working tirelessly to hold Trump and his MAGA buddies accountable, and we couldn’t be more grateful. [**So we’re hand-delivering this card to his office at 8 AM tomorrow. Claim your spot ASAP before we hit send: SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91873?t=7&akid=20542%2E878179%2EzGjm_a) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91873?t=8&akid=20542%2E878179%2EzGjm_a)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

House Republicans have been nothing more than puppets for Donald Trump: GUTTING Medicaid, THREATENING Social Security, and making Trump a KING!!

I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to defend our democracy, and for never backing down in the face of MAGA attacks.

**So today, I’m answering your call to action to make sure we FLIP the House and STOP Trump and his MAGA agenda before things get even worse!**

[**I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to join your critical fight and to help Democrats flip the 3 seats we need to take back control of the House and END Trump’s trifecta! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91873?t=9&akid=20542%2E878179%2EzGjm_a) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91873?t=10&akid=20542%2E878179%2EzGjm_a) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91873?t=11&akid=20542%2E878179%2EzGjm_a)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
Thanks so much for signing!

\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20542%2E878179%2EzGjm_a). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20542%2E878179%2EzGjm_a).**

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: I refuse to back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
There are so many fantastic patriots in our Commonwealth; folks from all different walks of life and from every corner of Virginia.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhkkjble1mrg3svng6bb2org3n12ngbijf8tstio_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o35cdh2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za0mhg4fuc8p9tmh82rprjtk45vnabq89fosf5s8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o35cdh2bs) Friend - this is how we win.
There are so many fantastic patriots in our Commonwealth; folks from all different walks of life and from every corner of Virginia. Common-sense conservatives are all standing together right now to ensure we win this race.
We may not all look the same, but we all have this in common: we'll do whatever it takes to build a brighter future here in Virginia for us, children, and neighbors!
Back in 2021, Governor Youngkin, AG Miyares, and I gave everything we had to winning in a tough and crucial battle. With support from dedicated conservatives like you, we won that race.
It was a tipping point for our Commonwealth. We had a choice to follow the most radical wing of the Demcorat party down a path of irreversible socialism and DEI practices or to choose to build our Commonwealth into the best version it can be. Virginians chose freedom, education, and prosperity then and we've been so much better off because of it.
Now, we're facing another tipping point. If we do not stand together just as we did four years ago, my radical Democrat opponent will win this CRITICAL race and send Virignia into a socialist tailspin!
I will not let a dishonest, radical Democrat like Abigail Spanberger undo all of the work that Governor Youngkin and I have done to protect and build up Virginia!
I'm 100% committed to winning and keeping our Commonwealth red, Friend. I'm sure you don't want to see a radical Leftist take control of our home. [If you're with me, I'm personally asking you to chip in just $10, $15, or even $29 to send Spanberger packing and keep Virginia red! Donate anything you can today >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfh52jvogqqk4b6onr2hqr4rh4am4ta7qei9fju8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o35cdh2bs) [ DONATE $10 >>

](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbglcs2hoc8a8ej370ab3q7icn3rrg28pcc0jpa0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o35cdh2bs) [ DONATE $29 >>
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf0v1a887da8td1k06p31dlmcj5hme9ikb92iq2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o35cdh2bs) [ DONATE ANYTHING YOU CAN >>
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbeb55okpla58sglpve9ni2a98lg0lbka4f91r98_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o35cdh2bs) We win when we stick together, Friend. It's that simple. This race is a virtual tie, so anything you can give will be a HUGE help in giving me and my team the extra boost we need. [ DONATE NOW >>
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaqmusqh6v9qffersh8sfa65l5hfljncs9gnh560_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o35cdh2bs) Thanks so much for your help and support!
May God bless you and your family,
Winsome Earle-Sears Lt. Governor of Virginia

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z48erl8s56a5rnsf2j84mr8mnivuomdl8sptshog_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o37chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqcdn84nscbfe5hjnl30chm891ench0k3bohgckg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o37chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeu7fedre1d4qilaepqclc2ffohp8aoo84qs0le8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o37chh2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh3chck5q0hicag3cgvmq9uieqq6s7i92mbb7an8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o37chh2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Johnny Garrett
subject: Matthew 28:18 really hits home for me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Johnny Garrett For Congress
body:
Here’s why:

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm27rhh4ggn5aa72o7280u9067l6ter6fqglonj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o34sth2bs) "Then Jesus came to them and said, 'All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.'" The meaning of Matthew 28:18 has always resonated with me, Friend.
How come?
Because no matter what happens in this world, I ultimately answer to one authority: God.
It's Johnny Garrett here, the pro-Trump conservative candidate for Congress in Tennessee's must-win 6th Congressional District.
I was born and raised in the heart of Tennessee, where the values of family and faith were instilled in me from a young age.
20 years ago, the idea of running for Congress wouldn't have even crossed my mind. I would have laughed if someone had suggested it.
But this is God's plan.
In a swamp where special interests and mega corporations call the shots, I'm committed to answering to Him, and Him only.
If you send me to Washington, I'll NEVER forget that.
I'm just an everyday guy who goes to church on Sundays and volunteers with Little League baseball. [Now, I'm asking you to take this leap of faith with me by chipping in a few dollars to support my campaign.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zceqv2872o67vdjgruk1dq491o49klocopbisemg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o34sth2bs) | [TAKE A LEAP OF FAITH >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd5mu8v0qo4n91bsq2f34cr4brgtoglrbatos0u8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o34sth2bs)
---

---
Thank you for your time,
Johnny Garrett

name: Real American Reporting
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of political and economic freedom.

| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8qlkgg7cvg04duaelmvte4gnm8vd6tdoql9ggt0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o34sth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we’ve seen a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and against capitalism.
---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zeehqqhq76gu77mh25j99c91ph2rh2i4qob7n820_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o34sth2bs)
---
| | **But do they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and capitalism?** This is _precisely_ why we put together this brand new eBook, **[_The History Of Socialism And Capitalism_](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zlqja6blur6hcrigjhrja3d8684e8h6mb6h2t5mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o34sth2bs)**[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z4hf3gvsrdkictbk302m52tfcbitc71cr50tshe0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o34sth2bs), from Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson. This eBook consists of two papers—one from each scholar—written in conjunction with _The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and Free-Market Capitalism_. This project provides objective and scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and well-being. I think you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely, given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political leaders. **[Simply click here to request your free copy of _The History Of Socialism And Capitalism_.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zl4o83irh82okr4kc01rpkamc13154h4jdamq3to_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61o34sth2bs)** Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world. Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsi8prvqt011vl2a5ma71dm5dhjntgmupv84482g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61p72clh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmbtrhs3lmham6fj729353c54q9p4gj0l63gc5ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61p72clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zn4efjrebhi7fnrj0ueobks8ubp9birds7c2ati0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61p72clh2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zp9if4j26otfua3luth5gf518oivnmi3av11jhe8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9h61p72clh2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Historic Supreme Court Win! Fund the Fight to Defund Planned Parenthood Nationwide
body:
We’re celebrating a monumental victory for life! In a 6-3 Supreme Court ruling

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqb6oqmabol857t8ettt6k8deot57llmierv1kn8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9j68or4c1h2bs)

##
Dear Champion of Life,

We're celebrating a monumental victory for life! In a 6-3 Supreme Court ruling, Alliance Defending Freedom attorneys successfully argued _Medina v. Planned Parenthood South Atlantic_ , empowering states to stop taxpayer dollars from funding Planned Parenthood's abortion agenda and redirect them to life-affirming healthcare providers. This landmark decision is a beacon of hope, proving that the abortion industry's grip on public funds can be broken.

But the battle is far from over. Planned Parenthood still brings in hundreds of millions of dollars in taxpayer money annually across 49 states, profiting from the destruction of unborn lives. No taxpayer should be forced to subsidize abortion.

Your donation today will empower ADF attorneys to protect unborn children, support mothers, and stand alongside states that want to redirect taxpayer dollars to real healthcare that values every life.

Join us in this historic moment. Contribute now at [https://adflegal.org/thank-you/medina-win-da/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z15ovggvsucmdeq0om2tu279q9ek109lb702ccg0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9j68or4c1h2bs) to fuel ADF's legal battles and build a pro-life America. Your tax-deductible gift of any amount will make a difference.

In Christ,

**Julia Payne Koon**
Legal Counsel ****
P.S. ADF attorneys won this fight in South Carolina, and we are ready to protect the unborn and real healthcare options for women across the country--but we need your help. disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
China now controls over 380,000 acres – more than the ENTIRE city of Los Angeles.

MAJOR DEVELOPMENT:MAGA Warriors Brooke Rollins, Pete Hegseth, and Kristi Noem just unveiled their plan to RECLAIM AMERICA'S HEARTLAND from Communist China.
This is a big, BIG deal.
No Administration has had the guts to stand up to Communist China like this before. For years, Radical Democrats looked the other way and sold our country out to the highest bidder. Joe Biden even filed legal action to ALLOW Chinese nationals to expand their grip on our farmland.
Here's the reality:
Foreign ownership of U.S. farmland has surged 85% since 2010. With China controlling over 380,000 acres - more than the ENTIRE city of Los Angeles - much of it sits dangerously close to military bases, food processing centers, and nuclear facilities.
But President Trump and his Administration are taking the bull by the horns to take back our land.
Their stance is clear: Not one blade of American grass should be owned by Communist China.
[Do you agree with their bold action? Sign our petition to support reclaiming ALL Chinese-owned farmland - starting with land near 1) military bases, 2) nuclear sites, and 3) critical food infrastructure:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvsp6bab0qp7n0q57fa0dabhn7bn1s3c7q104is0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9j68or0cth2bs)[ADD YOUR NAME HERE

Now we need to help the Trump Administration finish the job.
That's why we have set a goal of gathering 1,000,000 signatures in the next 24 hours to show overwhelming support for reclaiming our land.
The stakes couldn't be higher - and the opposition is ruthless. Foreign nationals, billionaire investors, and globalist insiders are pulling every string they can.

# **[Did cloud seeding cause the Texas floods? Glenn Beck speaks with the man with the most fingers pointed at him](http://trk.libertyledger._znF_D80E3TVOR07w)**
---
Over Fourth of July weekend, Kerrville, Texas, was devastated by catastrophic flooding along the Guadalupe River, which rose 26 feet in just 45 minutes. The floods have claimed more than 100 lives, many of whom were children, but that number is expected to rise, as there are still several missing people.While Central Texas is known for flooding — sometimes severe flooding — what happened last week is unprecedented in its severity. Many aren’t convinced that this was just a freak act of nature. There are growing theories that the floods were caused by human tampering with weather patterns — specifically cloud seeding, a technique where chemicals are released into clouds to encourage them to produce precipitation.One person in the crosshairs of this theory is Augustus Doricko, founder and CEO of Rainmaker, a U.S.

Gov. Greg Abbott released his agenda Wednesday for the special legislative session scheduled to start on July 21. Four directives related to [flood preparedness and response](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLtugzAUhp8GNtA5vsLgoQtbunZExj4ES-ZS2wnJ21fkFbp__0Xfz2282RDDdv-2K5nymvdxozNHKoXSWOhlt5wfx7GnMsd998_gSljzyIDJBnSDOHob4nsUtTcT-B5rMqglYxxVx-vFCFCexAQdU97NAKRwlgBcaoWklayDucpAIyICom41OKkVdyBIOEJfCSAfyp7astB1Kc_xvT8ptW5f62iWUo5c8a-KDRUbzvO8OEdboZR_HzbRxVVs-EQrNthUgos0et_xvle86aSTjfAKm2mWXeMV8zPHSdhetEtZY52MP84QY8hKVwLuqw3xM17-p-xp2F8AAAD__wClfug) are at the top of the [18-item list](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOozAURb8GOpBtIIbCRbRaVltkdzTNlJaxH2DpgS37hSR_PyK_MNVprq6OztdN34xHvy__zAaKnnPQOzwyAhEkTfA0e873GEOiGUNwh7fkt6wFE13FZMW5dsbjS7elUxNzAy9BcdkJ0fBL35Sr6g2buHWGwyTmQZjGtpYNbSc6B2zqm9Kr84xJzjlnnMtaMtvJS2NZC60F7oqWgfMUUk0rnEp5xlc4INU2bCWqlSjmorkWYizEuISjfo_qJRyFGO8Rg3G5EOPsEU7GBPnkx-f_X3r2KZO2BhGczpCzD7vuB1o1wuIzGron0H9v1z-_NZMVGyrR1dHNZVIuPjyizxdZtGzZjMe3EP0s46HEdwAAAP__TLGJBg), which also includes regulating products containing THC.

# Friday, July 11, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1919, the [Longview Race Riot](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkEGSpCAQAF-DNw0KbdEDh714673u0UAolVikDKjR7t9P9HxhPpCZkf-e89OGGNL21x5o-LXSnPAuEZkxz4wvm0r5Ok_KvEYifwXH4SizkupRS10DzN6G-J67yptF-hEqNKAfSrXQD221m6FXnRzazim_rINeVq8WwNVpNQ4tSKiC-cCkBgCQALrR0j103zrZYecQvOgk-sCUG97xk1TW-KYLc-PoqKLZmc8i2j9CTUJN9303XHZLKYaEDeVNqGm3yS9E_4WaMHEOWISaIqXtCnjX2TqscyCuaa1hhLHKxp93iDGUXotObocN8cfGv3t0GfUdAAD__yX-fJQ) broke out, fueled by a newspaper article about a purported relationship between a local black man and a white woman. It was the second of 25 racial disturbances across America during what came to be known as the Red Summer. Today is 7/11, which means you can get a free Slurpee from Texas-based 7-Eleven. Check out the details [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u3CAUBOCnwR0r_gxsQZHG3U2b0sJw2EXBxoKz9vXbR84r3HZGGn2aP1_zl88lb6_ffgWH36nOG5y9ACK0GeHbb71_9r02TKXWeOSAee2zYGKkzFDO5-hzuWY1RLew-OQDOG5GISTXVg5vN0bhrTYpRAmLtJYt_hkDE_AEpZhahuzuMWY455xxbh6GhdFoGZgCFYBHohjEjLU98A03qady1QPaI9R1KO6NuHcifxExETGd5_k4k_d3ScTkG-ZQgIhprRtcREyGQoEDNtrLp-0ANPqLYv1sL6DoEWulqd1xy9tfIiZhDeWgxJJGTbUMnKqQNPU2BWolYyxEa3RahubifuZScteGKPZafS7_ifizYw8n_gUAAP__t_SMVQ). ## Officials Questioned Over Flood Warnings
At least 120 people are confirmed to have died in the [July 4 flash floods](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAYhJ8GOxx-5ORSUKSxu7QpHYTfkwTBAZTz7TPeK6Te2W--3e_H-NDOu_D80iuq8prjGLBmj6VgGgu-dMh537aYyuxjtIczxa155IzfKJMUYLTa-XMUjVUTsx_QoAJ547yD_t41i5Ly3uHUC91xy-0MdzPN3BojZqtBStE4dcGYBABgALKVzNxk3xkmUBgESwRD60pMbVnwUsqzP-OBqTVxbbxaStky6T4JHwgfaq3t70uHKyR8MBhK0p6-e4QP3h1IJx-f9L2HJjQX6qR7sJiqPqnONKNOZsFMTQzFhR3pz-5PCozwoUnKbtV573IviWDPVTv_Nin_--9Q_C8AAP__gp6IKg) in Kerr County and Central Texas. Volunteers and first responders continue to search along the Guadalupe River to find 161 people who are still missing. Gov. ## Abbott Releases Special Session Agenda
Gov. Greg Abbott released his agenda Wednesday for the special legislative session scheduled to start on July 21. Four directives related to [flood preparedness and response](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLtugzAUhp8GNtA5vsLgoQtbunZExj4ES-ZS2wnJ21fkFbp__0Xfz2282RDDdv-2K5nymvdxozNHKoXSWOhlt5wfx7GnMsd998_gSljzyIDJBnSDOHob4nsUtTcT-B5rMqglYxxVx-vFCFCexAQdU97NAKRwlgBcaoWklayDucpAIyICom41OKkVdyBIOEJfCSAfyp7astB1Kc_xvT8ptW5f62iWUo5c8a-KDRUbzvO8OEdboZR_HzbRxVVs-EQrNthUgos0et_xvle86aSTjfAKm2mWXeMV8zPHSdhetEtZY52MP84QY8hKVwLuqw3xM17-p-xp2F8AAAD__wClfug) are at the top of the [18-item list](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOozAURb8GOpBtIIbCRbRaVltkdzTNlJaxH2DpgS37hSR_PyK_MNVprq6OztdN34xHvy__zAaKnnPQOzwyAhEkTfA0e873GEOiGUNwh7fkt6wFE13FZMW5dsbjS7elUxNzAy9BcdkJ0fBL35Sr6g2buHWGwyTmQZjGtpYNbSc6B2zqm9Kr84xJzjlnnMtaMtvJS2NZC60F7oqWgfMUUk0rnEp5xlc4INU2bCWqlSjmorkWYizEuISjfo_qJRyFGO8Rg3G5EOPsEU7GBPnkx-f_X3r2KZO2BhGczpCzD7vuB1o1wuIzGron0H9v1z-_NZMVGyrR1dHNZVIuPjyizxdZtGzZjMe3EP0s46HEdwAAAP__TLGJBg), which also includes regulating products containing THC. Abbott is also [calling on lawmakers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGvnDAQhH-N6Yx2F4O5wkUaupc2JTL2wlkxGGE_uPv3EVemfd1KO5r5Zv58jV82xLAtv-3KprzmNG585cil8DEWftkt5-99T0eZY0r-DK6ENY8E1ErQEnH0NsT3qCpvJvAPrNigboka7PqmehoPDNo68KAnRMuAvQKngACbiZqmCuY2A42ICIi61uBa3TUOFCvH6IUC9qGkoy5PvpHyHN_p5KN2aa2ieZayZ9H8EjQIGq7rqv-e33w_BQ32KMFFFjTcvQQNe4qhBHefeWcXbJSZcw5pEzQsBy_STlMqRX6S5H8aaRfevBU0UPeQqoW-b2GSrXvMUlnl5OTJSt8hdRo9eq-rw_j9CjGG3GmhYFltiB_y8rO9T0P_AgAA__8OJJPm) to replace the high-stakes STAAR test for public school students, provide additional property tax relief, prohibit local governments from employing lobbyists, and propose a constitutional amendment to allow the attorney general to prosecute election crimes. An issue likely to be contentious is the redrawing of Democratic congressional districts [identified by the Department of Justice](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGu2yAQRb8G77CYwYZkwaLSE7vXbZeWDZOYCgMyJE7-vnLaP-huNDqauff8-p6-5xBDuv-cNzLtdctToqNGao32qdFrTrU-Ssl7u8Wc_TO4FrY6ocCRC80BJj-H-J6GzptF-Ct0ZECPiBLURXarETdxAViUul7hgrAQzE5JUCjEsviRumDOY0IDAAgA3WvhRq2kEwMNjsCzQZAPLe99W-mMVG_xnZ-09y5vXTRra6Uy-YOhZWgXBAVSXfu6PerqfDophvbfmqE9Cnc5NUqNoX2UmGdfT0DgyNAKzdB-vvCdfKhtPyunO_f5N__rhWuuOY59SXcmbcy1vpn8QobqpAuTX8BQHbR8xm43vhwhxlCVZoO4b3OIn-jt_4Q_Df4JAAD__66jkPU) as "unconstitutional racial gerrymanders." A new map could favor Republicans. Other issues [likely to face Democratic opposition](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkE3OpCAQQE-DOwzgD58LFr0xmUl6trM0CKWSIBiqWrtvP7GvMLtKKql67_19Tk8bYkjrH7uDofeSpwQXRiCCMhG8bUJ8HUcutMSc_RkchR0nJVTHheZSTt6G-JnayptZ-EFWYKTulGpk_9NUm4FeD3rwQs1igWG2nVX-p1G9HIa28wKqYO5jQksppZBS11q4TveNEy20DqRnrQAfKJeaNriRcImffEKpXd6raDaiA1nzYGpkaryuq94x3TumRkj8hUyNtxRT45FjoODucc0nXwus3M5zJuLOxogcD3DBRo6AGHLiSy78-5J_9ZEX8AGp3BnSym3ynDbH1GgLfzzkr0i_dVWMP64QY8Bes1asuw3xy0r_V_g06l8AAAD__xmrkyM) are enhanced restrictions on abortion—such as banning the purchase or distribution of abortion pills.
## Texans Express Support for Flood Victims
Texans are turning to prayer, public displays, art, and music to show their solidarity with the victims of the July 4 flash floods. Hundreds of people attended a [Wednesday night vigil](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGyozAMQE9jOmdsQXBSUGxD97fdkvHaImi-sRhbwM_td8gVttVo9PTen6_py1Oi_PrtVxzkZ-Yp41kTimCZBH98rnXfNi4yJ-Z4UBBa6wQG7to4be0UPaX31DVx-Gvi0zY4WHcHaG3_aJtlCN51xs8tBn_v2-fzgTDDw88deOxneDQ0XMeMs9ZaY627ORPurm-D6bALaKPqDEYSLjdZ8HqpzunNB5Zb4LVJwyKyVdX-UjAqGM_zvIVE4RsW3qtwvrYUjJeWgjFx8EnBeDEVjMYpGK1RMG4LC1cdeF33TPLWC2cuVcvCFXXiKpqyjnj4Kl4ov_QnyDU86EVJe9HfWMpBKWHVPkvCoqv4SPvFb8oQt5NSoto71ZnX6il9DOT_uh8D_AsAAP__8SSa-A) at Tivy High School's Antler Stadium in Kerrville to pray for those affected by the disaster. Volunteers and first responders continue to search along the Guadalupe River to find 161 people who are still missing. President Trump is scheduled to later today, having earlier approved a request for federal relief. Gov. Kerrville Mayor Joe Herring Jr. said Wednesday he had about resources the state had deployed to the area before the flood, and a CodeRED mobile alert was in the early morning hours on July 4. Austin Fire Department Chief Joel G. Baker faced a vote of no confidence this week after he was accused of in Kerr County on July 3. The day before, state regulators on an emergency plan at Camp Mystic. On Wednesday, Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller dismissed allegations that cloud seeding had contributed to the deadly flooding. "Let's put an end to the conspiracy theories," . Abbott Releases Special Session Agenda Gov. Greg Abbott released his agenda Wednesday for the special legislative session scheduled to start on July 21. Four directives related to are at the top of the , which also includes regulating products containing THC. Abbott is also to replace the high-stakes STAAR test for public school students, provide additional property tax relief, prohibit local governments from employing lobbyists, and propose a constitutional amendment to allow the attorney general to prosecute election crimes. An issue likely to be contentious is the redrawing of Democratic congressional districts as "unconstitutional racial gerrymanders." A new map could favor Republicans. Other issues are enhanced restrictions on abortion—such as banning the purchase or distribution of abortion pills. Texans Express Support for Flood Victims Texans are turning to prayer, public displays, art, and music to show their solidarity with the victims of the July 4 flash floods. Hundreds of people attended a at Tivy High School's Antler Stadium in Kerrville to pray for those affected by the disaster. A similar event was held in Coryell County. "We're reminded of the power of prayer ," . Several law enforcement agencies escorted the body of from Travis County to his hometown, where residents lined the streets to honor his service. A police procession also accompanied the body of 21-year-old from Kerrville. Texans across the state are around trees to show their support for the communities affected by the floods. In recent days, the Memorial City Mall in Houston and a building at the San Antonio Zoo have been illuminated with green light. Leo Soto of Miami has supplied a in Kerrville for families to honor lost loved ones. A carpenter from Ingram is to be erected at Camp Mystic. shared a song she had written. | Flying together with our sponsor Hope for Texas flood survivors You’ve seen the reports about the devastating death toll and massive destruction caused by floods in Texas. We're ensuring those who’ve lost everything don’t also lose hope. Torrential rains caused the Guadalupe River to rise 26 feet in just 45 minutes—the worst flooding the U.S. has seen in decades. Xu is awaiting extradition to the U.S. in Italy, while Zhang remains at large. name: Jim Banks
subject: Prophetic words from Stephen Miller 4 years ago…
body:
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .
| [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aN5E/?__vbtrk=MzAyMDQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAyMDQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Dear friend,
---
The year was 2021.
---
America was in a dark place. Biden and Kamala were waging war against our nation’s values, and the media had all but declared the MAGA movement _dead_.
---
But President Trump and so many of us – _you_ included, friend – _REFUSED_ to surrender the greatest country to the radical Left. _Frankly, how could we ever give up on America?_
---
_So, I sat down with a warrior who refused to give up on America – the now White House Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller – to discuss the Left’s threats of illegal immigration, critical race theory, woke ideology, and legal warfare._
---
_Most importantly, we talked about how President Trump’s America First Agenda could save our country once and for all._
---
**Now, four years later, thanks to your resolve and fighting spirit, we are witnessing the Trump-Vance Administration SAVE America and deliver on the very agenda Stephen Miller and I discussed.**
---
_And I’m proud to keep casting votes in the Senate to advance the President’s agenda._
---
**But just like we refused to give up during the darkest days of 2021, we MUST keep fighting after our historic victory in the 2024 election.**
---
If we want to protect and build on the progress we’ve made so far, we need a fully verified Trump National Census – which includes verifying _YOUR_ top priorities for the remainder of 2025.
---
Let’s finish the job to ensure we truly SAVE America!
---
[**So please, take a moment to privately complete (don’t let anyone view your screen) your official and secure 2025 TRUMP-VOTER CENSUS to verify your voter profile. >>**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aN5E/?__vbtrk=MzAyMDQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAyMDQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

[TAKE THE CENSUS >> ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aN5E/?__vbtrk=MzAyMDQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAyMDQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

Thank you,
---

name: Congressman Louie Gohmert
subject: Please join me in Denver, CO on August 9th!
disclaimer_text: paid for by Team Imer PAC and was not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
You are invited to join me and Team Imer in Denver, CO for a special evening celebrating the Golden Age of America...
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010hFN6Ob5UZDZWp2f1Svktme1Ba_GOh3VQchNkZUcWbJSxc6er9dYUoJe8Rwm5UA4IojUlJ1_TZjwLNi-eMw8AFfMQ61XplFPXKY2Tken5YH9taaOm2T-cPUuGG5fQUqvfqPtxD-BoNRhqtwA8C2OBkxJSgNZF1NAlr8MEIUplBcFHsnQVEP9M8rQG5sGerb-aG25nZxaEV-3wZ01xq5OtxVzETIR3Ogw7x7tlGtTBJKFSrXpJ88vdL2b3kQjg_s0&c=FVubsNEtYQ3Xv09QMpOhaI9NGYVOOIUSBRFvoZRO3Xc6nl8S-8-FNQ==&ch=f1hDjtv8YooY8hfEC7xeC1TH0f8Sc4W-HLwF8CQYY9pHySni-AIJiw==)
---
---
| Friend, I would like to invite you to join me and Team Imer on Saturday, August 9th, in Denver, CO, for a special evening benefiting the critically important work Team Imer is doing in Colorado to preserve the America we all know and love.
During President Trump's second Inauguration back in January, I met Laurel and Weston Imer and was thrilled to hear of the work being done through the Team Imer PAC.
You know what the opposition has been doing in Colorado, which makes this effort all the more vital and urgent. We simply cannot write off Colorado when voters are waking up.
Joining all those who are helping Team Imer on August 9th, especially at this crucial time as we approach 2026, is a real pleasure for me.
I look so very forward to meeting you there, discussing the past, present and future, all while furthering the mission to help Colorado and America.
It can be difficult at times being a conservative and suffering the slings and arrows from hostile haters, as I well know, but this should be a grand occasion to discuss our victories and the work ahead.
Tickets can be purchased at the website below, and opportunities to join the host committee are still available.
---
| [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010hFN6Ob5UZDZWp2f1Svktme1Ba_GOh3VQchNkZUcWbJSxc6er9dYUoJe8Rwm5UA4IojUlJ1_TZjwLNi-eMw8AFfMQ61XplFPXKY2Tken5YH9taaOm2T-cPUuGG5fQUqvfqPtxD-BoNRhqtwA8C2OBkxJSgNZF1NAlr8MEIUplBcFHsnQVEP9M8rQG5sGerb-aG25nZxaEV-3wZ01xq5OtxVzETIR3Ogw7x7tlGtTBJLlOlRgi9c3poXoppLwqs8s&c=FVubsNEtYQ3Xv09QMpOhaI9NGYVOOIUSBRFvoZRO3Xc6nl8S-8-FNQ==&ch=f1hDjtv8YooY8hfEC7xeC1TH0f8Sc4W-HLwF8CQYY9pHySni-AIJiw==)
---
| [RSVP Here!](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010hFN6Ob5UZDZWp2f1Svktme1Ba_GOh3VQchNkZUcWbJSxc6er9dYUoJe8Rwm5UA4IojUlJ1_TZjwLNi-eMw8AFfMQ61XplFPXKY2Tken5YH9taaOm2T-cPUuGG5fQUqvfqPtxD-BoNRhqtwA8C2OBkxJSgNZF1NAlr8MEIUplBcFHsnQVEP9M8rQG5sGerb-aG25nZxaEV-3wZ01xq5OtxVzETIR3Ogw7x7tlGtTBJKWS6m18N3fxnlSZE_nUXDo&c=FVubsNEtYQ3Xv09QMpOhaI9NGYVOOIUSBRFvoZRO3Xc6nl8S-8-FNQ==&ch=f1hDjtv8YooY8hfEC7xeC1TH0f8Sc4W-HLwF8CQYY9pHySni-AIJiw==)
---
| Our gracious hosts, Mr. and Mrs. Michael DiManna, Mr. Adam DeRito, Mrs. Charleen Carter, myself, and Team Imer are hopeful you will join us for this patriotic and fun filled evening.
See you soon!
My Best,
---
| | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010hFN6Ob5UZDZWp2f1Svktme1Ba_GOh3VQchNkZUcWbJSxc6er9dYUoJe8Rwm5UA4IojUlJ1_TZjwLNi-eMw8AFfMQ61XplFPXKY2Tken5YH9taaOm2T-cPUuGG5fQUqvfqPtxD-BoNRhqtwA8C2OBkxJSgNZF1NAlr8MEIUplBcFHsnQVEP9M8rQG5sGerb-aG25nZxaEV-3wZ01xq5OtxVzETIR3Ogw7x7tlGtTBJKyA2F8N5jkqfboavqs6o3F&c=FVubsNEtYQ3Xv09QMpOhaI9NGYVOOIUSBRFvoZRO3Xc6nl8S-8-FNQ==&ch=f1hDjtv8YooY8hfEC7xeC1TH0f8Sc4W-HLwF8CQYY9pHySni-AIJiw==)

Tickets can be purchased at the website below, and opportunities to join the host committee are still available. | == | == | Our gracious hosts, Mr. and Mrs. Michael DiManna, Mr. Adam DeRito, Mrs. Charleen Carter, myself, and Team Imer are hopeful you will join us for this patriotic and fun filled evening. See you soon! My Best, | | == | Fmr. name: CU4NH
subject: The GOP’s dream scenario come true
body:
In 2024, New Hampshire shifted 4.6% to the right. If we don’t speak to the concerns of the people here, we risk losing this seat and this state for the foreseeable future.
| | | | | [](https://hqigqzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SYKiQ6sj_vg4HQlQ6btrdP2HV79-nHMrbf4vj39l6TpsOZhb27t3x8PpNixEwAUjGgbuKk5w9VdhuWYP_T9aZxsRbnqT_Wi05_f6Pjei8_unXSjm-iaw75MHLwxay_rL1rK1EMIG2OHmnA4DnjmpF7gQZoZu59cmVrksBJ4tr-Z9_9ZXFzl4Azb64VC5Fet0ZIF9bH-n7LTKVqGLgiT48nPW6WeRexbD6RwQymv1jtY=&c=UxbtVMQqwBdz493BRkAyzMxrhv9Qy-r6cxUAFnbBtQ1jWqnDeuOfew==&ch=IUsnMgucd9G0lKb83zUX_W8r6Q_9G8N6wpnWOOkx0ucYjDiv9n74Fg==)
---
| | | | Peter,
Winning New Hampshire and flipping NH-01 from blue to red is the *top* priority for MAGA.
Flipping NH-01 is a "dream scenario" for Republicans. Here's why:
➡️ In 2024, New Hampshire shifted 4.6% to the right. Vice President Harris won here, but this district is a true swing seat.
🗳️ The Dem incumbent, Chris Pappas, has won every election since 2018 but is now vacating this seat to run for Senate. This race is wide open, and the GOP is eager to exploit every advantage they have to defeat us.
🇺🇸 Electing the right Democrat to take on and win against MAGA in November will be the deciding factor between flipping the House to Democrats or MAGA maintaining control of Congress.
If we don't elect a candidate, like myself, who speaks truthfully and boldly about the things that matter to voters, like access to good healthcare, affording food and housing for our families, and protecting our democracy and our rights from attack--we risk losing this seat and this state for the foreseeable future.
---

This race is wide open, and the GOP is eager to exploit every advantage they have to defeat us. 🇺🇸 Electing the right Democrat to take on and win against MAGA in November will be the deciding factor between flipping the House to Democrats or MAGA maintaining control of Congress. If we don't elect a candidate, like myself, who speaks truthfully and boldly about the things that matter to voters, like access to good healthcare, affording food and housing for our families, and protecting our democracy and our rights from attack--we risk losing this seat and this state for the foreseeable future. | | | | == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | | | == | | | | You can bet that Trump's billionaire MAGA allies and right-wing propaganda bros are watching this race closely, ready to fight to the bitter end--because their hold on power absolutely depends on winning here. name: Team Evergreen
subject: This email is about Texas and accountability
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
How you can show up in the wake of this climate (and budget) disaster
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3767517/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi friend,

Last weekend, devastating flash flooding hit Texas, claiming over a hundred lives and wrecking entire communities. We’re filled with immense grief as this climate disaster continues to unfold, and our hearts go out to everyone affected.

But alongside our grief, we also feel angry and frustrated.

When climate disasters strike, ordinary people suffer the consequences, not millionaire politicians like Ted Cruz. He notoriously helped cut funding for the National Weather Service, a system designed to protect American families, then immediately fled to Greece to evade accountability.

That same bill rolls back key clean energy programs and promotes fossil fuel development, all while ripping healthcare away from millions of Americans, raising our electricity bills, and giving huge tax breaks to the wealthiest billionaires.

As we continue to mourn and navigate this tragedy, **we must also call out the role politics plays in fueling climate disasters like the one in Texas Hill Country.** And that means holding our lawmakers accountable for failing to preserve programs that rein in the dangerous pollution we know is linked to extreme weather events. [**Will you join us in sending them a message about their recent vote?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3767518/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[HOLD YOUR REPS ACCOUNTABLE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3767519/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| And though this moment is ripe for accountability, it’s also a time for care, compassion, and mutual support. Communities have shown up for one another time and time again when our government fails to help those who are most vulnerable. Now is no different.

**If you’re looking for ways to show up for Texas communities and help with flood relief efforts directly on the ground, here are a few organizations and mutual aid efforts that you can donate to:** |
---
|
* [Community Foundation of the Texas Hill Country,
Kerr County Flood Relief Fund](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3767520/87SdQ4wZ)
* [Central Texas Community Foundation, Wilco Cares Fund](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3767521/87SdQ4wZ)
* [Austin Disaster Relief Network, Central Texas Flood Fund](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3767522/87SdQ4wZ)
* [Hands Off Central Texas Mutual Aid Fund](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3767523/87SdQ4wZ)

|
---
| The climate crisis isn’t happening _someday_. It’s happening _right now_ , affecting all of us. As always, Evergreen remains committed to our work advocating for real solutions that give everyone a chance at a safer, better future—and we’re glad to have you in this fight with us.

In solidarity,

Team Evergreen |
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/?utm_source=digital_template&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evergreen&utm_content=footer)
---
Follow Evergreen Action on Bluesky and LinkedIn.
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3767524/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3767525/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---
And follow our new project, **Hope This Helps.**
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3767526/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3767527/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3767528/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3767529/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---|---|---

1250 Connecticut Ave NW, Suite 700, Washington DC 20036

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f6bcce0-dbc2-45fe-b1d9-b57d8774f7e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We have only 12 hours left until the fundraising deadline closes. We need to send a powerful message to the socialists who are trying to take over New York.
It is up to us to stop the radical takeover of our state government. Will you join Senator Ortt in taking this stand?

-Team Ortt

And the same Mamdani who doesn't just want to destroy New York City--he and his communist friends want this radical agenda statewide.

clean_body: Time is Running Out! Help Us Stop the Socialist Agenda Today. | | | | Dear Supporters, We have only 12 hours left until the fundraising deadline closes. We need to send a powerful message to the socialists who are trying to take over New York. It is up to us to stop the radical takeover of our state government. Will you join Senator Ortt in taking this stand? == Thank you for your support! -Team Ortt \--------FORWARD---------- | | Friend, Tomorrow is our first major fundraising deadline of 2025--and we're staring down a full-blown socialist takeover. Albany Democrats aren't even pretending to think for themselves anymore. They're stampeding to line up behind Zohran Mamdani--a self-proclaimed socialist who's now their party's standard bearer. The same Mamdani who brags about wanting to "seize the means of production" and declared his intention to arrest the Prime Minister of Israel if he visits New York under his mayorship. And the same Mamdani who doesn't just want to destroy New York City--he and his communist friends want this radical agenda statewide. If we don't hit our fundraising goal by midnight tomorrow, we'll fall further behind in the fight to stop them. == | | == | Let's draw the line--before New York is lost. God bless, | | | Rob Ortt NY Senate Republican Leader | | | == | PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE | | | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279 | North Tonawanda, NY 14120 US | | | | | | |

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: What does an empowered citizen look like?
body:
Restore our traditions of empowered citizenship

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2006aae201ed499c86419726497d9233&_e=MyHpZ7CIY8SCqKjDQ9eF-1DWBSo5DBMeTUcUy7Qqq6FjrIE_eQOlGmJ-t5YHFnd3CnBmUhD7mkAm2wWcMeJcYzvcfpCULWKSgyjA01J9fJzgSE_UbGWvw74FgaXwoK_jjX8LKSoNcr_it5YpcdDAYG5myuvJb-dQQzJbAe-PDzUtQ5IejEeprstOWXPXBAATjXl5V9mJ3N5VQ74YwiLkCFFWBr9m6xhTwwa4IjrGSndNkyU-gCtNBcSayTCnMw13FamIuCir798YQ-82newUguK7m8D5Bpy-UmCmA2TlTgvC2Ex0YuXBs0Vj4VNdLT0-wApUKd_vxQrAo7FPNXCS6Db6OgQUmagEoqXFMbuxCtLGOxDQhdjBDhlP-mNym3Zhg2J8FhBU8UaqIyA9LBGldLviSiX0kKSDVnnnqJlOEMjY7_r6yPskD9J_VvNiVsRTaf-d7iKL_S9bl7RKJGN26e51yQsAtKeOA7DC0nn6pS59L8A4BYRPzDxB1fdOJ0DIA2T5H1-AfLx4LZFBxKdCM8II7JiyJDwR438tUK74lKhDbnF9L3UyWaPFaPi-WQr2gcWfw6DZW6V4WF4M5jPBFvuQRwOJT-lOeRI8jtp1x3GnEm3XWqQ8HPCYjoEuKYyP-JUVAXUf9KTF0xVDV3g-i3tzakHH524yKP8vvj71ZRv6d8wXiwiEzj1v1cYd3k_-i0x3zuZICe-7o79eV4lnlg%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter, I invite you to view our eight-lecture course "**[American Citizenship and Its Decline](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2006aae201ed499c86419726497d9233&_e=MyHpZ7CIY8SCqKjDQ9eF-1DWBSo5DBMeTUcUy7Qqq6FjrIE_eQOlGmJ-t5YHFnd3CnBmUhD7mkAm2wWcMeJcYzvcfpCULWKSgyjA01J9fJzgSE_UbGWvw74FgaXwoK_jjX8LKSoNcr_it5YpcdDAYG5myuvJb-dQQzJbAe-PDzUtQ5IejEeprstOWXPXBAATjXl5V9mJ3N5VQ74YwiLkCFFWBr9m6xhTwwa4IjrGSndNkyU-gCtNBcSayTCnMw13vyV1JJrZscVykc8_bmeBvQyZsVdwjTG_m_jplHBi2qIEI4FGNdVtL4AlP0njTkDh3SY7dAXvvmjd8-GqXXcCpFc8Npmzh4Brep9KIFEXixylWxAZNMRJ5yIDrlY2D5tDonU2gINewmd3MQlbaavu7j2bHExrfxMOZ-M7M401_CoilBVaFGD-lwXUWU9B94K63BdTVRTmEXEHfp20LUEowRL18hAmhQA2nCLfzmCQImcqDGEEh-MIjW_LfKkLvcPHFVNw_YPKGzKxWFXp9tr4NBVeMWrJcVlnB2oJ5GmrhSBjJAfSbMUPFcoJBg2CII2SZm2C_X55t_RlwSw3mVK2Zp-B2RiiGqLb1Fv0Zq07ajteaQElHlJ1Sjmkon8RohgfgUVmvA6KNpkQeBP3RUHSXzIPz7ATyex6hbcn-Vl3i2gRj7RfzGBys_POZzSB5RJY4bTHEQWqg8Q4rzUUeTxjXQ%3D%3D)** ," based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen_.

Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.

The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present—given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2006aae201ed499c86419726497d9233&_e=MyHpZ7CIY8SCqKjDQ9eF-1DWBSo5DBMeTUcUy7Qqq6FjrIE_eQOlGmJ-t5YHFnd3CnBmUhD7mkAm2wWcMeJcYzvcfpCULWKSgyjA01J9fJzgSE_UbGWvw74FgaXwoK_jjX8LKSoNcr_it5YpcdDAYG5myuvJb-dQQzJbAe-PDzUtQ5IejEeprstOWXPXBAATjXl5V9mJ3N5VQ74YwiLkCFFWBr9m6xhTwwa4IjrGSndNkyU-gCtNBcSayTCnMw130KJloznUcWv1ljzsazts2SkEk8vzBbIbrLSg66LicPzoe6pF9h0p1LbQCgCeROTCqRNa7s7EbRr-GmNpJSWq864Ovv5su88WQbrdHrRRyK-AX8kGA5GzUJhfFuGwXAxl_C1p0LaoxQEvicAwfPGF4_hCQjoMmP5DY2FrApGkhr41jDLkpfc2mAqitA5gF3nu-CxCf1KuMFd-N4qJCrzV6g6tP3cQqVHZRkm0sNSW-O55tEoK5t1Y_2-rFOQpG4O8YpZ8ZBcN476xoCBUX5BQqwTpoRGf0S3-pjAYTF6swVJ9nlLa_-GoVFryXJ95yNVo-p40MSZOclOek60OaEQ_U3QMEkpXvhVko-byxB1f56HvkKOhspaoVDX7iNx_SLz8DLH7l9NXskO1pDGO_zaWcpow-_XsEoNC-fE1crztwOt4NswDwWwVqi3nplkMuE97wp5AMmDXxIGByBP1nOQHdA%3D%3D)
---
| | Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and reassert control over the government.

You can receive a DVD box set of "**American Citizenship and Its Decline** " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdalƒe/citizenship-dvd](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2006aae201ed499c86419726497d9233&_e=MyHpZ7CIY8SCqKjDQ9eF-1DWBSo5DBMeTUcUy7Qqq6FjrIE_eQOlGmJ-t5YHFnd3CnBmUhD7mkAm2wWcMeJcYzvcfpCULWKSgyjA01J9fJzgSE_UbGWvw74FgaXwoK_jjX8LKSoNcr_it5YpcdDAYG5myuvJb-dQQzJbAe-PDzUtQ5IejEeprstOWXPXBAATjXl5V9mJ3N5VQ74YwiLkCFFWBr9m6xhTwwa4IjrGSndNkyU-gCtNBcSayTCnMw13aPpmhwkNiSBnTqTidPfjzjYAnb3F3CEsqV_QDMmNFBhYeu79S-qExoFRp2BGRANTgdFgzhpGoZy0QvbzmhvAVDye10wROqPP7db4SlDLqaYBnwKTojoMKrObq2nzNF_mTzq7kxCy74UG0wqP5FSUOp4-JLVV_NnZW47QJov35L-n0i5IFPf3nwx68aOlOQsq8rIXeOuX6vI5ky3NT1jlJLlulpKfrx9HzlgtuknskqfJYWtaxFCr1WtiOI-ZnH6DvixzYCeB57M3n_3sp6JLqL1x_ZSuoF85_z7jWuSiQvhQyLOOf7G1B-huSNaHTf1vS4FLmZbJH5PFlP66DlG6D0rYJbQfYRxf7-nStTdysWDWO7db1mZvtfKbsOtGPHYOakfscFpXBCz7Oo0QWV5M9YLXLo_1BpNtk9QpC9OPdlPpYmRxUOXXlyCxRGh8b4F2YywmoQpHDt_NAb1r-zID1Q%3D%3D)

Best wishes,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Rhena Hicks
subject: We’re Halfway There!
body:
Friends- We are SO close to the middle of the month, and we’re SO close to our July contributions goal! This month, as we cel
| | |
---
| |
---
| We're Halfway There!
---
| Friends-
We are SO close to the middle of the month, and we're SO close to our July contributions goal! This month, as we celebrate the new hidden fees legislation going into effect, we're refocusing to put all our energy behind other important affordability measures, such as a Prescription Drug Affordability Board, Paid Family & Medical Leave, Fair Taxes, and Affordable Housing.
As we reach the mid-point of the month, we ask for your support and contributions to help continue the work we are doing to create a fair and affordable economy in Virginia. [Chipping in $5 today will make a huge impact in the fight for an affordable Virginia](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aW4sPmvJwhIPdHQ3oW8WMG-DbVUmb2XrICegK-5Jg6nMP0DH4eYpYrSoc8yTHp81m0JIAGyo8fVsNGHZgiHPIGiiFeAqRNTW4-iT0U_Gt98DtJkVFa_0YSt4lr2zYukz6Onu487k0wXNDlotDpgTiZW79E5PGSkvcFHJ7eVYbPh7h78RIhca1YoCE2FhEZJBvzdyzx7N5qFQ_GmF0-jxhZaM-Z-bqiT5&c=eeCWIGy3TSVpcCraV61FStEvs3pyyZhLDkEGe18YOXKQ3YzlWDjIvg==&ch=p8WL8QZ2eAeCybm8E2HXkR-_tz4apCe6ZqaLFk5WFwgZkGtghqcQYw==).
---
| | [Contribute Today](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aW4sPmvJwhIPdHQ3oW8WMG-DbVUmb2XrICegK-5Jg6nMP0DH4eYpYvz_H8R-5c4b20iGojBkk4_HxYq-tXXB9p2FIZlgjbKWL9Fxep0Trmb3XXi8zLCMl1YkQ8ifhuWNbREpve0HxmFs4bIvzMb83lI6JhUrXUZyfbVljofOKRzZ8IGQauNRKNK9XTZyfiGBbWLODHR2MrDNklYeOEMDtha7707h1Ml9&c=eeCWIGy3TSVpcCraV61FStEvs3pyyZhLDkEGe18YOXKQ3YzlWDjIvg==&ch=p8WL8QZ2eAeCybm8E2HXkR-_tz4apCe6ZqaLFk5WFwgZkGtghqcQYw==)
---
| Whether you support us by chipping in or spreading the word on socials, your contribution makes a difference. Check out our social media and [website](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aW4sPmvJwhIPdHQ3oW8WMG-DbVUmb2XrICegK-5Jg6nMP0DH4eYpYrSoc8yTHp81ahqFYeGLM2FGI9QvDXX8DQvVSrGTjwUUpYCPD4xHUp_Fw7Y-jZ1cCYTIcnk0Oyzho_sB4ccpdSLq3rNOYlUpyQ==&c=eeCWIGy3TSVpcCraV61FStEvs3pyyZhLDkEGe18YOXKQ3YzlWDjIvg==&ch=p8WL8QZ2eAeCybm8E2HXkR-_tz4apCe6ZqaLFk5WFwgZkGtghqcQYw==) to stay up to date on the work being done for affordability in our Commonwealth.

name: Jim Banks
subject: Prophetic words from Stephen Miller 4 years ago…
body:
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1723151/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZm55N3N6MjU2Sw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTE/LbmNsRW04U2pSTg/qP2hpZHM9bmMzRVhJUWF6Y2U1R2dscw/gaHEQIA/sdvfd9129a6)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Dear Patriot,
---
The year was 2021.
---
America was in a dark place. Biden and Kamala were waging war against our nation’s values, and the media had all but declared the MAGA movement _dead_.
---
But President Trump and so many of us – _you_ included, Patriot – _REFUSED_ to surrender the greatest country to the radical Left. _Frankly, how could we ever give up on America?_
---
_So, I sat down with a warrior who refused to give up on America – the now White House Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller – to discuss the Left’s threats of illegal immigration, critical race theory, woke ideology, and legal warfare._
---
_Most importantly, we talked about how President Trump’s America First Agenda could save our country once and for all._
---
**Now, four years later, thanks to your resolve and fighting spirit, we are witnessing the Trump-Vance Administration SAVE America and deliver on the very agenda Stephen Miller and I discussed.**
---
_And I’m proud to keep casting votes in the Senate to advance the President’s agenda._
---
**But just like we refused to give up during the darkest days of 2021, we MUST keep fighting after our historic victory in the 2024 election.**
---
If we want to protect and build on the progress we’ve made so far, we need a fully verified Trump National Census – which includes verifying _YOUR_ top priorities for the remainder of 2025.
---
Let’s finish the job to ensure we truly SAVE America!
---
[**So please, take a moment to privately complete (don’t let anyone view your screen) your official and secure 2025 TRUMP-VOTER CENSUS to verify your voter profile. >>**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[TAKE THE CENSUS >> ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Senator Jim Banks
---

---
Paid for by Team Banks, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Banks for Senate and Building a National Knowledgeable Security PAC

PO Box 30844, Bethesda MD 20824
---
---

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Sick
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Look at this picture.
#

Team, take a look at this picture:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250711-1-b&t=1&akid=10668%2E3935704%2E-NH_OK)
This is Donald Trump, signing his “Big Beautiful Bill” into law. This bill provides a $2 billion tax break for gun silencers, while ripping health care away from 17 million people and cutting SNAP benefits for vulnerable families.
The bill passed by the narrowest margins in the House and Senate. These are some of the Republicans who voted to approve Donald Trump’s agenda:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250711-1-b&t=2&akid=10668%2E3935704%2E-NH_OK)
Guess what? Their seats are all up for election in 2026. With your support, we can hold Republicans like these accountable and elect real gun safety leaders in the midterm elections.
[**Will you contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today? We’ve set a goal of 10,000 grassroots donations before our mid-month deadline.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250711-1-b&t=3&akid=10668%2E3935704%2E-NH_OK)
