name: Team Moore
subject: Creepy
body:
“NOTE TO @GOVWESMOORE:”
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=296%2E1086043%2E0HuRrI)
**_“THE TAX MAN!”
“NOTE TO @GOVWESMOORE:”
“WE FOUND HIS SCHEDULE!”
_**
This is the tone from a small army of right-wing groups _obsessed_ with attacking Wes Moore and posting creepy AI-generated videos of him online.
Listen, we won’t get bogged down by what the haters say. Wes is busy enough making Maryland’s education the best in the country, improving jobs and the economy, and helping federal workers get back on their feet.
As bot accounts continue misleading folks online, Wes is laser focused on delivering work, wages, and wealth for Maryland. Leading Maryland through these tumultuous times is no easy feat. **Wes can’t do it without all of us showing up for him.**
**[SUPPORT WES MOORE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250711-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250711-1&refcode2=296_1086043_0HuRrI&akid=296%2E1086043%2E0HuRrI)**
We know this team is on our side, Peter. We’re building this reelection campaign _together_. Right now, we need you to help us prove that our army is as strong as we know it to be.
**[Will you pitch in $5, $10, or any amount that you are able so that we can continue supporting Wes’s work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250711-1?refcode=em-20250711-1&refcode2=296_1086043_0HuRrI&akid=296%2E1086043%2E0HuRrI)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250711-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250711-1&refcode2=296_1086043_0HuRrI&akid=296%2E1086043%2E0HuRrI)**
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Moore
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250711-1&t=2&refcode2=296_1086043_0HuRrI&akid=296%2E1086043%2E0HuRrI)**

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Erica Henry
subject: …1 woman in a crowd of 8 ambitious men
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
Let’s be realistic for a change... | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111299129/556769443/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250710Hines_N_EH_90DO_12_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5OTliNjQ4LTVkNWUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VjnHCH83ZX6nTuC9uUrD124aaAsfWg_CeQOd23CGDQM=)
---
Hi Peter,

As we gear up for the critical 2026 midterm elections, we have another exciting endorsement for you: **Christina Hines running in the congressional race that will likely decide which political party will have control of congress in the 2nd half of Trump’s term.**

In the 2022 election for this seat, Republican John James won this district by 0.5% – not even a full 1% – despite outspending his Democratic opponent by a 5-to-1 margin. Now, John James is running for Governor, meaning **this is the _only _open_ competitive_ House seat on the entire electoral map.** All of the other U.S. House races in swing districts have Republican incumbents – which makes it tougher for a Democrat to break through.

This race provides an incredible opportunity for Democrats to win back the House and we absolutely cannot let it slip away.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111299132/556769444/1733627654?refcode=EM_F_250710Hines_N_EH_90DO_12_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5OTliNjQ4LTVkNWUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VjnHCH83ZX6nTuC9uUrD124aaAsfWg_CeQOd23CGDQM=)
---
**Larry Sabato’s ‘Crystal Ball’ has rated MI-10 as a Tossup in 2026, and this district is one of the DCCC’s targeted races for 2026.** When Christina was on the ballot as the Democratic Nominee for County Prosecutor in 2024, she outperformed both the Democratic congressional nominee and Kamala Harris.

**There are eight candidates running for this seat and Christina is the only woman.

Here’s the thing: Christina is highly qualified, but she’s lagging behind her male competitors in fundraising. This is the time that she needs the most help, as institutional support groups are evaluating where to invest.**

[**This is our _most realistic_ prospect for flipping a House seat from red to blue. Help us ensure Christina has what she needs to catch up to her all-male opponents and get her as much attention as possible by rushing a split contribution between Her Bold Move and her campaign today. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-hines/?refcode=EM_F_250710Hines_N_EH_90DO_12_G_N_L1&amount=20.26) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Christina Hines:_ | | [**$20.26 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111299134/556769445/1733627654?refcode=EM_F_250710Hines_N_EH_90DO_12_G_N_EB20.26&express_lane=true&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5OTliNjQ4LTVkNWUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VjnHCH83ZX6nTuC9uUrD124aaAsfWg_CeQOd23CGDQM=)

---
** ** | | [**OTHER »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111299139/556769450/1733627654?refcode=EM_F_250710Hines_N_EH_90DO_12_G_N_EBOther&refcode2=other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5OTliNjQ4LTVkNWUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VjnHCH83ZX6nTuC9uUrD124aaAsfWg_CeQOd23CGDQM=)
---
Christina is running to replace John James. In 2018, John James said he is “100% Pro-Life” and compared abortion to “genocide.” Most recently, **Representative James proudly voted YES on Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill”** which is one of the worst bills to become law in modern history.

Here’s how Christina responded:

_“The Republicans passed their bill. It's a direct hit to the people who work the hardest and carry the heaviest burdens - and it will make life more expensive for almost all of us. As a prosecutor and as an advocate, I believe that public servants are supposed to work FOR the people, not against them.

I’m running for Congress because I want to make sure my neighbors - the working families in our community - have affordable healthcare, housing, groceries, and daycare. We have a lot of work to do, but together, we can continue to fight for a better future.”_

Christina’s story is one of hard work, service, and fighting for others. **This is our _most realistic opportunity_ of the entire 2026 cycle to flip a House seat from red to blue – and we need your help to make that happen. Let’s get Christina the resources she’ll need to triumph. Each and every flipped seat in the U.S. House of Representatives gets us closer to a Democratic majority – and further away from future “Big Ugly Bills” by Trump’s GOP.**

[**We are proud to endorse Christina Hines in this deeply important race. As you know,_early money_ goes the furthest when it comes to campaign funding. Can we count on you to be an early investor in this race? Rush a split donation of $20.26 or more today! →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111299140/556769451/1733627654?refcode=EM_F_250710Hines_N_EH_90DO_12_G_N_L2&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5OTliNjQ4LTVkNWUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VjnHCH83ZX6nTuC9uUrD124aaAsfWg_CeQOd23CGDQM=)

Together,

Erica Henry
Senior Political Advisor
Her Bold Move
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states.

Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies.

**Support this important work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111299141/556769452/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250710Hines_N_EH_90DO_12_G_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5OTliNjQ4LTVkNWUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VjnHCH83ZX6nTuC9uUrD124aaAsfWg_CeQOd23CGDQM=)

name: Local Democracy Project
subject: Demand Action—Tell Congress to Pass the NO BAN Act Now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
The Trump regime has announced a travel ban targeting nationals from 12 countries with sweeping bans and imposing partial restrictions on seven more. These actions target immigrants from Black and Brown countries while welcoming in White South Africans. They are rooted in xenophobia and hatred and will not make our nation safer. Trump’s travel ban will once again cause chaos, rip families apart, and hurt our economy. _At the Local Democracy Project, we believe that diversity is the cornerstone of thriving communities and a vibrant democracy._ **[This is why we need your help in urging Congress to pass the NO BAN Act, a crucial measure that will prevent future discriminatory travel bans. Will you sign on?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-g8G0TnicQQkvMhV-3vB2dYYL-BFJMg7Eti-oGVpZEHoncTi5XnrY2M_e2QqIEui7d7SqeFv65Ktw6jGljA2O7iRizoq4fdghWd4zQ1Vk6TEam1GwlrkuKWNHwVts2u42JSgiDXbrpzSANwyuvLPB4b5NcPevEL1eMN23KlyXotZDuZ9YfffCmispeP3e9-ZVjuISFn4kyYPWHMFDGcLTOVPjOg31MlIoDt3CBEiuMQI-ev3Yf6IHop7TJQ3oyuJvzsLGC1DuQ2TX5ZHaBbqd_8eokkM_gPEX1Ar9wzDDMCG19RFNBFYDsF-GOZyplIBpPE2f7Deg6_UpqzoVoyeyCAgrfKbUIpMNtT5m6AhN5FeuOEhAf40rJoxvUjccHKi3yILH-qf99Qhzbc9SUaGoHfudH_CBYkn78DIoGkoldD9bmyENKXeZTLXOGagt_9ojHY08Ywf9bUiIKMwN59nkZKGNNLjljW7nsg2Y-mQuwQA/4i3/Es66_NT1TeqQyfrsBcYf1Q/h0/h001.i6RLiwzZ9PdDDa8ZiyfhoWzbWdCNM4JfNzrjnlTdWgw)** **** [SIGN ON

According to a study by the conservative Cato Institute, travel bans do not contribute to national security. Furthermore, the American Civil Liberties Union indicates that such bans harm our economy by cutting off valuable contributions from immigrants. **The NO BAN Act, reintroduced by Rep. name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: TN GOP wants to jail local leaders—for how they vote.
body:
When voting your conscience becomes a felony, democracy is in danger.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JZWW17G2XEM4ZGZH4NM3TTXB_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JZWW17G2XEM4ZGZH4NM3TTXB_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter, Right now in Tennessee, local officeholders could face up to six years in prison just for voting on policies that their constituents support. A new state law passed by radical Republicans makes it a felony for any official to support policies arbitrarily deemed to provide “sanctuary” for Tennesseans. That’s unconstitutional. That’s authoritarian. That’s plain un-American. Seven Metro Council members recently filed suit challenging this extreme law. They know this is about more than immigration—it’s about silencing local voices and criminalizing dissent. The Tennessee House Democratic Caucus stands shoulder-to-shoulder with them. We’re working to:
* Repeal this dangerous law in the legislature;
* Protect the First Amendment rights of elected officials; and,
* Ensure that local officials—not extreme state-level politicians—can serve their communities.

But we can’t do this alone. We’ve set a goal to raise $15,000 this month to defend democracy and support local leaders under attack.
Will you chip in right now to fight back against GOP overreach?

Tennessee House Democratic Caucus

Federal agents raided two Glass House marijuana farms in Camarillo and Carpinteria with warrants for illegal employees, **[leading to violent clashes with protesters](https://substack.com/redirect/1cb66c9d-8340-4121-921a-357c00f924d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who were pushed back using tear gas and smoke bombs while military helicopters flew overhead to flush out people hiding.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/497b89d6-1a17-4377-a53c-8ccffccf01bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **An unknown suspect fired a pistol at federal law enforcement officers** during the raid, prompting the FBI to offer a $50,000 reward for information leading to conviction, while four people were hospitalized and three others treated at the scene.
* **Democratic officials strongly condemned the operations** , with Rep. Salud Carbajal calling the presence of 50 ICE agents "deplorable" and saying "individuals dressed like military personnel" shouldn't operate "on our soil," while calling the raid "overkill" and "ridiculous."
* **Governor Gavin Newsom criticized Trump on social media** , posting a video of people running from tear gas and calling Trump "the real scum," while accusing Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller of running tactics that "evoke chaos, fear and terror within our communities."
* **CBP Commissioner Rodney Scott revealed that ten juveniles were found at the marijuana facility** , all illegal aliens with eight being unaccompanied minors, leading to an investigation for child labor violations, while Los Angeles and eight other cities have sued the Trump administration over these immigration enforcement tactics.

# **Trump 's 2025 Economic Revolution Is Here - Are Your Retirement Savings Ready?**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13c53751-9193-460c-8c32-b118e0e33d25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**President Trump 's "One Big Beautiful Bill" strives to deliver the largest tax cuts for working and middle class Americans in our country's history.** His bold plan not only extends the historic 2017 tax cuts but introduces even deeper reforms aimed at empowering American workers and retirees.
If you are retired or near retirement, this could mean more money in your savings and a once-in-a-generation opportunity to help protect lasting wealth--**if you 're prepared**.
**But here 's the catch:**
This new economic agenda may come with both massive opportunity and serious risk for anyone with a traditional retirement account--like a 401(k), IRA, or TSP.
The fatal flaw? These accounts are built on a Wall Street system that assumes stability, free from manipulation and political shocks.
And in today's world, all it could take is one major event--another bank failure, a geopolitical crisis, a market crash--to wipe out decades of your savings like it did in the 2008 Financial Crisis.
**If you have a retirement account and want to help safeguard --not just survive--during Trump's economic revolution, this is your wake-up call.**
We've outlined a wealth protection strategy inside the **[2025 Retirement Protection Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/13c53751-9193-460c-8c32-b118e0e33d25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** -- and it's completely FREE.
**Inside this guide, you'll discover an IRS-approved loophole that allows you to move your retirement savings tax-free and penalty-free into a safe haven asset and hedge your wealth against inflation, market volatility and geopolitical crises.**
**Time is short.** Trump's reforms may be coming fast--and the financial system roller coaster may be a ride that you don't want to take with your retirement savings.

* * *
# Tom Homan blames Democrat rhetoric for violent clash at CA marijuana farm
Border Czar Tom Homan condemned the violence at a California marijuana farm, **[blaming Democrats' "inflammatory rhetoric"](https://substack.com/redirect/ad0183e4-1245-46ec-985f-de95f03cd619?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that compared ICE agents to "Nazis and racists and terrorists" for emboldening protesters to become criminals and for deadly protests.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2c206bc5-bce5-4bd2-90d9-4bc6e6cc63e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"What happened in California is just another example of protesters becoming criminals, and they've been emboldened by even members of Congress who compare ICE to Nazis and racists and terrorists," Homan said on "Fox & Friends" Friday morning.
"I said months ago, it's going to end up with a loss of life -- and we had one the other day in Texas, and it's not over," he said referring to the gunman who opened fire on border patrol agents in McAllen on Monday.
| | POLL
---
Do you agree with Homan, that Democrat inflammatory rhetoric is spurring on these rioters?

* * *
# Trump threatens to hike tariffs on Canada by August 1
President Donald Trump **[threatened to increase tariffs on Canadian products](https://substack.com/redirect/92d83283-4000-4b1c-9a55-d6672971eb6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from 25% to 35% beginning August 1 unless Canada takes steps to curb fentanyl flow across the shared border, while suggesting the rate could be modified "upward or downward" based on their relationship.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/92d83283-4000-4b1c-9a55-d6672971eb6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The president criticized Canada's trade policies in his letter to Prime Minister Mark Carney** , citing "unsustainable trade deficits" and highlighting that Canada charges "up to 400%" tariffs on U.S. dairy products while limiting market access for American farmers.
* **Trump announced plans for broader tariff increases on remaining countries** , telling NBC News he wants to impose 15-20% blanket tariffs on nations including the European Union, saying he'd "like to do it today" and would send notification letters "over the next couple of hours."
* **The escalation includes threats against Brazil** , where Trump warned of 50% tariff increases over the government's treatment of former President Jair Bolsonaro, calling the legal proceedings against him a "witch hunt" and demanding they "leave Bolsonaro alone."

* * *
# Mahmoud Khalil sues Trump for $20 million
Columbia University anti-Israel activist Mahmoud Khalil **[filed a $20 million claim against the Trump administration,](https://substack.com/redirect/08d6795c-3219-4951-9738-c7a0b304a6b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** alleging he was "falsely imprisoned, maliciously prosecuted, and smeared as an antisemite" when the State Department moved to deport him.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f651995d-df91-45fa-bc7f-afc788271426?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Khalil claims he was detained hundreds of miles away while his wife gave birth** , telling the Associated Press he "cannot describe the pain of that night" as he seeks accountability for what he calls abuse of government power.
* **The claim targets multiple federal agencies** including the Department of Homeland Security, ICE, and the State Department, serving as a precursor to a potential lawsuit under the Federal Tort Claims Act while his deportation order remains in legal limbo.
* **DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin called the claim "absurd,"** stating that Khalil participated in and led "hateful behavior and rhetoric" that made Jewish students feel unsafe on Columbia's campus and across the United States.

"What happened in California is just another example of protesters becoming criminals, and they've been emboldened by even members of Congress who compare ICE to Nazis and racists and terrorists!!" | | | Jul 11 | | | | | | | | | | | | Federal agents raided two Glass House marijuana farms in Camarillo and Carpinteria with warrants for illegal employees, who were pushed back using tear gas and smoke bombs while military helicopters flew overhead to flush out people hiding. An unknown suspect fired a pistol at federal law enforcement officers during the raid, prompting the FBI to offer a $50,000 reward for information leading to conviction, while four people were hospitalized and three others treated at the scene. Democratic officials strongly condemned the operations , with Rep. Salud Carbajal calling the presence of 50 ICE agents "deplorable" and saying "individuals dressed like military personnel" shouldn't operate "on our soil," while calling the raid "overkill" and "ridiculous." Governor Gavin Newsom criticized Trump on social media , posting a video of people running from tear gas and calling Trump "the real scum," while accusing Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller of running tactics that "evoke chaos, fear and terror within our communities." CBP Commissioner Rodney Scott revealed that ten juveniles were found at the marijuana facility , all illegal aliens with eight being unaccompanied minors, leading to an investigation for child labor violations, while Los Angeles and eight other cities have sued the Trump administration over these immigration enforcement tactics. Trump 's 2025 Economic Revolution Is Here - Are Your Retirement Savings Ready? | | ---|---|--- President Trump 's "One Big Beautiful Bill" strives to deliver the largest tax cuts for working and middle class Americans in our country's history. His bold plan not only extends the historic 2017 tax cuts but introduces even deeper reforms aimed at empowering American workers and retirees. If you are retired or near retirement, this could mean more money in your savings and a once-in-a-generation opportunity to help protect lasting wealth--if you 're prepared. But here 's the catch: This new economic agenda may come with both massive opportunity and serious risk for anyone with a traditional retirement account--like a 401(k), IRA, or TSP. The fatal flaw? These accounts are built on a Wall Street system that assumes stability, free from manipulation and political shocks. And in today's world, all it could take is one major event--another bank failure, a geopolitical crisis, a market crash--to wipe out decades of your savings like it did in the 2008 Financial Crisis. If you have a retirement account and want to help safeguard --not just survive--during Trump's economic revolution, this is your wake-up call. We've outlined a wealth protection strategy inside the -- and it's completely FREE. Inside this guide, you'll discover an IRS-approved loophole that allows you to move your retirement savings tax-free and penalty-free into a safe haven asset and hedge your wealth against inflation, market volatility and geopolitical crises. Time is short. Trump's reforms may be coming fast--and the financial system roller coaster may be a ride that you don't want to take with your retirement savings. | | ---|---|--- Donald Trump is not affiliated with and does not endorse Goldco Direct LLC. Tom Homan blames Democrat rhetoric for violent clash at CA marijuana farm Border Czar Tom Homan condemned the violence at a California marijuana farm, that compared ICE agents to "Nazis and racists and terrorists" for emboldening protesters to become criminals and for deadly protests. "What happened in California is just another example of protesters becoming criminals, and they've been emboldened by even members of Congress who compare ICE to Nazis and racists and terrorists," Homan said on "Fox & Friends" Friday morning. "I said months ago, it's going to end up with a loss of life -- and we had one the other day in Texas, and it's not over," he said referring to the gunman who opened fire on border patrol agents in McAllen on Monday. | | POLL Do you agree with Homan, that Democrat inflammatory rhetoric is spurring on these rioters? | ? ? ? Trump threatens to hike tariffs on Canada by August 1 President Donald Trump from 25% to 35% beginning August 1 unless Canada takes steps to curb fentanyl flow across the shared border, while suggesting the rate could be modified "upward or downward" based on their relationship. | | ---|---|--- The president criticized Canada's trade policies in his letter to Prime Minister Mark Carney , citing "unsustainable trade deficits" and highlighting that Canada charges "up to 400%" tariffs on U.S. dairy products while limiting market access for American farmers. Trump announced plans for broader tariff increases on remaining countries , telling NBC News he wants to impose 15-20% blanket tariffs on nations including the European Union, saying he'd "like to do it today" and would send notification letters "over the next couple of hours." The escalation includes threats against Brazil , where Trump warned of 50% tariff increases over the government's treatment of former President Jair Bolsonaro, calling the legal proceedings against him a "witch hunt" and demanding they "leave Bolsonaro alone." Mahmoud Khalil sues Trump for $20 million Columbia University anti-Israel activist Mahmoud Khalil alleging he was "falsely imprisoned, maliciously prosecuted, and smeared as an antisemite" when the State Department moved to deport him. Khalil claims he was detained hundreds of miles away while his wife gave birth , telling the Associated Press he "cannot describe the pain of that night" as he seeks accountability for what he calls abuse of government power. The claim targets multiple federal agencies including the Department of Homeland Security, ICE, and the State Department, serving as a precursor to a potential lawsuit under the Federal Tort Claims Act while his deportation order remains in legal limbo. DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin called the claim "absurd," stating that Khalil participated in and led "hateful behavior and rhetoric" that made Jewish students feel unsafe on Columbia's campus and across the United States. * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. clean_body: If every supporter reading this donated to support state Dems, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. | | | | | ---|--- | 🫏 If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading. State Democrats are facing competitive special elections over the next few months. We’re counting on grassroots supporters to help elect Democrats who will block the extreme MAGA agenda. If every supporter reading this donated $7 to support state Dems today, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. 💪 But we know not everyone can pitch in right now, so we’re relying on our most dedicated supporters to make your first donation of the year to the DLCC. Together, we can power state Democrats to victory in elections that are typically underfunded and overlooked. 🗳️ | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | We hope you can step up today. 🙂 Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. My team has to significantly increase our monthly fundraising goal just to keep pace. If I can’t raise $13,094 by midnight tomorrow , I’ll fall permanently behind our new budget goal. With this historic windfall, Democrats have more than enough money to bury me in ads and an army of paid Leftist activists, making it impossible for me to fight back. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

# [Dear Canada: Sorry our President is a Moron](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a6ef939-cba3-4c4d-a22b-8649293f3425/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | _([Sign on](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19531f72-1a2e-4695-9270-443349f9bd0e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to our letter to Canada, and spread the word!)_ Dear Canada: You've been a great neighbor for the last few hundred years, and we look forward to continuing that relationship in the years to come. Unfortunately, [our president is a moron](https://default.salsalabs.org/T829d0c21-50a7-42e4-a8aa-bc530ef64d02/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Who is wreaking havoc by imposing massive tariffs for no rational reason whatsoever—including a huge 35% one on Canada. Hopefully, he'll reverse himself. And hopefully we'll do a better job with the next one. In the meantime, please accept our apologies. [_**Dear Canada: Sorry our president is a moron **_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf5a2d6e-ca33-4853-8fb1-841b29cca16a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| **When you hear “the court system,” what comes to mind?**
Prison. Punishment. Injustice.

But not every courtroom is a weapon.
**Some are shields**._

_We dive into what most people don’t know about PA's court system and how appellate courts have protected our rights,_even when politicians failed us._
__

A win for Wisconsin!

In a 4-3 ruling, the Wisconsin Supreme Court's four liberal justices voted to invalidate the 1849 abortion ban.

This means abortion is legal in Wisconsin, with some restrictions, and is not subject to the near-total ban that some had previously interpreted from the older law.

| | The U.S. Department of Justice [sent a letter](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YqekfGyadfyRGkoW9vaClkGmufMHgJlF6rnwDn17scFKDW8WwVx22HsCjojD4Cl-2BCPcCs-2F5HCryfAlWOqGRkqkd5qRfmEZqF5rFnsnh8NYOrKat61bLN5sZW8J2jfaSCfEvd5dlFMOzgZME8hzN2IFkN1N7AyCDLHERLDNs6N8TGa7-2BKCMf3S5uY416aVBQrobMZyrL8BwZKkPWRFSdZUulP1NjT6WA4z5qWpb3i3La0xnDu34LZAQyW3IE6Awm2aPLVIWFxEfjeyc38kyTrl7dluAC-2FaFr99xaL7b-2FOrMDEEiiDhN-2Bf639tWNvcoIKiuf-2BflpSfAXVXHZMWOc3WeZFAxsMtvclWEkZNiavuvnekc5IZX2yPVeIMY3j1KlPE4x3ti5ftKDIbYktG-2BJKijjBR7Pjpu1r558a4ovEt-2FwzYzl67_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYXlVC4r440eFgHrYegzFDIFIDABtgUoje4PZp6JL1w1p6f8l2Z0rHyx4ApVFAsPkJvenXFQcufvkElq2sgJvuO4yDeVtUnIcHTy8NYLqL32bzrQ0UdvXvgTlzTpDDB23-2Brd6nBXEwpnuZEVk-2Fm6FHqPM3vSL-2B1jZqbZjmIkrcvyNfzEidSWpYz0JBA8HO10Uh) to the Pennsylvania Department of State. The DOJ is asking the state for a wide range of information related to the state’s compliance with the 2002 Help America Vote Act. On its face, it’s not as aggressive as other letters the DOJ has sent out in recent weeks, some of which have mentioned specific allegations of non-compliance with election law and threatened lawsuits. The letter is the latest in a series of requests the Civil Rights Division has sent to states involving their compliance with federal voting statutes. Read [here](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YqekfGyadfyRGkoW9vaClkGmufMHgJlF6rnwDn17scFKDW8WwVx22HsCjojD4Cl-2BCPcCs-2F5HCryfAlWOqGRkqkd5qRfmEZqF5rFnsnh8NYOrKat61bLN5sZW8J2jfaSCfEvd5dlFMOzgZME8hzN2IFkN1N7AyCDLHERLDNs6N8TGa7-2BKCMf3S5uY416aVBQrobMZyrL8BwZKkPWRFSdZUulP1NjT6WA4z5qWpb3i3La0xnDu34LZAQyW3IE6Awm2aPLVIWFxEfjeyc38kyTrl7dluAC-2FaFr99xaL7b-2FOrMDEEiiDhN-2Bf639tWNvcoIKiuf-2BflpSfAXVXHZMWOc3WeZFAxsMtvclWEkZNiavuvnekc5IZX2yPVeIMY3j1KlPE4x3ti5ftKDIbYktG-2BJKijjBR7Pjpu1r558a4ovEt-2FwzYPMSO_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYXlVC4r440eFgHrYegzFDIFIDABtgUoje4PZp6JL1w1qUsD8tTOSgFIlT2z3h9Trt5Yt7EB5bLpYvDZrgJ7dVj6ykqPYt5HZrA0EDlIapO050oPMHB4R9u1qnHv9nc2V34HVbx1OWuIxtzOvi6E4BlhJJfMYcMujY9k-2BFMBV7jdoC4FochlAqHFBEdZWQqVlM) to find out more!

Congressional Republicans’ radical budget and tax bill includes several less-known provisions that will increase costs, fuel the Trump administration’s overreach, and waste taxpayer dollars. [**As Trump’s One Big Beautiful Bill** ](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Ytv4wklg2Nn-2FI0Nk0-2BS-2F8u3UBBXh23sBGXxJ-2F11OSZxS-2FAYWilkJeELRvA8PbZY5eYyfotAGWmRNQ6wHDTTm3rHkCuTMaTsDtDppQ9PBp9VMqMlrjy16ldvGDHrNCV1t3Fb5q2TgWNHYfdyNWeX6RzJcOAUg7iQzKkq63jz-2F5gN1BNOygOa96ln7xN417zU0TjSC3INtREju-2FOxHtX5e9qDaQ6kG4kZIdFnf6UYQUQ9nkeBIVRgGIaBEz5znI3omyrbKaLAGX4Dzn3mCAKYq7RQ-3DfN5k_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYXlVC4r440eFgHrYegzFDIFIDABtgUoje4PZp6JL1w1qK1Zv51viv1WtmsSa-2Ftw6YUghoaeqFS62TowjSUFq6KX0CcRLW-2FF9YUYvIAtHj-2FEdP2NrD3sdyKIt9ujTwjL9gV5-2BSXwXZ1kfXlMO3-2B7LvcABbhvNgPCXTNnmNmJKFJGSMBluVc4QtQfpto-2BVG1Sp9)has just become law, Republicans have concluded their major legislative business for this Congress. From here, the attention of elected officials — and the country — will turn more and more to the midterm elections. Among those who may be considering how their vote on this bill may impact their midterm election is **[U.S. Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yq0pNYTv7GaW9VUI9cRGr15dQVel4kBNg2q947-2Fs-2FLBHagusnZlwY1XGk4oHtV1RHzfca-2BRXwXxHyhup7zE5ZGGcVpqGa08grEMf53UI-2FZsnHLjN78D-2FqYSDMv8b-2B6qMQtW8loZBHf8OgMPrfBYztM40s7OLi-2BvIz0NfFf3I-2F4SAWgKnEfJ2d5H-2Bh5d2pw5HJ0Ftio6wJVaErd-2BWdLePZvSa2KfxAclevh-2B1qs7y9evJLrnl6dsAp5HV1afHZXcR4bQD6Of-2FjF2hJy-2B2uYIqgI0XH3UI3Rc3T80s3zxGdow0WLo7ZN9l9sy0o5aPTYAB-2Fz69RZHq0-2By6cCSJR-2BZWC3HgTBE7zK-2Fl1-2BrCEsJ0bTawmXXMKvJRVDwOBHnlZP3VaFVSGD-2FjSYbYFEy0sOo8laRf1eHlBlVWhXNi57TRrah8hMC9JOdjxwjZacQ-2F0ZIGYBOdQ9A3ICxPYfUN6EK0VdXgq8GppBg99gx8JPSSzwOEZgO70zdIgX1RLOddVHHpjqnED4sgflJRMjF6DZqiJPNWTbh36nzNh0js0g47ghDM1N5CaYfXocxyy9SvLjCuHA-3D-3Dj2Ua_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYXlVC4r440eFgHrYegzFDIFIDABtgUoje4PZp6JL1w1od-2B-2FB4fHlYFwa92rX0mDUfFrkvoFJPvoyQVGmZJwDqTlRHyQDgeFL-2FpacJnbXW8ua-2FH-2BEWTXvdcZCwtKakBl0eUhvXTSdPPbAUbZBFCAZp-2FXCWn4aIUDxH5MBpWvQKgHWLt3e8Ek5bUfjSc8allhTp), who voted against the BBB. **Fitzpatrick’s does not have a 'safe' seat. clean_body: | | | | | Hi Friend , Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter! Our weekly newsletter has all the news you can use and more! | | | In Case You Missed It: Episode 7 of Slingshot The Podcast Has Dropped | | "The Courts Aren’t All Bad: #CourtsMatter" | When you hear “the court system,” what comes to mind? Prison. Punishment. Injustice. But not every courtroom is a weapon. Some are shields. We dive into what most people don’t know about PA's court system and how appellate courts have protected our rights,even when politicians failed us. | | Don't Miss Out: Episode 8 of Slingshot The Podcast drops next Thursday at 12PM ET Watch it on YouTube, or listen wherever you get your podcasts (Apple, Spotify, etc.) | Wednesday, JULY 16 at 7:00 pm | Virtual Event | In celebration of the legacy of John Lewis, Kadida Kenner, founding CEO of the New Pennsylvania Project, will cover the history of voter suppression in the United States and what we can do to combat it. Join the celebration and join to learn about the history of voter suppression and exploring ways to take action - including registering voters for our Supreme Court Retention races. Sat, July 19 11am-4pm | 2018 S Braddock Ave, Pittsburgh, PA 15218 | Featuring founding CEO Kadida Kenner as keynote speaker! Wed, July 23, 2025, 3:00pm | Virtual Event via StreamYard + YouTube | A virtual discussion featuring Eric Holder, 82nd Attorney General of the U.S; Sophia Lin Lakin Director of the ACLU’s Voting Rights Project; Kadida Kenner, founding CEO of NPP. The discussion will be moderated by AFJ Action President Rachel Rossi. | | | | | #CourtsMatter | | From A win for Wisconsin! In a 4-3 ruling, the Wisconsin Supreme Court's four liberal justices voted to invalidate the 1849 abortion ban. This means abortion is legal in Wisconsin, with some restrictions, and is not subject to the near-total ban that some had previously interpreted from the older law. | | | | | The U.S. Department of Justice to the Pennsylvania Department of State. The DOJ is asking the state for a wide range of information related to the state’s compliance with the 2002 Help America Vote Act. On its face, it’s not as aggressive as other letters the DOJ has sent out in recent weeks, some of which have mentioned specific allegations of non-compliance with election law and threatened lawsuits. The letter is the latest in a series of requests the Civil Rights Division has sent to states involving their compliance with federal voting statutes. Read to find out more! | | | | | | NPP held a Why Courts Matter lunch & learn for Climate Action PA organizers in Philadelphia on Thursday, July 10! The PA Supreme Court has addressed important environmental issues in the past, emphasizing the Commonwealth's duty to protect natural resources. #CourtsMatter | | | | | Everything we do, from hosting town halls and producing podcasts to knocking on doors, we continue to expand Pennsylvania's electorate. By engaging Pennsylvanians to be civically involved and encouraging them to turn out to vote twice a year, none of it would be possible without you. | Congressional Republicans’ radical budget and tax bill includes several less-known provisions that will increase costs, fuel the Trump administration’s overreach, and waste taxpayer dollars. just become law, Republicans have concluded their major legislative business for this Congress. From here, the attention of elected officials — and the country — will turn more and more to the midterm elections. Among those who may be considering how their vote on this bill may impact their midterm election is , who voted against the BBB. Fitzpatrick’s does not have a 'safe' seat. He’s one of just three Republican members in the 119th Congress who serves a district former Vice President Kamala Harris won in 2024. covering everything from derelict boats to AI deepfakes, firefighter certification tests, and naloxone distribution by EMTs. name: Ryan Crosswell
subject: What I told Jen Psaki

body:
I’ve stood up to Trump before, and I’d do it a thousand times more.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91231?refcode=em20250711-9104&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9104%2E614464%2E3eK96g)
Peter, did you see my interview with Jen Psaki? ⬆️
Jen Psaki had me on her show to talk about Emil Bove, the DOJ leader who asked me to drop the corruption charges against Eric Adams on Donald Trump’s behalf.
Recently, Bove had to answer to the claims I made in my resignation letter from the DOJ in front of the U.S. Senate.
And I have no doubt that he was sweating bullets. Because I know the truth: the Trump administration asked me to ignore the law — and I said no.
Any denial of that claim is a lie.
I’m running for Congress because Democrats are in desperate need of leaders who will stand up to Donald Trump, not bend the knee like my MAGA opponent has done time after time.
I’ve stood up to Trump before, and I’d do it a thousand times more.
**[If you’re with me, please split $10 between Heartland Patriots and my campaign today. We’ve set some ambitious fundraising goals to start this campaign on the right foot, and I need your help to stay on track.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91231?refcode=em20250711-9104&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9104%2E614464%2E3eK96g)**

name: Andy Roth
subject: Democrats Afraid to Vote on "Save Women's Sports"
body:
| | | [](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqYx7X5ohQ4dCOx5p85so2pLCkqk_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerhr-2BTryAbiccxHjgo2PS2UE2z0PktggoTDsYZCVv-2FN3xIyzQhshuyX8yFM1ahWXEWg60EoLY6yXzFQyp8liv6sDkWQ-2FRNXB2F5tcHzMIrWmrD2qkO29wBBQQr2ZXNeucybBeHJzeyF02qWr7Qu4KB-2FIFUnD30wd8igEZS3fio5S78teLRvqSDkeA2s8z3YiAvEu2-2BFE7XI7ewgjQTXO7vMmK-2FssDfwmDUXz-2FQWCuXXqo-3D)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, We've mentioned it before, but it's worth repeating a thousand times. State lawmakers are PART-TIME but our state freedom caucuses are FULL-TIME. That means when their legislative sessions are over, they are still working for you - the taxpayer - regardless of what the issue is. Here's the latest news...
---
|
---
**MISSOURI** The **Missouri Freedom Caucus** has been a loud advocate for ending the state income tax. So MOFC Chairman, State Senator Nick Schorer, decided to have a little fun this week trolling Republican Governor Mike Kehoe on the subject.Kehoe frequently repeats that he “wants” to eliminate the income tax, but so far the governor has failed to put his full weight behind it.

In fairness to Kehoe, he did sign a bill this week that will end state capital gains taxes, which all MO Freedom Caucus members supported. All states that have an income tax also tax capital gains, so Missouri is now the first state to do away with the practice.With that successfully out of the way, it's time to get rid of the income tax!
---
[](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjnRHr3Z8ylkpj8cmf1og51YNBIoPyqAatm2uQPwUNHK4EPncfJD4fyifpwbRd-2FyYMQ-3D-3DPaMy_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerhr-2BTryAbiccxHjgo2PS2UE2z0PktggoTDsYZCVv-2FN3xIyzQhshuyX8yFM1ahWXEWg60EoLY6yXzFQyp8liv6sBHmQA5Q8d-2FbWSpMVpMyLzf75ll6kG9mCB9dLBiHwTh6pPVSqz1VimyOT1Q2XwhXe0VLWRsymjf2N4-2FVSpFW-2BMk-2BbLbMQyYFH3pT0hJElJqrBsv8TYV37o-2BybYkI6-2F-2B-2BWoRRJkTrlFZvjHoMC76EN6Y-3D)
---
|
---
**WYOMING** The legislative session ended way back on March 6, but the **Wyoming Freedom Caucus** isn't waiting another 6 months for the January 2026 session to resume fighting for taxpayers. The Audit Committee is something that, in the past, was considered a joke because nobody ever did anything with it. But the Committee's power to root out waste and fraud is now being utilized by the Wyoming Freedom Caucus.Earlier this week, they led the fight to subpoena two counties and one special district because slow progress on audits suggests serious financial mismanagement. Excerpt from a recent news article:

“I’m deeply disturbed by some of these audits we have been provided,” said Rodriguez-Williams. “It’s absolutely, I’ll say it again, mind-boggling when you have a state-funded town, or entity such as the recreation district that receives state funds, giving the Department of Audit and the legislative body, essentially the middle finger.” The Swamp is on its heels. They can't defend the financial mismanagement (or possible fraud), so instead they are upset with the WY Freedom Caucus because...well, they should have "invited" the town leaders to address these concerns, and not use the power of the subpoena.But this is a serious problem and it requires a serious answer. Stay tuned as this story develops...
---
[](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjmUEc0KtFmxyqQAYhSepmdTTOy9530O9YaR6OCrFJS9AQpY5x0uX5f4-2BvDbepnoK-2BfR85-2FsKOXH6WCb1aJlNlb-2BuZTWFeh-2B4jB1-2BBJUBc2d9UyaVIBm8uqpjUGRHvpQzKlhxVaZfa5mOkLT47ydsxJk-3DWa95_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerhr-2BTryAbiccxHjgo2PS2UE2z0PktggoTDsYZCVv-2FN3xIyzQhshuyX8yFM1ahWXEWg60EoLY6yXzFQyp8liv6sKZuHMwTvDw6gzP0Bi2kmGtDWW-2BW-2B5C9YaqIMKWDtOGv0G-2F-2FjdgmiIdln-2BmF31L2zosCdKDFWzJqdSNVcyiWt6S6uijv4Fy1XOp-2F8MngUvEd28uHUgArP-2FTpPe2tR5M40Ga4IXF1TEm3JfVJMSNb0Zc-3D)
---
|
---
**PENNSYLVANIA** It's been a busy couple of weeks for State Rep. Barb Gleim and the **Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus**. Because of Gleim's hard work on advocating for protecting girls' sports, she was invited to the White House last week. Department of Education Secretary Linda McMahon used the opportunity to announce that the University of Pennsylvania had agreed to settle a federal lawsuit. Going forward, UPenn will follow President Trump's executive order to keep biological men out of female sports and they will issue a formal apology to all of the female athletes, including Riley Gaines, who were impacted by it. ** ** If that wasn't enough good news, the PA Freedom Caucus pushed the fight in the state legislature where Democrats control the State House by a slim 102-101 margin.Earlier this week, the PA Freedom Caucus "discharged" the "Save Women's Sports Act" (SB 9) onto the House floor - effectively forcing the Democrats to consider the bill. The Democrats - who are scared to death to vote on this common sense issue - used a procedural gimmick to refer the bill back to another committee. Effectively trying to stall the issue. But the PA Freedom Caucus isn't letting up and will continue to force it onto the floor for an up-or-down vote.Key excerpt from the PA Freedom Caucus:

_It is with profound disgust that we address the recent decision by House Democrats to re-refer Senate Bill 9 to a different committee. This action represents not only a bureaucratic maneuver which stifled debate and silenced millions of Pennsylvanians, but also a significant setback in the pursuit of equality for countless girls across Pennsylvania. By avoiding the vote, House Democrats have delayed progress, promoted discrimination, and made it very clear that they intend to usurp Federal Title IX law in their pursuit of a woke agenda that 80% of Americans wholeheartedly reject._
---
---
_LEFT TO RIGHT: At the White House, Paula Scanlan, State Rep. Barb Gleim, Riley Gaines_
---
|
---
**HELP US GROW** While many are heading to the beach or enjoying the summer sun, we’re staying focused—because the issues that matter don’t take a vacation. This summer is critical for laying the groundwork for our expansion into new states and keeping our current states strong.

But we can’t do it without you.

Grassroots donors like you keep us going strong. Every dollar counts—especially now.

Can we count on your support today?

Together, we’ll turn up the heat—and the momentum.
---

We'll be back with another update next week. Until then, please be sure to [support](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqZvunjMwr5zCo-2BtB7-2FL9OgeaiSIE8G2eKTQGQD-2FQjO19vwXe1zEfU-2FcgC4yHcW3BrU-3D2XZQ_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerhr-2BTryAbiccxHjgo2PS2UE2z0PktggoTDsYZCVv-2FN3xIyzQhshuyX8yFM1ahWXEWg60EoLY6yXzFQyp8liv6sPRuuF0k2KTjHXiik99M1L1iRZtjdUY3B9KztVPNEiRxC2QFSyR63-2FY7qJy1v-2Bbg8G1XcxmlzgT7RqzWTPgu35ZscX6mIhgR5ZhgWvBKyPPkYM4nilo-2FUcouMIs-2BqhaKCQ3k9H1piUBIu-2Fb8zAX8kIE-3D) our efforts so that we can support our State Freedom Caucuses!In Liberty,

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, We've mentioned it before, but it's worth repeating a thousand times. State lawmakers are PART-TIME but our state freedom caucuses are FULL-TIME. That means when their legislative sessions are over, they are still working for you - the taxpayer - regardless of what the issue is. Here's the latest news... | MISSOURI The Missouri Freedom Caucus has been a loud advocate for ending the state income tax. So MOFC Chairman, State Senator Nick Schorer, decided to have a little fun this week trolling Republican Governor Mike Kehoe on the subject.Kehoe frequently repeats that he “wants” to eliminate the income tax, but so far the governor has failed to put his full weight behind it. In fairness to Kehoe, he did sign a bill this week that will end state capital gains taxes, which all MO Freedom Caucus members supported. All states that have an income tax also tax capital gains, so Missouri is now the first state to do away with the practice.With that successfully out of the way, it's time to get rid of the income tax! | WYOMING The legislative session ended way back on March 6, but the Wyoming Freedom Caucus isn't waiting another 6 months for the January 2026 session to resume fighting for taxpayers. The Audit Committee is something that, in the past, was considered a joke because nobody ever did anything with it. But the Committee's power to root out waste and fraud is now being utilized by the Wyoming Freedom Caucus.Earlier this week, they led the fight to subpoena two counties and one special district because slow progress on audits suggests serious financial mismanagement. Excerpt from a recent news article: “I’m deeply disturbed by some of these audits we have been provided,” said Rodriguez-Williams. “It’s absolutely, I’ll say it again, mind-boggling when you have a state-funded town, or entity such as the recreation district that receives state funds, giving the Department of Audit and the legislative body, essentially the middle finger.” The Swamp is on its heels. They can't defend the financial mismanagement (or possible fraud), so instead they are upset with the WY Freedom Caucus because...well, they should have "invited" the town leaders to address these concerns, and not use the power of the subpoena.But this is a serious problem and it requires a serious answer. Stay tuned as this story develops... | PENNSYLVANIA It's been a busy couple of weeks for State Rep. Barb Gleim and the Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus. Because of Gleim's hard work on advocating for protecting girls' sports, she was invited to the White House last week. Department of Education Secretary Linda McMahon used the opportunity to announce that the University of Pennsylvania had agreed to settle a federal lawsuit. Going forward, UPenn will follow President Trump's executive order to keep biological men out of female sports and they will issue a formal apology to all of the female athletes, including Riley Gaines, who were impacted by it. If that wasn't enough good news, the PA Freedom Caucus pushed the fight in the state legislature where Democrats control the State House by a slim 102-101 margin.Earlier this week, the PA Freedom Caucus "discharged" the "Save Women's Sports Act" (SB 9) onto the House floor - effectively forcing the Democrats to consider the bill. The Democrats - who are scared to death to vote on this common sense issue - used a procedural gimmick to refer the bill back to another committee. Effectively trying to stall the issue. But the PA Freedom Caucus isn't letting up and will continue to force it onto the floor for an up-or-down vote.Key excerpt from the PA Freedom Caucus: It is with profound disgust that we address the recent decision by House Democrats to re-refer Senate Bill 9 to a different committee. This action represents not only a bureaucratic maneuver which stifled debate and silenced millions of Pennsylvanians, but also a significant setback in the pursuit of equality for countless girls across Pennsylvania. By avoiding the vote, House Democrats have delayed progress, promoted discrimination, and made it very clear that they intend to usurp Federal Title IX law in their pursuit of a woke agenda that 80% of Americans wholeheartedly reject. LEFT TO RIGHT: At the White House, Paula Scanlan, State Rep. Barb Gleim, Riley Gaines | HELP US GROW While many are heading to the beach or enjoying the summer sun, we’re staying focused—because the issues that matter don’t take a vacation. This summer is critical for laying the groundwork for our expansion into new states and keeping our current states strong. But we can’t do it without you. Grassroots donors like you keep us going strong. Every dollar counts—especially now. Can we count on your support today? Together, we’ll turn up the heat—and the momentum. We'll be back with another update next week. Until then, please be sure to our efforts so that we can support our State Freedom Caucuses!In Liberty, Andy RothPresident State Freedom Caucus Network |

name: With Honor Action
subject: Building (Civic) Bridges 🌉 and Fixing Railroads 🚂
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f4a5e4708fed/bats-brews-and-a-birthday-salute-to-the-us-army-14053355?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Friends,

With Honor Action is proud to celebrate the reintroduction of the [Building Civic Bridges Act](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=d483fee4c4&e=33f53a5b1a) (BCBA)—a bipartisan effort that exemplifies the leadership and cross-partisan collaboration our country urgently needs.

This legislation, led by founding For Country Caucus Vice Chair Rep. Chrissy Houlahan (D-PA) and Rep. Andy Barr (R-KY), empowers local communities to tackle toxic polarization head-on. By supporting on-the-ground bridgebuilding initiatives, the BCBA will help reduce division, restore trust, and strengthen the civic fabric of our democracy.

With Honor Action has long advocated for principled leadership that puts country over party. The Building Civic Bridges Act reflects that spirit and recognizes that Americans may disagree on issues, but still share a deep desire to solve problems together and build a better future.

🔗 You can read the bill text [here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=c57ab34c5e&e=33f53a5b1a).
---
|
---
| **For Country Caucus Vice Chair Deluzio: "We all know what it is to put our country first."**
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=bd25b26b0c&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| Earlier this year, on the second anniversary of the devastating Norfolk Southern derailment, For Country Caucus Vice Chairs Reps. Chris Deluzio and Nick LaLota introduced a renewed [Railway Safety Act](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=7d1075c1f6&e=33f53a5b1a) aimed at protecting communities like East Palestine, Ohio, and western Pennsylvania from future rail disasters.

Their shared military background and commitment to the "mission" drive their work to ensure public safety, strengthen infrastructure, and hold rail operators accountable. With growing bipartisan support—including from the White House and across both chambers—this legislation is a shining example of how service-driven leadership can make a difference.

🔗 You can watch the full interview [here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=428745e94a&e=33f53a5b1a).
---
|
---
| **Building Bridges: With Honor Welcomes the Joint Service Academy Graduate Community**
---
|
---
---
| On Tuesday evening, With Honor was pleased to host this month's Joint Service Academy Business Mixer (JSABMDC) at our headquarters in Washington, D.C. The JSABMDC brings together Service Academy graduates from various generations, including some who are currently serving and others who served decades ago. What all these individuals share is a commitment to service and a dedication to putting the mission before themselves. Events like this are more than just networking opportunities; they allow us to build and maintain community while discussing practical solutions to today’s challenges. With Honor is proud to support veterans who choose to continue serving their country, whether in government, business, or non-profit organizations.

Especially in these divided times, we remain committed to finding areas of consensus on Capitol Hill, and beyond. Thank you for standing with us.
---
|
---
| | | | Please follow With Honor Action on Twitter via this [link](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=c4348c28ab&e=33f53a5b1a),
and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.
---

name: Jared Hudson
subject: Former SEAL Sniper Jared Hudson Releases TV Ad Recounting God’s Grace Saving Trump in Butler, PA Ahead of One-Year Anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hudson for Alabama
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/hudsonforalabama/former-navy-seal-jared-hudson-raises-over-250k-in-just-34-days-8403722?e=1ade0133c0)
---
[|
---](https://hudsonforalabama.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6af96dbbcda9e47551bbd367a&id=7b31b2bc47&e=1ade0133c0)
| | | | | | | | | | | **Former SEAL Sniper Jared Hudson Releases TV Ad Recounting God’s Grace Saving Trump in Butler, PA Ahead of One-Year Anniversary**
Today, former Navy SEAL Sniper Jared Hudson released his first ad titled “Grace” recounting how God saved President Trump in Butler, PA exactly one year ago to the day this Sunday. The spot will air on television marking the first ad buy from any candidate in the race to be Alabama’s next United States Senator.
_“As a Navy SEAL Sniper, I made shots from 1,000 yards away in combat zones, so I know there is only one possible way President Trump walked away from that bullet in Butler, PA fired on a clear day from less than 400 feet away – that is by the grace of God. God was not finished with Donald J. Trump and He is not finished with the United States of America,”_**Hudson said.**
_“President Trump took a bullet for this country. Meanwhile weak politicians won’t even take a tough vote. It is time for a new generation of conservatives who will fight just as hard as President Trump does to Make America Great Again,”_**Hudson added.** “ _I will be that warrior. I have done it before on the battlefield overseas, and I am ready to do it again as Alabama’s next United States Senator.”_
Watch Hudson’s video “Grace” [HERE](https://hudsonforalabama.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6af96dbbcda9e47551bbd367a&id=6158dbf528&e=1ade0133c0).

Hey Peter, Today, we’re proud to share our 2025-2026 electoral priority states. Winning in these states in the coming electoral cycle is a critical step in our fight for fair maps. The NDRC is focused on making our democracy one where voters pick their politicians, not the other way around. We’re building on our past electoral successes and advancing the fair maps movement as a whole. Over the next two years, we’re investing in critical elections that will shape the future of fair maps across at least 13 states. By electing pro-democracy champions at the state level in 2025 and 2026, we can prevent mid-decade gerrymandering and build a foundation for fair and independent redistricting following the release of the 2030 Census data. Our primary goals include:
1. **Electing Democratic candidates** for governor, state legislature, and state constitutional offices who will fight for fair maps
2. **Combating partisan efforts** to reduce the independence of state supreme courts by supporting fair-minded state supreme court justices

And here’s this round of priority states for 2025-2026:
* Arizona
* Colorado
* Florida
* Georgia
* Michigan
* Minnesota
* New Hampshire
* North Carolina
* Ohio
* Pennsylvania
* Texas
* Virginia
* Wisconsin

The NDRC is the first-ever strategic hub for comprehensive redistricting strategy, and our long-term strategic planning is guided by our team’s unique expertise and experience, data-driven mapping and political analysis, redistricting history and legal precedents, and population trends reflected in rolling census projections. **These priority states have extremely high stakes, and we want to make the greatest impact for protecting the fair maps we’ve already achieved and preparing for the redistricting battles yet to come. ** **[Fighting gerrymandering and nefarious Republicans requires consistent investment and work over the short and long term. Our priority states have significant implications, and the 2025 Election is getting closer every day. Will you donate to the NDRC today and fuel our efforts to create a democracy that’s representative and inclusive of all Americans?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111305935/556787950/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_JulyPriorityStates_email_202050711-NDRC-Tier1-JulyPriorityStates_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050711-NDRC-Tier1-JulyPriorityStates_&utm_campaign=JulyPriorityStates&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiMDM5OGNlLTY2NWUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j96ho66MDfy7OWj9aH-X_jVfiEN74xkJCYf-9dUlT20=)** [Donate](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111305936/556787951/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_JulyPriorityStates_email_202050711-NDRC-Tier1-JulyPriorityStates_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050711-NDRC-Tier1-JulyPriorityStates_&utm_campaign=JulyPriorityStates&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiMDM5OGNlLTY2NWUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j96ho66MDfy7OWj9aH-X_jVfiEN74xkJCYf-9dUlT20=) By now, you know as well as we do that there is no longer an “off season” when it comes to redistricting. That’s why our 2025-2026 priority states are critical — to take on the fights underway and prepare for what is ahead. As you read this email, anti-democracy forces are challenging fair maps in court, undermining redistricting reforms, laying the groundwork to keep Election Deniers in office (or elect new ones) who will overturn fair maps, and threatening to draw gerrymandered maps ahead of the 2025 and 2026 elections. We’re zeroing in on states like Virginia and Pennsylvania this year because of critical state supreme court and legislative races — races that will directly shape the future of fair maps. In Ohio, a mid-decade redraw is already underway due to the state’s historical trend of packing Democratic voters into smaller districts. In Texas, Gov. Abbott has called for a mid-decade redraw after the Trump administration pressured lawmakers to engage in a “ruthless” gerrymander. Gerrymandering is a critical tool for those trying to erode our democracy, and they are not waiting for the next redistricting cycle. Republicans are drawing from their most extreme ideologies to build artificial power and advance a far-right agenda that serves them, rather than the American people. Peter, every dollar, no matter how big or small, makes all the difference in the fight for fair maps and the work being done at the NDRC. We are strategic and intentional in our efforts, and your contributions have helped to build maps that get us closer to a truly representative democracy. **Whether it was a $30 donation that fueled our mobilization efforts in Texas when the Trump administration encouraged a “ruthless” mid-decade gerrymander, or a $300 donation that powered rapid response efforts in North Carolina when the opponent refused to concede, this team’s support has been a backbone to the NDRC’s work.** **[Every donation helps fight back against anti-democracy actors, uphold fair representation, and build out long-term plans in states across the country. Most importantly, it helps to ensure that every voice, especially those from historically marginalized communities, is heard and counted fairly. clean_body: We’re sharing our next round of top electoral priorities with you: | Hey Peter, Today, we’re proud to share our 2025-2026 electoral priority states. Winning in these states in the coming electoral cycle is a critical step in our fight for fair maps. The NDRC is focused on making our democracy one where voters pick their politicians, not the other way around. We’re building on our past electoral successes and advancing the fair maps movement as a whole. Over the next two years, we’re investing in critical elections that will shape the future of fair maps across at least 13 states. By electing pro-democracy champions at the state level in 2025 and 2026, we can prevent mid-decade gerrymandering and build a foundation for fair and independent redistricting following the release of the 2030 Census data. Our primary goals include: 1. Electing Democratic candidates for governor, state legislature, and state constitutional offices who will fight for fair maps 2. Combating partisan efforts to reduce the independence of state supreme courts by supporting fair-minded state supreme court justices And here’s this round of priority states for 2025-2026: Arizona Colorado Florida Georgia Michigan Minnesota New Hampshire North Carolina Ohio Pennsylvania Texas Virginia Wisconsin The NDRC is the first-ever strategic hub for comprehensive redistricting strategy, and our long-term strategic planning is guided by our team’s unique expertise and experience, data-driven mapping and political analysis, redistricting history and legal precedents, and population trends reflected in rolling census projections. These priority states have extremely high stakes, and we want to make the greatest impact for protecting the fair maps we’ve already achieved and preparing for the redistricting battles yet to come. = = By now, you know as well as we do that there is no longer an “off season” when it comes to redistricting. That’s why our 2025-2026 priority states are critical — to take on the fights underway and prepare for what is ahead. As you read this email, anti-democracy forces are challenging fair maps in court, undermining redistricting reforms, laying the groundwork to keep Election Deniers in office (or elect new ones) who will overturn fair maps, and threatening to draw gerrymandered maps ahead of the 2025 and 2026 elections. We’re zeroing in on states like Virginia and Pennsylvania this year because of critical state supreme court and legislative races — races that will directly shape the future of fair maps. In Ohio, a mid-decade redraw is already underway due to the state’s historical trend of packing Democratic voters into smaller districts. In Texas, Gov. Abbott has called for a mid-decade redraw after the Trump administration pressured lawmakers to engage in a “ruthless” gerrymander. Gerrymandering is a critical tool for those trying to erode our democracy, and they are not waiting for the next redistricting cycle. Republicans are drawing from their most extreme ideologies to build artificial power and advance a far-right agenda that serves them, rather than the American people. Peter, every dollar, no matter how big or small, makes all the difference in the fight for fair maps and the work being done at the NDRC. We are strategic and intentional in our efforts, and your contributions have helped to build maps that get us closer to a truly representative democracy. Whether it was a $30 donation that fueled our mobilization efforts in Texas when the Trump administration encouraged a “ruthless” mid-decade gerrymander, or a $300 donation that powered rapid response efforts in North Carolina when the opponent refused to concede, this team’s support has been a backbone to the NDRC’s work. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks! Claire Low Director of Political and Campaigns NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Georgia Voter Action Project
subject: Another way for them to ignore voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We know this all just amounts to another way that opponents of voting rights can try and ignore voters and subvert the will of the people. We have to get this loophole in Georgia eliminated before the vote suppressors use it in other states.
RUSH $25 or more today to fight back against any loophole that reduces our voice in our elections and harms our fundamental right to vote >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=pKq4m0w0ZICo/O+sBHmNp197N1UBcAPz+xxUibK4G+PKaBqmaJS2EPURGf7PmdllZ8jV+/EbzTIib9QYwYmqdjIJF2120IchtSZtgFGnQK4=]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=pKq4m0w0ZICo/O+sBHmNp197N1UBcAPz+xxUibK4G+PKaBqmaJS2EPURGf7PmdllZ8jV+/EbzTIib9QYwYmqdjIJF2120IchtSZtgFGnQK4=]
Bolts: After a Judge’s Death, Renewed Scrutiny for a Georgia Loophole That Can Nullify Elections [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=pKq4m0w0ZICo/O+sBHmNp197N1UBcAPz+xxUibK4G+PKaBqmaJS2EPURGf7PmdllZ8jV+/EbzTIib9QYwYmqdjIJF2120IchtSZtgFGnQK4=]
A quick story, Team: After losing an election race last year, a Georgia State Court Judge turned to a loophole in state law that could have erased the result and blocked the winner from taking office.
We're not making this up. In Georgia, if judges announce they’ll quit at some point before the end of their term, they hand the governor the ability to choose their replacement for the next two years. Even if an election was about to be held for their seat, that race gets canceled and kicked years down the road. Even if an election for their seat has already happened , a judge could still resign after they’ve lost, giving the governor the power to make an appointment that would nullify the result.
Looking to trigger this rule after losing his nonpartisan runoff, conservative Georgia State Court Judge Stephen Yekel told Governor Brian Kemp in a Dec. 6 letter that he intended to resign effective Dec. 30, just one day before his term was set to end. Kemp rejected his resignation letter, thankfully, but that doesn't mean a more cynical governor would do the same in the future.
Opponents of voting rights will take ANY opportunity to silence the will of the people and hold onto their power. We need to fight to close this loophole in Georgia and similar loopholes around the country.
Voter suppression comes in all forms, Team, both in Georgia and nationally. Step up and defend our right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=pKq4m0w0ZICo/O+sBHmNp197N1UBcAPz+xxUibK4G+PKaBqmaJS2EPURGf7PmdllZ8jV+/EbzTIib9QYwYmqdjIJF2120IchtSZtgFGnQK4=]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=15.00&tknfa=rL4Uugq1bPslWDEpZdux2kB4dATu0cfllcq1NlFd6y8=&contactdata=pKq4m0w0ZICo/O+sBHmNp197N1UBcAPz+xxUibK4G+PKaBqmaJS2EPURGf7PmdllZ8jV+/EbzTIib9QYwYmqdjIJF2120IchtSZtgFGnQK4=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&tknfa=rL4Uugq1bPslWDEpZdux2kB4dATu0cfllcq1NlFd6y8=&contactdata=pKq4m0w0ZICo/O+sBHmNp197N1UBcAPz+xxUibK4G+PKaBqmaJS2EPURGf7PmdllZ8jV+/EbzTIib9QYwYmqdjIJF2120IchtSZtgFGnQK4=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=50.00&tknfa=rL4Uugq1bPslWDEpZdux2kB4dATu0cfllcq1NlFd6y8=&contactdata=pKq4m0w0ZICo/O+sBHmNp197N1UBcAPz+xxUibK4G+PKaBqmaJS2EPURGf7PmdllZ8jV+/EbzTIib9QYwYmqdjIJF2120IchtSZtgFGnQK4=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=100.00&tknfa=rL4Uugq1bPslWDEpZdux2kB4dATu0cfllcq1NlFd6y8=&contactdata=pKq4m0w0ZICo/O+sBHmNp197N1UBcAPz+xxUibK4G+PKaBqmaJS2EPURGf7PmdllZ8jV+/EbzTIib9QYwYmqdjIJF2120IchtSZtgFGnQK4=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=250.00&tknfa=rL4Uugq1bPslWDEpZdux2kB4dATu0cfllcq1NlFd6y8=&contactdata=pKq4m0w0ZICo/O+sBHmNp197N1UBcAPz+xxUibK4G+PKaBqmaJS2EPURGf7PmdllZ8jV+/EbzTIib9QYwYmqdjIJF2120IchtSZtgFGnQK4=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=pKq4m0w0ZICo/O+sBHmNp197N1UBcAPz+xxUibK4G+PKaBqmaJS2EPURGf7PmdllZ8jV+/EbzTIib9QYwYmqdjIJF2120IchtSZtgFGnQK4=]
While Kemp didn’t give in this time , he has used the loophole to postpone or cancel other judicial elections, though state observers say he has never done so to block a winner after an election has already taken place, only before elections.
But that doesn't mean it won't happen in the future, either with him or another governor. In fact, Kemp had a direct hand in the controversial 2020 maneuver that effectively created the loophole in its current form and gave him the authority to cancel judicial elections.
“ You’re creating an opportunity to bypass an election, ” Sara Tindall Ghazal, a member of the Georgia Board of Elections, said. “ If the judge or the governor doesn’t like the outcome of the election, there’s this opportunity to encourage the incumbent to resign and then fill the seat. ”
Georgia needs stricter legal guidelines now. Our fundamental right to vote needs defending across the country. Our democracy is too important to let these petty dictators, MAGA sycophants, and conspiracy theorists stay in control.
We have to start working now to defend our democracy in next year's elections. Chip in $25 or more right now to join the fight for our rights before it's too late >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=pKq4m0w0ZICo/O+sBHmNp197N1UBcAPz+xxUibK4G+PKaBqmaJS2EPURGf7PmdllZ8jV+/EbzTIib9QYwYmqdjIJF2120IchtSZtgFGnQK4=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=pKq4m0w0ZICo/O+sBHmNp197N1UBcAPz+xxUibK4G+PKaBqmaJS2EPURGf7PmdllZ8jV+/EbzTIib9QYwYmqdjIJF2120IchtSZtgFGnQK4=]

clean_body: We know this all just amounts to another way that opponents of voting rights can try and ignore voters and subvert the will of the people. We have to get this loophole in Georgia eliminated before the vote suppressors use it in other states. RUSH $25 or more today to fight back against any loophole that reduces our voice in our elections and harms our fundamental right to vote >> [=] Voter Action Project [=] Bolts: After a Judge’s Death, Renewed Scrutiny for a Georgia Loophole That Can Nullify Elections [=] A quick story, Team: After losing an election race last year, a Georgia State Court Judge turned to a loophole in state law that could have erased the result and blocked the winner from taking office. We're not making this up. In Georgia, if judges announce they’ll quit at some point before the end of their term, they hand the governor the ability to choose their replacement for the next two years. Even if an election was about to be held for their seat, that race gets canceled and kicked years down the road. Even if an election for their seat has already happened , a judge could still resign after they’ve lost, giving the governor the power to make an appointment that would nullify the result. Looking to trigger this rule after losing his nonpartisan runoff, conservative Georgia State Court Judge Stephen Yekel told Governor Brian Kemp in a Dec. 6 letter that he intended to resign effective Dec. 30, just one day before his term was set to end. Kemp rejected his resignation letter, thankfully, but that doesn't mean a more cynical governor would do the same in the future. Opponents of voting rights will take ANY opportunity to silence the will of the people and hold onto their power. We need to fight to close this loophole in Georgia and similar loopholes around the country. Voter suppression comes in all forms, Team, both in Georgia and nationally. Step up and defend our right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [=] If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [=] OTHER AMOUNT [=] While Kemp didn’t give in this time , he has used the loophole to postpone or cancel other judicial elections, though state observers say he has never done so to block a winner after an election has already taken place, only before elections. But that doesn't mean it won't happen in the future, either with him or another governor. In fact, Kemp had a direct hand in the controversial 2020 maneuver that effectively created the loophole in its current form and gave him the authority to cancel judicial elections. “ You’re creating an opportunity to bypass an election, ” Sara Tindall Ghazal, a member of the Georgia Board of Elections, said. “ If the judge or the governor doesn’t like the outcome of the election, there’s this opportunity to encourage the incumbent to resign and then fill the seat. ” Georgia needs stricter legal guidelines now. Our fundamental right to vote needs defending across the country. Our democracy is too important to let these petty dictators, MAGA sycophants, and conspiracy theorists stay in control. We have to start working now to defend our democracy in next year's elections. Chip in $25 or more right now to join the fight for our rights before it's too late >> [=] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights?
