name: Eric Burlison
subject: One year ago… a bullet nearly ended it all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress
body:
One year ago today, America nearly lost President Trump.

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmavnp0frc60ks7tns8qj8ef2v6td3ceqhjv63uo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hm0ob6c5h2bs)

**Patriot** ,

Congressman Burlison here.

I don’t write messages like this often. _**But today is not an ordinary day.

**_
Exactly one year ago—President Donald J. Trump **_was nearly assassinated_** in Butler, Pennsylvania.

A mere inch made the difference between life and death.

A mere inch could have changed the course of history.

The image of President Trump—his ear bloodied, Secret Service agents swarming, supporters screaming—will **_never_** leave my mind.

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z37s9mnlof358g03vv12vih2916no8a6iv1tsg60_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hm0ob6c5h2bs)
And yet...

The media moved on.

The Left refused to condemn it.

And instead of cooling the temperature—Democrats doubled down, calling Trump a _**“threat to democracy”**_ and his supporters _**“extremists.”

**_
Let me be clear:
👉 I stand with President Trump.
👉 I stand with the America First movement.
👉 And I will **NEVER** let the Radical Left silence our voice with violence.

But Patriot—this anniversary is a wake-up call.

Our majority in Congress is **hanging by a thread**.

The Radical Left is **bankrolling challengers** in swing seats.

And if they flip even a handful of districts—**it’s over.

**
We won’t have the votes to secure the border.

We won’t be able to protect your freedoms.

And we’ll LOSE the firewall protecting President Trump from impeachment— _**again**.

_
That’s why I need you now more than ever.

We have to fight like every seat matters—because it does.

If you stand with Trump, with me, and with the America First mission, chip in **ANY** amount today 👇

[RUSH A DONATION TO DEFEND OUR MAJORITY](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2ves6cbqp1oluq73cq8p3mef5se6k2mvfphin6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hm0ob6c5h2bs)
Let’s honor this day by doing what matters most:

[**Never backing down. Never surrendering. And fighting like HELL to WIN.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjgbm0emhtnjn3a240nuts5b3ctmqr2h779ns02o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hm0ob6c5h2bs)
For Liberty,

Eric Burlison
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ziu6cpvvu8pdd5h98e8pad9p6bcijouagd29a1sg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hm0ob6c5h2bs)

subject: What is Kamala doing?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Let me be honest with you, Friend

| | |
---
| | Friend, What is Kamala doing? Here is yet another article published this week talking about how she gets “a glimmer in her eyes” about entering the governor’s race.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z11j5jki2phj61ni1skpmhap1251jqetois8rd90_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hm8pj4c3h2bs)
---
| | Let me be honest with you, Friend – who does she think she is? She has an “end-of-summer deadline” to decide if she’s going to run? Does she think she can lounge by the pool all summer and then get crowned governor? No! Becoming governor isn’t a consolation prize for running a failed presidential campaign. She has been in California politics for 20 years, and I can’t even name one accomplishment she’s done. I’ve been traveling all around the state talking with REAL Californians about the challenges they face – the challenges that Democrats like Kamala Harris created during the last 15 years of Democrat one-party rule. Trust me, they don’t want Kamala. If she does run, we will beat her. She has the liberal mega-donors and the unions, but I have you. REAL everyday Americans who know that California is ready for a change and the Democrats can’t fix the mess they created. Watch my full reaction to this below:

name: Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate
subject: A big issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter -
We’ve got two big problems facing our campaign right now, and we’re hoping you can lend a hand.
**Problem #1:** Our team is reporting that we’re way behind on our grassroots fundraising for July. We expected a bit of a slowdown with the holiday weekend, but things haven’t picked back up like we’d expected.
**Problem #2:** GOP-aligned Super PACs are already spending millions of dollars on TV and digital ads attacking Jon. And _this is just the beginning._
**_That’s a big issue.**_
If we’re not able to respond, we risk letting Republicans and their Super PACs control the narrative of this race. But fighting back takes resources, and we can’t afford to wait.
[**Please, donate today if you can. The Senate majority will come down to Georgia, and your support today could be the difference between winning and losing on Election Day.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250711-1-f&t=1&akid=544%2E5691347%2EUDlOyd)
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250711-1-f&t=2&akid=544%2E5691347%2EUDlOyd)**
Thanks in advance for coming through for Jon, particularly now.
\- Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=544%2E5691347%2EUDlOyd) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Sunhee Volz
subject: Join Us for an Environmental Justice Teach-In at Clark Park :herb:
body:
https://www.aacfpennsylvania.org [https://www.aacfpennsylvania.org]
Hi Peter,
We’re excited to invite you to an Environmental Justice Teach-In at Clark Park on Sunday, July 13 at 12 PM ! This will be a space for learning, connection, and action. We will be focused on how environmental issues like pollution, climate change, and development are impacting Asian American communities right here in Pennsylvania.
Too often, our communities are left out of the conversation around environmental justice, even though we’re deeply affected - from unsafe housing and rising utility costs to the fight to protect neighborhoods like Chinatown from harmful development. This teach-in is a chance to come together, build our understanding, and talk about how we can organize for healthier, safer, and more sustainable futures for all of us.
Bring a friend, a blanket or chair, and your curiosity. I'd love to see you there!
RSVP HERE! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t5ReoX6dKk6vVfQrySozzw2]
In Solidarity,
Sunhee Volz
Environmental Justice Program Manager
Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance
https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61557362948543 [https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61557362948543] https://twitter.com/aacfpa [https://twitter.com/aacfpa] https://www.instagram.com/aacfpennsylvania [https://www.instagram.com/aacfpennsylvania]

API PA
PO Box 22611
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/SxZcLwbmqUib9krCmDRzmw2?unsubscribedata=h57X1XOn8C8BFEMct57omyrF1GAkxGQmWhYyZr0wSJ29l%2B0hjTVmYk92F6ekM2vGYVE1HhZSLtMfVexWeQPMOfd1B9dJH5pUC1TZxq5QkKDy6mW%2FcrE4GlPASRQR7Ajd%2FnsYZBWhjXiTBP%2Bhc5ynhmHqJRHGl3TXHQ1LP75R9i1%2Fy0nPj8wObPXBqVKZu%2FF4n58RcBYeAbS1oXrX%2BT%2FMMFincdIyjQWIrod8QEdxHFlnTtD3QApTRQqUv9DwUMiI40MroKh%2FVnQgkmAozZ7L%2F4ntesySbikz2k55NnNxH%2F90%2FlgevhBpW0iGLmogtLJ6RuQkzQyy6dbyGE5rbIZI0QeK9dsM7UlnInb8yvuAdCZQrUSpJtRhUNwusK1ZpzUEG%2FgcTXpjJ8IpUvvw8NaQJX%2BembiyZGvDOKYVB%2FRRYTM%3D .

The average cost for a Substack subscription is currently $8 and rising, with too many amazing authors to subscribe to everyone. That's why I'm dropping the price of my monthly and annual subscriptions for new subscribers.
I incur some costs in the work I do, but I have always believed in making information accessible when it's critical for the public to know.

**✅ **Republicans have spent over $1 million on TV and digital ads so far and leaned into negative attacks. _We use contributions to air our own ads._

**✅ **Thousands of Virginians are undecided in the race for Governor according to polls. _We use contributions to hire organizers who go door-to-door sharing Abigail's story and agenda._

**✅ **And our race is the biggest election since Trump returned to power. _We use contributions to register and engage voters._

Here in Virginia, there is no limit to how much individuals can donate to candidates for office. For that reason, our opponent has been raking in money from far-right megadonors.

_Our average online donation is around $30, but what's more important is the number of people who pitch in._

clean_body: Our average online donation is around $30, but what's more important is the number of people who pitch in. | = | = Here's why: ✅ Republicans have spent over $1 million on TV and digital ads so far and leaned into negative attacks. We use contributions to air our own ads. ✅ Thousands of Virginians are undecided in the race for Governor according to polls. We use contributions to hire organizers who go door-to-door sharing Abigail's story and agenda. ✅ And our race is the biggest election since Trump returned to power. We use contributions to register and engage voters. Here in Virginia, there is no limit to how much individuals can donate to candidates for office. For that reason, our opponent has been raking in money from far-right megadonors. Our average online donation is around $30, but what's more important is the number of people who pitch in. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Spanberger for Governor HQ * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. We’re gathering key feedback on the Trump Administration’s progress.

| | | | Friend, With the third quarter of 2025 underway, President Trump needs YOU to assess his job performance up to this point. While it’s clear as day that DJT has already accomplished more than Biden did in FOUR YEARS as President, _**POTUS is just getting the ball rolling.**_ Trump and Congressional Republicans are fighting _every day_ to deliver lower costs, safer streets, record tax cuts, and a complete resurgence of America’s economy. _But as always, President Trump and the GOP are relying on patriots like**YOU** to make your voices heard so we can mold our Q3 agenda to address your top concerns._ **POLL: Do you approve or disapprove of the job that Donald J. Trump is doing as POTUS?**

Dear Fellow American, Some elected officials can't take a joke.

And unfortunately, they think they have the power to do something about it.

After the governor of California saw a video parody of a politician, he responded by saying the video should be "illegal." Then the California legislature fast-tracked and passed two bills, banning certain political speech.

_The Babylon Bee_ and other plaintiffs filed a lawsuit against California officials because the bills censor free speech and punish people for posting certain political content online, including political memes and parodies of politicians.

Your voice today can tell government officials you believe the Constitution protects humor whether or not they find it funny.

Will you stand with _The Babylon Bee_?

Click this link and stand with _The Babylon Bee_ today to advance free speech for all: [https://adflegal.org/support/humor-first-amendment-statement](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/jSf-SLrJyvUxK6MTqKSFnO8VwABmbRRrU29xhIkH7zF0Q_3G6IHRfiGVXfmzw_1FT4vYUowdZMI0FSNanlA12MvQW5ZqL5JaHDFiVt2fGC-hu75dBploF3R9Lk3EFi8CT66kskSDD9rwKlkB5C9YV4kg4lPtjbE2z-z-ci4F_sICDXWb8BIR7oSh6H9tGRI8_Q3bzfxEwu69jZTf328mv8sUjIAlD8JUSRTDon2s3Xmn3waPT8pUKps1nyukIbmCkzJo3n37Nz6XEawF3nRVnkoGWh1mgs8lXMHxv72iDfE_AOeHgkwaxDY4K2gYS9uaXBfR2unGXQR_0sopAmZ8d26dOw25FM0Sv5G_L4GqjZpl9uHuaj-TPhhkBsIY9le6-mWlUnPL0eYRqgowc-xHDpUYMHjwNmXnLusFd5ZPnJoSdyn53ytHDmkb-cSxvM6rfn9BQ8C1S3IVKz0rYAQZYrA1Pj-DKbfIxntRkwXPXC1KHLQnVD1B2wpETPzI-pJ3BmFfpefEftW04FLs55Nu7UJ6GSkMC5AdStS3oW1BPL10xntPhXnnGOIrvq5ecrY090lITnIoqllTQwZ73h2nNCZSmAeR_ZYoI-fQ18tG3PsYrpUhp1FeOriwX_Gcr4lwmgdm3yWvxGYavvE-gkHZl95iXeQs8ulymEdDVOCa2DtRlnI_sxbvOlqFpDBYltKia9r5sZU391qhDzN3L2mVqqXsnDJvSoWE3k664L16olaa5xU/NsHHJNohrUX4lbE0nj_6aLX7duIrVjrY/10).

[Trump's Ukraine missile plans](https://substack.com/redirect/3db6aae7-3426-4998-90d9-b5944370515f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Axios
[Biden's former doctor asks to delay testimony to House panel, citing patient privilege concerns](https://substack.com/redirect/18972da5-ec72-46ff-942c-d7229769328b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via AP News

## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/1dbfc15d-7bc2-4c92-9191-43474efae52c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it!
[Subscribe HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/1dbfc15d-7bc2-4c92-9191-43474efae52c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Next week on The Sean Spicer Show...
We've got a great week coming up; Monday I'm talking to Virginia candidate for Lieutenant Governor John Reid, along with Editor in Chief at the National Pulse, Raheem Kasham. Tuesday we've got Seth Keshel to talk about elections and 2026. On Wednesday you'll get an inside look in my testimony before the Senate about the cover-up of Biden's decline. Then we've got a great panel Thursday, featuring The Daily Signal's Rob Bluey, author and journalist Alex Swoyer, and Jessica Anderson. Finally Friday, I'm joined by Robert O'Brien, member of Trump's Intelligence Advisory Board.
Turn on notifications so you don't miss it!
## Wellness update...
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center.
If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me!
## Update on 2026...
Looking ahead to midterms, here's the latest on the Left's numbers.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f6cb9063-070c-4b90-995e-0a831b7c9883?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## Call Bishop Gold!
Gold is over $3000 per ounce! NOW is the time to invest in gold and precious metals, and if you call my friends at Bishop Gold, you'll get FREE silver included.
[Learn more here](https://substack.com/redirect/d33dc9cd-21ed-4076-b95b-dd1c148285cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ceead05-a79a-4558-b17e-afee1e13ffd1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## Don't bet against Trump...
I'm guessing the people that doubted Trump's ability to get the big, beautiful bill passed are eating crow right about now.
Countless discussions, compromises, and headlines later, the OBBB is now the law of the land.
It almost gives me deja vu... it feels like we've been here before.
The Left keeps calling political goals impossible, and Trump keeps accomplishing them.
But they continue to be blindsided by his competence-- something the American people are well aware of.
Maybe they'll learn this time?
I'm not holding my breath.
But with this recent win, and all of the accomplishments thus far in Trump's second term, I want to talk about what's going right.
And why a bet against Trump is a bad call. ...

Who’s responsible for this chaos? **A Republican majority in Washington.**

They control the House, the Senate, and the Presidency.

And instead of using that power to help everyday Americans, they’re tanking our economy, they’re fighting with our allies, and they’re robbing us of our security. All the while, they’re trying to tell us that everything’s fine. The coward caucus is afraid to stand up to Trump.

And, what’s worse, they’re trying to blame everything on Democrats.

Well, we’re here to tell you the truth. **No spin, no bullsh*t** , just an honest explanation of what’s going on in Washington and what that means for you and your family.

Peter — **We feel it every day: the increasingly urgent need to speak up for our rights, safeguard our families, and fight for a brighter future. We know that our freedom depends on our courage to act together.** Wiley has proven time and again that he's a fighter for North Carolina. From his days working in the State Senate to the halls of Congress, he has never backed down from a challenge. He's fought for better schools for our kids and educators, increased access to healthcare, and policies that make living more affordable — all for our working families. But this fight goes beyond policy, Peter — it's about us. It's about you, your neighbors, and everyone who believes that North Carolina can be a place where opportunity is within reach for everyone. **The progress we've made doesn’t hinge on one election cycle — it depends on people like us staying the course.** It's about keeping up the work to ensure that our children inherit a state where opportunity isn't just a promise, but a reality. _And that means we have to be there, every day, fighting for what we believe in._ **[To continue making progress, we need your support. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 7/11/2025
body:
DEI at a cost: Colorado schools caught in $70M federal freeze
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
As always, you can catch up on our Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado schools face a [$70M funding freeze](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) over DEI-linked civil rights concerns. ICE expansion is sparking backlash as [private prison firms seek new contracts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). CPW Director Jeff Davis cautioned that aggressive wolf removal could [breach the ESA](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and jeopardize Colorado’s current 10(j) status, while a new report [blames housing costs on bureaucracy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and labor gaps. Denver’s [$800M bond plan](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) is under fire for prioritizing parks—like the $200M Park Hill Park—over real infrastructure needs. Meanwhile, [zebra mussels have resurfaced](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) on the Western Slope, raising fresh ecological alarms.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Illegal immigrants are now [blocked from ACA benefits](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with a new HHS ruling bars access to taxpayer-funded health benefits for noncitizens. Meanwhile, faith leaders celebrated a win as the [IRS lifted restrictions on political speech](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from the pulpit. A defamation [lawsuit against the SPLC](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) is also moving forward after a court rejected its defense.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** C. J. Garbo calls for accountability after a Houston doctor [mocked flood victims for their politics](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), saying such conduct violates the Hippocratic Oath. He argues medical care must remain free from political bias, and compassion should never be conditional.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, July 11, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[DEI at a cost: Colorado schools caught in $70M federal freeze](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Colorado public schools are facing a $70 million funding freeze—part of a broader $6.8 billion nationwide hold triggered by the U.S. Department of Education. At the heart of the conflict are federal objections to DEI and LGBTQIA+ initiatives in schools, which have already led to lawsuits and pushed districts to search for new funding before fall.
The funding suspension follows executive orders issued by the Trump administration in early 2025. According to a July 2 notice sent to state education departments, the Department of Education is reviewing already-approved funds to ensure they align with new presidential priorities.
Governor Jared Polis responded the same day, calling the action “a direct attack on children, families, and Colorado educators.” He added, “Investing in education and ensuring the best future for our children has been a top priority, and it is disappointing to see the federal government undermine our students and teachers.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Garbo: The Hippocratic Oath demands compassion—even for MAGA voters suffering from Texas floods](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Dr. Christina Propst was fired after mocking Texas flood victims based on their political beliefs, violating the core tenets of the Hippocratic Oath.
* C. J. Garbo argues that firing her isn’t enough—her medical license should be revoked to protect public trust and ensure compassionate, unbiased care.
* The incident underscores the danger of politicizing healthcare and calls for stronger accountability from licensing boards and medical institutions.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[HHS shuts door on illegal immigrants’ access to taxpayer-funded benefits](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [JUST THE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The U.S. Department of Health and Human Services has officially banned illegal immigrants from receiving taxpayer-funded benefits, reversing a decades-old Clinton-era policy interpretation.
* HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. stated the move restores integrity to federal programs and ensures American resources are prioritized for citizens.
* The agency had allowed certain benefits since 1998, but this decision formally enforces the original intent of the 1996 welfare reform law.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Jeffco Kids First report reveals 33 staff misconduct cases in Jefferson County Schools](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY SHAINA COLE****| LOCAL | JULY 9** _An alarming report released by Jeffco Kids First, a grassroots advocacy group led by teacher turned activist Lindsay Datko, has exposed 33 cases of sexual abuse and misconduct by staff in Jefferson County Public Schools since 2022. The article “33 Documented Sexual Abuse and Misconduct Cases in Jeffco Schools” presents a disturbing image of a district with systemic failures._
__
**[O’Donnell: The Strategic Plan that turned patriots into suspects remains unresolved](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MIKE O'DONNELL | COMMENTARY | JULY 9** _In April of this year, the Director of National Intelligence, Tulsi Gabbard, declassified a June 2021 plan by the previous Biden administration to counter domestic terrorism. During his four-year term, President Biden repeatedly stated that “Domestic terrorism from white supremacists is the most lethal terrorist threat in the homeland.” Variations on this catchphrase were parroted by other senior politicians in the Biden circle—although never with any corroborating evidence._
__
**[“They called us hateful”: Colorado parents see their story reflected in Supreme Court ruling](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | JULY 9** _When the U.S. Supreme Court ruled that public schools must allow parents to opt their children out of LGBTQ+ instruction that conflicts with their religious beliefs, BJ and Brecken Jones sat quietly in their living room—stunned, relieved and vindicated._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|

|
---

|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Tonight On Newsmax PLUS The Tour Of Oklahoma
body:
I want to invite you to join me tonight on Newsmax w/David Harris Jr for what I know will be fun and interesting conversation. Join me at 8:45pm EST/
| | |
---
I want to invite you to join me tonight on **Newsmax w/David Harris Jr** for what I know will be fun and interesting conversation. Join me at 8:45pm EST/74:45pm CT on [Newsmax](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.11999.1.78e26b2c2a553ffcaf729e6169cbc63e) Watch here: [https://www.newsmaxtv.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12000.1.dd879ce4d07f1b1cb736c9ff849d299c) Also, I am traveling throughout the **State of Oklahoma** for the rest of 2025 and much of 2026 and if you live in close proximity to any of these events, I would love to see you there!
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12001.1.ae7d50f9270862001ee85fbbad01c269)
---
Here are a few events that I will be speaking at in **July** and **August** and we will be releasing **September** here soon!
Stay up to date at [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12002.1.31631dab2f16ef7b9eb3d89fc0c0222b)
Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
## Why Does God Allow Evil Things To Happen Like In Texas?
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12003.1.148e4fd4a12f84f2951ef3273b7151dc)
---
Recently, tragedy struck Texas in ways that are hard to even talk about. With these terrible events that took place, many people are wrestling with a valid question: **WHY DOES A GOOD GOD ALL SUCH EVIL THINGS TO HAPPEN?** This is a _real_ and _raw_ conversation that I had recently with **Erick Stakelbeck** on **TBN** about this very matter. You can watch it here: [https://youtu.be/7clhTfOB7Rc](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12004.1.9f8e566e1aebfb0068a5515a0cff7981)
---
| | [ Watch: Why Does A Good God Allow Evil? ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12005.1.95061ea25cbdd42dc42ba31d4fa1ba5e)
---
---
|
---
I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12006.1.7d5636fab2955aca82e84c35ad6d16cc) is out and has reached **#13 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12007.1.285bc035d26cc533b1ad856d439ea507)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12008.1.f1c065e101ac9fc49a0acf169606e917)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12009.1.9b233ed003747e844f301a7c8f5b0bcd). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12010.1.ad07fbf77c639e5aa661482d5a9e2222) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12011.1.f8e95280a272af79e4e34b4245418509) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12012.1.714e3af286d05409f9cebc9f0f160b92) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12013.1.4166c8f3c82a6ddbf57fccea26dd8e6d)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12014.1.50486ae2573072f159b5a683edefa735)
---
Get your [LIMITED EDITION SIGNED COPY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12015.1.6d90472a1cc1925ee857f8261e1eaa0c) here: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22921176.12016.1.5e85a9a99253c319eadc1015e351f1a7) Thank you,

subject: Fwd: It's Filing Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koslow for Nassau
body:
| | Friends – did you see Sean’s note?

We’re making real progress – but we still have ground to cover before tonight’s deadline. Every end-of-filing report tells a story about a campaign’s strength. With your help, we can send a clear message: Nassau is done with Bruce Blakeman!

I’m running to represent you – and I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help power this campaign to the finish line. Here’s the link to contribute: **[SethKoslow.com/contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111313599/556810928/-1692301918?contactdata=7N92FLzpkcN6BmSdI7t5Vsg97aP3MOlpJjXjC+CsU9W51lDZDbBx2+t37aJZBLTzeQu21t+cu1eTX81vVVApS9VJ6LOeRA72AH5ycOTe7go=&am=100&amtOpts=&recurringAm=100&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&left_to_give=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RhOWZmNjItNzE1ZS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YzZsf1j87rzw6ke2Irf7FYyt90q-l3M4AtilR-ScOrk=&emci=84b09dd6-eb5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3da9ff62-715e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17551891)**

Thank you for standing with me.

Seth Koslow

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Sean Gregory
Date: Fri, Jul 11, 2025 at 8:31 AM
Subject: It's Filing Day
To: Seth Koslow

Hi Seth,

On Wednesday, I asked you to help us hit our $24,000 goal. Because of supporters like you, we raised $16,283. That means we need just another $8,180 by midnight to hit our goal.

**[Can you pitch in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111313600/556810929/-1692301918?contactdata=7N92FLzpkcN6BmSdI7t5Vsg97aP3MOlpJjXjC+CsU9W51lDZDbBx2+t37aJZBLTzeQu21t+cu1eTX81vVVApS9VJ6LOeRA72AH5ycOTe7go=&am=100&amtOpts=&recurringAm=100&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&left_to_give=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RhOWZmNjItNzE1ZS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YzZsf1j87rzw6ke2Irf7FYyt90q-l3M4AtilR-ScOrk=&emci=84b09dd6-eb5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3da9ff62-715e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17551891)**

name: Team DNC
subject: BREAKING: The majority of Americans disapprove of Trump
body:
---
Derek, More than half of Americans disapprove of Donald Trump, **and it’s no wonder why:**
* He passed a billionaire-first budget that will kick **17 million Americans** off their health care.
* He fired **_thousands_** of Americans who worked for the federal government.
* And he’s spent **millions of taxpayer dollars** on traveling to his own resorts, all while prices soar for people across the country.

And this is just the beginning. That’s why here at the DNC, we are committed to building the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. **Millions of Americans across the country voted against Donald Trump and his disastrous agenda, and the DNC is committed to fighting back.** Your support today means that we can continue organizing to stand up for Americans and stop Donald Trump’s agenda in its tracks. [**Americans across the country are standing up to Donald Trump and his Republican allies. name: Sarah Kline
subject: Peter, will you share your story for public lands?
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DY1lYLtZ7Uaw8M0gzn9eKg2?contactdata=Gw9W4ig8lNXPof1V148wFocRqh2Aj+rndm1hdyjPG633yW/eRHbevkjikTff0vxiFRWrCdMMh8Q1Oyxl/VFnvjEG58uDCUUqyDQYwDyiXJg6KOEl0MhK8cjDTUFVfWK4 [https://secure.everyaction.com/DY1lYLtZ7Uaw8M0gzn9eKg2?contactdata=Gw9W4ig8lNXPof1V148wFocRqh2Aj+rndm1hdyjPG633yW/eRHbevkjikTff0vxiFRWrCdMMh8Q1Oyxl/VFnvjEG58uDCUUqyDQYwDyiXJg6KOEl0MhK8cjDTUFVfWK4]
Hi Peter,
In case you haven’t already seen the news, the Reconciliation Bill,—a.k.a. Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill”— that passed last week, did not contain the horrific proposal to put 250 million acres of public lands across 11 western states up for sale. The whole reason that proposal was removed was due to public pressure. However, while we may have won this battle, the fight is not over yet. While we’ve seen this major victory for public lands and should take a moment to celebrate it, the work must continue because our public lands are still being attacked.
Share your story! [https://secure.everyaction.com/DY1lYLtZ7Uaw8M0gzn9eKg2?contactdata=Gw9W4ig8lNXPof1V148wFocRqh2Aj+rndm1hdyjPG633yW/eRHbevkjikTff0vxiFRWrCdMMh8Q1Oyxl/VFnvjEG58uDCUUqyDQYwDyiXJg6KOEl0MhK8cjDTUFVfWK4]
Trump’s Department of Justice recently reversed a 1938 opinion [https://www.npr.org/2025/06/11/nx-s1-5430270/justice-department-says-trump-can-cancel-national-monuments-that-protect-landscapes] , ruling that presidents can undo established national monuments. That means even more of Oregon’s cherished public lands, like Cascade-Siskiyou National Monument and the John Day Fossil Beds, are now at risk of being sold off. This is on top of the cuts to National Forest Service and National Parks Service workers that are already having impacts on federally owned public lands and everyone who enjoys them, and the fact that Trump opened up over half of National Forest lands to logging back in April.
Our public lands are the most widely popular thing in our nation [https://www.pewresearch.org/short-reads/2024/08/12/americans-see-many-federal-agencies-favorably-but-republicans-grow-more-critical-of-justice-department/] , so I know you don’t need me to tell you how special our national public lands are. We all have a connection to them, whether it’s a place that’s on our bucket list or a memory that we have there, our public lands are vital for our environment, ecosystems, and us.
Most of my favorite memories involve hiking, camping, or backpacking through our public lands with my family and friends. My favorite place in Oregon is the Willamette National Forest—a public land that was recently on the sell off list. Without this national forest, I wouldn’t have memories of camping along the Blue River with friends, and accidentally falling asleep on the forest floor on a hike with my dad. I have so many memories of that public land alone, as well as so many others.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me in sharing your public lands story. [https://secure.everyaction.com/DY1lYLtZ7Uaw8M0gzn9eKg2] Your story can be about anything that highlights national public lands, and there are no limits to how short or long it is. These stories on why our public lands matter so much will add fuel to this fight for protecting them.
Share your story! [https://secure.everyaction.com/DY1lYLtZ7Uaw8M0gzn9eKg2?contactdata=Gw9W4ig8lNXPof1V148wFocRqh2Aj+rndm1hdyjPG633yW/eRHbevkjikTff0vxiFRWrCdMMh8Q1Oyxl/VFnvjEG58uDCUUqyDQYwDyiXJg6KOEl0MhK8cjDTUFVfWK4]
The work that we are doing matters, and we have real results to show for it. Not all hope for our federally owned public lands is lost, so please help us keep this fight up by sharing your story! [https://secure.everyaction.com/DY1lYLtZ7Uaw8M0gzn9eKg2]
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: The most important issue we’re facing today is housing affordability
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Recently, at our town hall, an Arizonan stood up and asked me, _“How are you planning to advocate for federal policies that support cities like Phoenix with affordable housing policies?”_ Housing affordability is one of, if not _*the*_ most important issues that affects my constituents, especially young people who are worried that they’ll never be able to afford to own a home and pursue their American Dream. **[We can and must do more to build housing and create more pathways to home ownership. That’s why I introduced the _HAVEN Act_ , which will address housing affordability directly and bring relief to Arizonans struggling to put a roof over their heads. If you’re with me in this work to make housing more affordable, will you pitch in right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111314630/556814319/-912468211?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250711_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTc0Mjg4NC03MjVlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iaw_wy6aXaKDUysiXJmgKYrpNdFyEaKgk73bdSs5z1s=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111314632/556814321/-912468211?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250711_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTc0Mjg4NC03MjVlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iaw_wy6aXaKDUysiXJmgKYrpNdFyEaKgk73bdSs5z1s=)

clean_body: | Recently, at our town hall, an Arizonan stood up and asked me, “How are you planning to advocate for federal policies that support cities like Phoenix with affordable housing policies?” Housing affordability is one of, if not the most important issues that affects my constituents, especially young people who are worried that they’ll never be able to afford to own a home and pursue their American Dream. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = My legislation shifts the federal definition of affordable housing to be a smaller percentage of your income — finally taking into account the other necessary costs Arizonans take on month to month, like transportation, groceries, child care, and utilities. Addressing our housing crisis will take big, bold solutions. With your support, I’m working to find them. — Yassamin Ansari = Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Wesley Bell
subject: Our National Parks are not for sale. Full stop.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

Every Missourian knows the magic of our public lands.

From the Ozark National Scenic Riverways to the trails of Wilson’s Creek National Battlefield, _these parks aren’t just places on a map_ — they’re where we fish with our families, hike with our kids, and find a little peace in the world.

But right now, Donald Trump and his allies in Washington are scheming to sell off public lands to the highest bidder, stripping them from the hands of the people and handing them over to developers and oil companies thanks to his big, ugly bill.

Our public lands, our parks, and our shared natural spaces are part of what makes this country great. And as we celebrate National Parks Month, it’s a powerful reminder that what we don’t defend, we may lose.

In Congress, I’ll always fight tooth and nail to **protect** Missouri’s public lands. I will always stand against any attempt to auction off our rivers, forests, and parks to the wealthy few, but I simply can't win this fight without your support.

[**Will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can today to help power this people-first campaign and defend the places we love here in Missouri? name: Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones
subject: Thank you for being a free subscriber.
body:
Consider upgrading to support continued work on this top-performing newsletter.

| |
---|---|---
|
# Thank you for being a free subscriber.
### Consider upgrading to support continued work on this top-performing newsletter.
| | Jul 11
---|---
If you're receiving this email, you've been a free subscriber of MesoscaleNews.com for at least six months.
At **Mesoscale News** , I've been proud to serve a passionate and growing community of people who care deeply about the global state of affairs - from climate change to international conflict.
As a free subscriber, you've experienced a taste of the value Mesoscale News delivers--now imagine what you could do with _full access_.
Upgrading to a paid subscription unlocks powerful tools: access to all new and archived pieces, exclusive paid-subscriber-only content, one-on-one discussions and more.
Your support as a paid subscriber doesn't just give you better data and information--it directly funds the independent work that keeps MesoscaleNews.com ahead of the storm. We don't rely on clickbait or ad revenue. We rely on _you_.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZUcxuwaFRw5RMcTCe_YWnZNZJp5d1GvPFTCtoPDUG5Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168085108)
If the climate or politics of the day impact your life, business, or community, upgrading is a small investment with big returns. For less than the cost of a cup of coffee per month, you'll help ensure Mesoscale News remains fast, accurate, and independent--because weather doesn't wait, and neither should you.
Join our premium community today and experience what professional-grade coverage truly means.
Stay informed. Stay ahead. Stay safe.
_PS - It 's my birthday, and as I go from the top of the hill to over the hill, your financial support of my efforts is assurance that my views and commentary aren't "old" just yet._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZUcxuwaFRw5RMcTCe_YWnZNZJp5d1GvPFTCtoPDUG5Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168085108)
Some _**highlights**_ from what you've accessed so far this year:
**January 2025:**
* [Media meta-analysis of time spent discussing climate change during California's wildfires](https://substack.com/redirect/aea2c03e-2f65-4d02-a97d-13c7c38091f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

"Mesoscale" is an intermediate scale between hyper-local micro-weather phenomena and larger-scale climate dynamics, offering a position with which to view the world at both the individual level and the broader impacts across the planet. It is in this spirit we examine the human stories created from our national and international policies and actions.

| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/5-stories-of-courage-to-fight-fascism?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

It is easy to get lost in a sea of despair as we see our Republic collapse, with rights stripped away one at a time. But it is also that much more important to celebrate the wins and our courageous neighbors standing up and fighting back, getting in Good Trouble, and refusing to relent to the fascism this regime is enabling and promoting.
As I continue to keep you informed on the key human rights issues impacting us all, I also want to elevate stories of resilience, courage, and hope, because they are reminders that we can and must resist this extremism. Here are five powerful stories of ordinary people standing up for justice to demonstrate extraordinary courage against hate. **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1e8a72b-25e3-4e94-bb97-bda971028382?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **1\. Veterans Protecting Afghan Allies at Home**
In one of the most moving displays of integrity and patriotism, over 200 U.S. military veterans have banded together to protect Afghan asylum seekers -- many of whom once served as interpreters or guides during America's longest war. Calling themselves _Battle Buddies_ , these vets are showing up to immigration hearings to physically stand beside Afghan refugees, shielding them from harassment and unlawful detention by ICE. This is especially personal to me because I was fortunate to work with and legally support dozens of Afghan families during the US withdrawal from Afghanistan. To see Veterans continue to step up is powerful, and much needed.
This isn't symbolic. This is what keeping your oath looks like. This is defending the Constitution. These veterans understand that "support and defend" doesn't end when the uniform comes off -- it carries on wherever injustice rears its head. We need more of this courage in 2025.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cbd2744d-8278-4117-a8ea-9fef86c03a22?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **2\. A 71-Year-Old Grandma Standing Up to ICE**
Barbara Stone, a 71-year-old grandmother and U.S. citizen, was handcuffed by ICE fascists inside a San Diego immigration court. Why? Because she dared to show up and peacefully defend immigrants. ICE accused her of pushing an officer -- she denies the claim -- but the image of federal agents cuffing a senior citizen for showing compassion should tell you everything you need to know about this regime's fragile masculinity and abuse of power. Indeed, how weak and pathetic are these ICE fascists that a 71-year-old Grandma makes them feel unsafe and insecure?
Barbara is proof that you're never too old to get in Good Trouble. Her courage shines a light on how regular people can disrupt cruelty -- even when the consequences are unjust.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d049e6fb-e9d4-4622-a5bd-aaf242da3d28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**If you 're finding value in this content, join our community as** **a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qqoHzKXt9L0A3BEbZt59KfS9HIy6eXz3lPYIh24PPvU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168074944)
## **3\. Doctors Suing RFK Jr. to Save Public Health**
In an extraordinary and unprecedented move, several leading medical organizations -- including the American Academy of Pediatrics -- are suing HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for what they call "a public health emergency that demands immediate legal action and correction."
The lawsuit follows Kennedy's reckless dismantling of critical vaccine policy, including the removal of COVID shot recommendations for children and pregnant people, and firing the nation's top vaccine experts. In the words of AAP President Dr. Susan Kressly: "Our immunization system has long been a cornerstone of U.S. public health." Kennedy's actions are not only medically unsound -- they're legally indefensible. And now, doctors are doing what this administration refuses to do: protect the lives of children and families. As a parent myself, I am grateful to see our scientists rise up against this anti-intellectualism that has infected the Trump regime. Our children and our country need science based policy to protect them, not anti-vaccine extremists peddling pseudoscience.
## **4\. Mahmoud Khalil Sues Trump for $20 Million**
Mahmoud Khalil, the peaceful protester and American resident that Trump falsely imprisoned, has filed a $20 million lawsuit against Donald Trump and his regime. Khalil is demanding accountability for being falsely imprisoned, maliciously prosecuted, and smeared as an antisemite -- all without a single criminal charge -- simply for exercising his First Amendment rights to peaceful protest.
This is a test of our legal system. And it's a reminder that when fascists come for one of us, we must respond by standing together. Khalil never committed a crime -- but he was treated as one because he dared to speak out. Now he's fighting back with the power of the law. I hope he gets his justice -- and that Trump finally learns what due process means.
## **5\. Massachusetts Proves What Happens When You Tax the Rich**
Here's some real policy inspiration: In 2022, Massachusetts raised taxes on millionaires by 4%. Conservatives cried foul and said the rich would flee. Instead, the state saw a _39% increase_ in the number of millionaires. And what did the state of Massachusetts do with that money?
They passed _universal free breakfast and lunch_ for all public school children.
Massachusetts is now one of the _least poverty-stricken states_ in America. It's a reminder that "trickle-down economics" has always been a scam. But when you tax the rich, you _uplift everyone_ -- including the rich. We don't need billionaires hoarding wealth. We need justice, nourishment, and policy rooted in compassion. Every state should follow suit. This is also another reminder to reject the fear mongering over Zohran Mamdani's plan to raise taxes on millionaires by a mere 2%. We have the living breathing example of Massachusetts as evidence that taxing the wealthy works to uplift society and strengthen economies.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qqoHzKXt9L0A3BEbZt59KfS9HIy6eXz3lPYIh24PPvU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168074944)
## **Conclusion: Find Your Front Line & Stand On It**
I can share several more examples, but I want to close with this important point. These stories aren't just feel-good anecdotes -- they are blueprints for how we resist. From veterans keeping their oath, to doctors defending science, to grandmas defying ICE thugs, to wrongly prosecuted Americans demanding Constitutional rights, to governments prioritizing working people over the wealthy -- the front lines are everywhere. And no act of courage is too small.
We are living through a moment that demands clarity, integrity, and defiance. I will continue to elevate these voices, keep you informed of the attacks on our human rights, and provide you calls to action to meaningfully fight back. I am grateful to those who [subscribe and support this advocacy](https://substack.com/redirect/85aa95d7-059c-4ef2-9693-d6966f00fb6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), because it helps fuel my work.
Yes, the forces of fascism are rising -- but so are the people. The antidote to despair is action. The antidote to hate is solidarity. So find your front line. Then stand on it. Because history doesn't remember those who stayed silent. It remembers those who stood up -- and refused to back down. Let us never back down, and instead always lead with justice for all people in this country.
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: This is essential to preserve freedom
body:
There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is ignorance.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za2sqpt12tents9n69s92a3eb0l6uh7q0h8ourtg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hmao74clh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far-Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://info.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdbovbb9ns5kf4ksfkccu7sv9atn5qjusatd6f3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hmao74clh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")

## There is a coordinated effort underway to undermine the Constitution, including the Second Amendment.
[AGREE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrveithkl0tt20gj622t18hqcr2l01hb86alj6ig_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hmao74clh2bs) [DISAGREE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs3ec8btrq08oga2qii0kqu799d931sj1m8upb2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hmao74clh2bs) [NOT SURE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlip7bhllnnolkid51arhr1tis13meprvmjo62fo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hmao74clh2bs)
Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today, our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://info.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zotq16su31n4gh84ifgrstjva4a5r6h2mvfpoog0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hmao74clh2bs) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** The Second Amendment is under attack. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://info.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdgics01qpvqhvglvn0spjo50urimunogrdqja0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hmao74clh2bs)
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8satj6c576a4jgemmbgfnipmvc4ceio64imp2uo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c9hmao74clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Friend,

Unions across America are fed up with the Trump administration.
Workers are standing shoulder to shoulder to say this: **Donald Trump is waging the largest assault on workers' rights in modern history, ****and we’re not going to take it.**
The union-busting, the mass firings, the threats to bargaining power – the White House is leading an unprecedented, coordinated and aggressive attack on organized labor.
This is why I started the Dignity of Work PAC: to back pro-labor candidates who aren’t afraid to stand up to guys like Trump and fight for workers.
But to do that for the long haul, we need grassroots supporters like you, friend. **[That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 by midnight tomorrow – and we’re counting on folks like you to help us get there. Will you chip in $5 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111317784/556826265/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk43-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDZiNDgzNi03OTVlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FOEX1xKV6zjonDCGEslMuZzQMpk_A849WI8BDD4NqDU=)**

Friend, if everyone reading this chipped in a few bucks – whatever they can afford – we’d have the resources we need to help elect pro-worker leaders across the country. clean_body: Right now, it’s a coin flip | = | Have you seen this polling? = Right now, Democrats have a narrow lead in our quest to take back control of the U.S. House of Representatives. That means it isn’t a slam dunk. And it will all come down to “tossup” and “lean” seats here in California. = = = = = = With all the chaos and economic uncertainty that Donald Trump has unleashed, we all hope that the race for control of the U.S. House Majority will be a blowout next year. Especially now that Republicans have passed their "Big Ugly Bill" that will strip healthcare from millions. But current polling shows that the race will be tight, which means we need to fight seat-by-seat to get the House Majority back and put a crucial “check” on President Trump and his band of cronies. = We’re counting on you. \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. name: Nellie Pou HQ
subject: Six months in Congress
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Team,

Nellie has been in Congress for six months now. Here's a recap:

* From the moment she cast her first vote, she was attacked by House Republicans.
* Multiple dark-money, false ad campaigns from the NRCC and GOP-aligned super PACs have targeted Nellie, spending over six figures against her.
* NJ-09 was named a Frontline district by the DCCC, confirming Nellie's seat is critical to winning back the House majority in 2026.
* When House Republicans forced through the President's budget bill late at night, Nellie showed up and fought back on behalf of New Jersey working families.
* Nellie received the AFL-CIO's annual award for her work to protect working families and the right to organize.
* We've crushed fundraising goals and built our war chest to fight back against House Republicans' attacks thanks to grassroots supporters like you.

That's just the first six months, team. We know this is only the beginning of the NRCC coming after this seat to try to expand their House majority, and we must continue to fight, take back the House, and stop the President's agenda in its tracks.

Help us do that by making a contribution of $10 or any amount you can afford today: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?amount=10&:refcode=250711_np_six_l1]

CONTRIBUTE [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=250711_np_six_b1]Thank you,

— Nellie Pou HQ
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=4d24c981-795e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=4d24c981-795e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c]
Follow Nellie
https://x.com/NelliePou [https://x.com/NelliePou] https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/ [https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/] https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/ [https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/]
Checks may also be mailed to:
Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/QcG518LlG0yfilVoJO5ZLg2?unsubscribedata=%2FSkbreZ82PrgvJV1Ri2gpS1JvTNuRlK%2FTNqSQXrKvcS%2FYOG2SnQORMkTFH8PyBR5di66S2RpUykwKVQbmjPupoK3A0g8V5Pl5WOXaeX6iYmpZTofRo8puVEopDaqi%2F921BxGlBngodzb8yPM5SEewcMZW1tPAT28V7dhhRmqepFwbGzXKFtAQnK0Sd33LblcwEv0rnaXb%2BrBxmPW%2FXtAa7WhNJ2Pb1GQmiUWsRDf6vXFtCqeCfUVTT4F6fnyPh4nTnjOa2p6Tzu7vNCgvJUEGo4CwiXWctc4HZUEtlafSQSsnuKCqQRIEQgkvuBb3B6d%2FKQVNFP6ccOlVgteRYB0156p58ubMHJgHKZTEN8XQRQm8y1f8lbmaJb2ApsON%2Fewn5RhQu4gjAdzC0fsrapC1BES66GGLkDOen1siaOimDefrt1fWqRYZ0xX%2F2soiYX7] . name: Mamdani Race Update via Our Revolution
subject: Zohran Mamdani vs Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Donald Trump just made his most brazen threat yet. Terrified by the surge
of progressive power, he openly declared he'd use federal power to seize
control of New York if progressive champion Zohran Mamdani wins the race
for mayor.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32800?source=email-20250711&t=1011&akid=8999%2E5885482%2EHSQzRK ]Headline: 'We have tremendous power': Trump threatens federal takeover
of New York City if Zohran Mamdani wins

Trump knows what's at stake. Leaders like Mamdani and Bernie Sanders pose
the greatest risk to his politics of hate, greed, and division.

Yet, instead of rallying behind Mamdani, the Democratic establishment is
RUSHING to cozy up to their billionaire donors and corporate-backed
candidates and refusing to back Mamdani.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32800?source=email-20250711&t=1012&akid=8999%2E5885482%2EHSQzRK ]We CANNOT let this stand. Tell the Democratic establishment it's time
to publicly support Zohran Mamdani for NYC Mayor NOW!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32800?source=email-20250711&t=1013&akid=8999%2E5885482%2EHSQzRK ]ADD YOUR NAME

Trump’s threats to take over Democratic cities didn’t stop with New York.
He said: “We have tremendous power at the White House to run places when
we have to...We could run D.C. We’re looking at D.C.”

It’s terrifying. But his tirade reveals one crucial truth: progressives
like Mamdani are genuinely dangerous to Trump’s oligarchy. Trump and his
billionaire allies see Mamdani as a direct threat precisely because
Mamdani will stand up to Wall Street and fight back against corporate
capture of our democracy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32800?source=email-20250711&t=1014&akid=8999%2E5885482%2EHSQzRK ]Bernie tweet congradulating the NYC Central Labor Council for endorsing
Zohran Mamdani

Support for Mamdani is growing, from the AFL-CIO to the teacher’s union.
But instead of rushing to support Mamdani as the future of the Democratic
party, Democratic insiders and old-guard powerbrokers are hesitating – and
even working to undermine him.

Thousands of Our Revolution supporters in New York and across the nation
have already taken action, demanding Democrats back Mamdani.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32800?source=email-20250711&t=1015&akid=8999%2E5885482%2EHSQzRK ]Momentum is building – together let's send a clear reminder that our
cities and democracy belong to the people. Click here to tell Democratic
Party leaders loud and clear: publicly back Zohran Mamdani now and stand
with progressives – not billionaires.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32800?source=email-20250711&t=1016&akid=8999%2E5885482%2EHSQzRK ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

The Our Revolution Team

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20250711.nanGbo&t=1008&akid=8999%2E5885482%2EHSQzRK ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I’m investigating Elon Musk’s claims about Trump’s ties to Epstein
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
And I need you to make sure they don’t come after me.

|
---
Trump’s own senior advisor just accused him of being involved with America’s worst child predator and using his power to cover up his ties to Jeffrey Epstein, friend. And as a member of the House Judiciary Committee, _**I’m not letting this go.**_ Trump thinks he’s untouchable. He thinks if he stacks the courts, bullies the DOJ, and surrounds himself with cronies willing to look the other way, he’ll get away with everything. Again. **But not if I have anything to say about it.** Friend, my relentless investigations into Donald Trump and his insurrection are why Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans kicked me off the House Intelligence Committee two years ago. **And now that I’m digging into Elon Musk’s allegations against Trump on the House Judiciary Committee, I know the bullseye is on my back again.** [**They’ve already tried to silence me — and failed. But now, I need your help to make sure I can continue speaking truth to power in the House. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td94ed70a-b486-4d78-bf19-82da8438051e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We’re only a few months into this disaster of an administration, and already, the glaring incompetence is on full display. This fool already had the job for four long years, and he STILL has no clue how government, the law, or the constitution works! [The American people can’t afford four years of complete Republican control (or should I say chaos) in Washington. That’s why I’m working my tail off to flip the House blue and put a check on Donald Trump’s disastrous administration. Can I count on your help by chipping in $5, $10, or more right now?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T46f0607f-17b0-4310-8671-b0c14a6457eb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Imagine a world where we voted for competence instead of chaos. We would be on top. Instead, we’re dealing with disaster after disaster coming from Donald Trump and their stooges in Congress. But next year, Americans will face another choice between competence and chaos — and this time, we must choose competence. [I’ll be working every day to make sure that happens, but I can’t do it alone. So please, if you can join me in this fight, can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or more right now?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T53778f3b-07b4-4d1f-bd30-f54307621c3b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta5524f09-ea80-46f1-9635-eafedcc9163a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

|

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111318081/556827815/144714547?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_Priorities2_250711_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_Priorities2_250711_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjk0MzI1NS03YTVlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OH2iCsPULpxEVOOjMQr1m_5VZo7lpQuXBquMGGXaKEw=) I’ll only take a minute of your time, Derek, I promise.

As my team and I build out our strategy for the second half of the year, [_**I’m hoping you’ll fill out my campaign’s Quarter 3 Priorities Survey**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111318082/556827816/2041150107?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_Priorities2_250711_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_Priorities2_250711_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjk0MzI1NS03YTVlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OH2iCsPULpxEVOOjMQr1m_5VZo7lpQuXBquMGGXaKEw=&emci=c7e58b70-aa5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=16943255-7a5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4568237), because unlike Republicans, this campaign is powered by people like you, Derek, not special interests – so I need to know what issues are most important to you.

As challenging and chaotic as this administration has been so far, I’m not giving up. I’m going to keep fighting to hold Trump accountable and take back the Senate next year, but I need your voice in this fight.

[_**Will you fill out my survey before it closes tonight? It will only take a minute.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111318083/556827817/2041150107?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_Priorities2_250711_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_Priorities2_250711_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjk0MzI1NS03YTVlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OH2iCsPULpxEVOOjMQr1m_5VZo7lpQuXBquMGGXaKEw=&emci=c7e58b70-aa5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=16943255-7a5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4568237)

Thank you for sharing your thoughts.

– Mark Warner

As my team and I build out our strategy for the second half of the year, , because unlike Republicans, this campaign is powered by people like you, Derek, not special interests – so I need to know what issues are most important to you. As challenging and chaotic as this administration has been so far, I’m not giving up. I’m going to keep fighting to hold Trump accountable and take back the Senate next year, but I need your voice in this fight. Thank you for sharing your thoughts. – Mark Warner ** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: The Big Ugly Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
On July 4th, President Trump signed into law one of the most destructive pieces of legislation in my lifetime. This is a bill which rips away health care from 17 million Americans, forces millions of children off of nutritional assistance programs, and adds trillions to the deficit to fund irresponsible tax breaks for corporations and the wealthy.
The President raced this legislation through Congress in order to sign it on Independence Day, but I struggle to think of a bill less aligned with our nation’s values. On a day meant to commemorate Americans coming together, President Trump signed hyper-partisan legislation to divide us.
After 31 straight hours at the Capitol, I spent my Fourth of July in three parades around the Third Congressional District – hearing from my constituents directly about how this bill will affect their families.
As if we needed another reminder, last week proves that the most important thing we can do is flip the House in 2026, elect a Democratic majority, and have a Congress and the gavels to fight for the principles this country was founded on. Did you see Jane Fonda’s message? She sounded the alarm about Trump’s dangerous push to revive dirty, polluting coal at the expense of our health, our safety, and our communities. **Trump's newly signed spending bill forces at least 4 million acres of our public lands to open up for coal mining and incentivizes coal companies to poison our communities with new tax handouts and lower government fees.** All of this is happening despite the fact that renewable energy is cheaper, cleaner, and more reliable. But Trump doesn’t care about facts. He cares about billionaires and corporations who profit from pollution. We're preparing to send our petition to Congress soon, and over 2,500 grassroots supporters all across the country have already signed on to reject Trump's coal agenda and demand that Washington lawmakers step in and take action. **[But we haven't seen your signature yet. Will you take a moment to read Jane's message below and represent your community in Cresco by signing our petition today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111318188/556828355/-1420927205?refcode=ea.2a34b29c-7a5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.2a34b29c-7a5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhMzRiMjljLTdhNWUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dBM9-wHjicfppS0C_cSoWvLEwogS8eL62v3DTQOEVOI=&emci=edb0362e-a85d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2a34b29c-7a5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN THE PETITION →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111318189/556828356/-1420927205?refcode=ea.2a34b29c-7a5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.2a34b29c-7a5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhMzRiMjljLTdhNWUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dBM9-wHjicfppS0C_cSoWvLEwogS8eL62v3DTQOEVOI=&emci=edb0362e-a85d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2a34b29c-7a5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)

Team JanePAC
