name: Down Ballot Defenders (via DLCC.org)
subject: Here's a recap of Wednesday's first-ever grassroots event→
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Thousands of grassroots Democrats RSVP’d to our event, where they heard from top Democratic leaders in the states about the importance of strengthening our state legislative majorities in 2025, 2026, and beyond. | | |
---
| |
---|---
On Wednesday, Team DLCC hosted our first-ever Down Ballot Defenders Summit, featuring DLCC President Heather Williams and four of our incredible state legislators. We noticed you expressed interest in attending, but didn’t RSVP. We hope you’re able to join next time! To help you stay informed, we pulled together some of the highlights for you below: Before you read on, it’s important that you know that electing inspirational state legislators like Leader Brinks in MI, Leader Reives in NC, Speaker McClinton in PA, and Del. Feggans in VA require year-round investments and hard work. ** Your dollars go further at the state ballot level – together, we can make major strides toward building Democratic power. [Will you make your first donation to the DLCC today?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEBymwZG1O-maEyIUQEs1EgATs8_TbxceciaIDQnOZlujrIy7BjlQNY7Nchi01mxRigANoMFrF2dL0fuUwQYcCUa9jw6odcBjEdmdaGkLq3u6AehcNV5ffRUf20bqEWH6wfP7KPoepI-LY9hxRkAtof99QqrbbNI8G-xPm0ymOfKPAhfYSqVkQzP3jAEgqZDFbVZavk-tt2uQyX-jaisvA8VTDV0tViurC_dMWl-WLlPDe3ogDgPbbhWtDKQ4K79Kc0/4i3/WsIO1eRtQUCBXU8TiSeAmA/h0/h001.TAqi-xZKKfOd7FAVqKY0ZqWCWMG2zge8GVlk_KCdL_M) **
* * *
**Where our efforts matter most** Unlike the hundreds of millions of dollars spent on federal races, we can make transformational change through the states because your dollars go further at the state ballot level. [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEBymwZG1O-maEyIUQEs1EgAMg8kSkaRY-XO7bHDdYDtrMh2MWggz6fg6cLP_bNLNvfQ6QT-Weykfbz-XOzAn0U7pmkqVoMbEppsfD-j-oWJNtDzUNxpX4kNQK2Gkh_U0_SZCKtrJVXYtJUnAFAem37sD7WOlbvGi-Aj1TNjHFOfT92O41-r2PPdwBG2KQWW1OYZUsvWrBkL66RT8eGgjpCO-W0lmf5OyV4KwP6Q5J5VOIrQsYYvLb1x-etnecPgsoY/4i3/WsIO1eRtQUCBXU8TiSeAmA/h1/h001.11_Q5ThfpeuFV6X6gzSBMzmb9uYWHWeIQlTDtgGnu5s) One of the most impactful things you can do today is support your state and local candidates – in places like your community and across the country. **How Democrats are protecting Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security, SNAP, and DEI** In statehouses where Democrats are in the majority, our leaders are preparing and planning for the GOP’s cruel and reckless cuts. In states where Democrats are in the minority, they are _still_ working to call out these brutal decisions. [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEBymwZG1O-maEyIUQEs1EgAUkhsRhYz9507sLZZ1LSWNThvn4pxva0ENOTKfbV8LZQm2fs8ggzWadYX3LIsocPXSLXgNeg8xH0ARQig37DCfdhGPRCX8YX2bOBJTLZYrxrWTMEHiSXc0PE5PGbk72tS8j6MKdgm0M7QRsVYOiyde1zyuIKFQ6NKPv7ixW3Pl2vcYASJEwNr04wh7v_vQb340O0JQ6EOu2G76wcSt6M5evsEV4BZ-dJRSNa-SRmcRNQ/4i3/WsIO1eRtQUCBXU8TiSeAmA/h2/h001.SGjHImFog8mCRl6JFgC4YCkD1J1y4yl1ovAs3QuxIXo) One of the best things we can do as Democrats is increase our power in the states so that Trump’s agenda is challenged on _all fronts._ **State Powers under the Trump Administration** Compared to Trump’s first term, Democrats have substantially more power in the states – we’ve added 10 more legislative chambers and _tripled_ the number of states with unified Democratic control. [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEBymwZG1O-maEyIUQEs1EgAFDA3FupjfzdL6pvxQ1tse2-vCrlCuNRPxCUJf8zLr0TmF2d21mQ27TWO-2WM0EfyUZzjosvvTWgemAn8L7QqlLm_JNrH4LuqLswmOg3Q3OmekV6dSA5v2kE361-Rb09RmprELVUmLHx333TVd24-eOKHwUHaVL1Yl6SnPrndZkBATgZPJPJDiWsNsg1HXiKMMh6wq7yM2F-eDVz2fg8sz_ue983Oe4bb-gDaepEbq2A/4i3/WsIO1eRtQUCBXU8TiSeAmA/h3/h001.eSxCw_XUIceQFasXDlfbvA45pPJB1V2TmJmAgIOka3c) State Dems are using that power to provide the strongest defense against the extremism and chaos descending from Washington. We must work from the ground up – volunteering, donating, and supporting local candidates – to ensure we can build the largest movement possible to kick Republicans out of office up and down the ballot. **Stopping Project 2025** Project 2025 was tested in the states years before it launched on the national stage. State Democrats are on the front lines of combating those policies. Fighting back is more important than ever. [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEBymwZG1O-maEyIUQEs1EgAu9cqY4pE2J0YlwzR1MfZFCDVhSAXkGraxmrccIlR8ULbSZgf19RNlm1Mn0afrRp8Ud0Odv5DZIY5kT8sLnILFRaaDbKgENR6v5imzHBDUi6DLqWwFZFEI0lHgPPsWX6h7UHaJjQC0cUGRge_khMyh1P8lsCII1vlxlvi1BP3nLiH2IZBIfgjoZ0KsQvHwQyzqnwGt7qdWj7SRXZQmOlFe1P-4JFGl9WA7n_a4zTIS_4/4i3/WsIO1eRtQUCBXU8TiSeAmA/h4/h001._r4gjxX0bP6KOrRyxPDt2verpE5MQSx9qMt0tBexh9M) Donald Trump will only be able to undermine our democracy and roll back our rights _if we stop showing up._ **The Fight Ahead** Democrats in the states have made incredible progress and gains – expanding health care access, lowering costs for working people, and so much more. Now, we’re fighting hard to keep that momentum going ahead of this year’s elections in Virginia and next year’s midterms. [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEBymwZG1O-maEyIUQEs1EgAlQmk_IDqOMwIxsGH_R2mAIJTWWB2KGTjmNXgq0IYj9aee6frYr1gsD03pd02HWGv5psYgsgES7Dvwr3zBCq8oR36gdIG700N7G-Gg3IocEHJ4hOQYcEdLYsN1v8N-P5X6uZVZEIB8hSUVfO9HE7JvLxl_mhUlucVAzYSSvjoXUmGs_UmbY4M_IHipzMhsHd7T3uMvuBoKtIrAYAwQxHUkfzY2eZp6GQrhvcLrn6zLFQ/4i3/WsIO1eRtQUCBXU8TiSeAmA/h5/h001.Er-nRUeUmgsrqILZeKYp8wBtWm9hOmRwApPAmRIf1BY) Already, in special elections this year, the DLCC has invested hundreds of thousands of dollars to ensure Democrats don’t miss a single opportunity – including flipping competitive districts where Trump won in 2024. **We have a game plan for combating Trump and the MAGA agenda.** That includes investing and winning more special elections, preparing to maintain our Democratic majority in the Virginia House, and laying the groundwork for Democratic victory in next year’s fast-approaching midterm elections. But this requires a movement, and that starts with you. **You can help fuel our work to elect state Democrats today as a Down Ballot Defender.[Will you start a recurring monthly gift to build a long-term and sustainable foundation for state Democrats to move our democracy and country forward?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-_BloSDenqRNrVyMVIyKnYO-BQz-baqElE00Ls-9bnr1zm_ZereCBgAsXdK99nWEBLcRwazQXG1CDlJqRqT0pRgg3kBKAfO4Qunj6f9iqvihHgWompwbQZAOo3KgeEeiyRJT2bZwOjbAhGp8yeH0BYAK_9DBbApxY5pmPPcAX7Q1wlNFD5ZcJSIfwBKDpHjZrnIFWFM5d7Oi8uMpKj3UA_MtG9FI4i_p8F34mmMvdRVMatmRPfF_9STrvfdr4REdL__3pvGivDtTTmYRZC7fJkMWUWm633_OtA7F9WZfiduf9yTgXz_WLo322s_Z7iwMxEa8HBTq1BHrHvVNnGZM2d/4i3/WsIO1eRtQUCBXU8TiSeAmA/h6/h001.XpxaahX-yGduCktxu2sjJpdjo829qXeAWEOeKhn_sdk)** In states where Democrats are in the minority, they are still working to call out these brutal decisions. One of the best things we can do as Democrats is increase our power in the states so that Trump’s agenda is challenged on all fronts. State Powers under the Trump Administration Compared to Trump’s first term, Democrats have substantially more power in the states – we’ve added 10 more legislative chambers and tripled the number of states with unified Democratic control. State Dems are using that power to provide the strongest defense against the extremism and chaos descending from Washington. We must work from the ground up – volunteering, donating, and supporting local candidates – to ensure we can build the largest movement possible to kick Republicans out of office up and down the ballot. Stopping Project 2025 Project 2025 was tested in the states years before it launched on the national stage. State Democrats are on the front lines of combating those policies. Fighting back is more important than ever. Donald Trump will only be able to undermine our democracy and roll back our rights if we stop showing up. The Fight Ahead Democrats in the states have made incredible progress and gains – expanding health care access, lowering costs for working people, and so much more. Now, we’re fighting hard to keep that momentum going ahead of this year’s elections in Virginia and next year’s midterms. Already, in special elections this year, the DLCC has invested hundreds of thousands of dollars to ensure Democrats don’t miss a single opportunity – including flipping competitive districts where Trump won in 2024. We have a game plan for combating Trump and the MAGA agenda. That includes investing and winning more special elections, preparing to maintain our Democratic majority in the Virginia House, and laying the groundwork for Democratic victory in next year’s fast-approaching midterm elections. But this requires a movement, and that starts with you. You can help fuel our work to elect state Democrats today as a Down Ballot Defender. Thank you, Team DLCC ** | | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Not authorized by any candidate. subject: They’re not even bothering to hide the corruption

body:
We’ve seen members of Congress dump Medicaid-related stocks just days before gutting the program

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111321947/556841771/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjI1YTlmNy04MzVlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IlU9tCkedoKokOzWsxvcH9kSmOeU9A6Um1hRHJs_tQw=) This really isn’t complicated: When you work for the government, you work for the people. Not yourself. Not your billionaire friends. **But apparently, not everyone in Washington got that memo.** To be completely honest, I’m not the least bit surprised by the corruption and self-dealing of the Trump administration and National Republicans. It’s exactly what we all expected. **What _is_ shocking is just how little they’ve bothered to hide it.** We’ve seen members of Congress dump Medicaid-related stocks just days before gutting the program. And we’ve watched Trump himself direct massive sums of taxpayer money to his own properties and even pardon corporate executives convicted of financial crimes. **With this much corruption out in the open, it’s no wonder why trust in government is at an all-time low.** But with some common-sense policies, we can change that. We can ban individual stock trading by members of Congress and ensure that no one is able to personally profit off non-public information. We can expand conflict of interest laws and hinder the power of big corporations. We can end the dominance of big money in politics. Public service is a privilege and a responsibility like no other. And it’s unfortunate that far too many of my colleagues are willing to cash out on that privilege. But no matter how many people stand in my way — including the President himself — I will never stop fighting to make our government more transparent and accountable to the American people. [_**Next year, we have an opportunity to change our government for the better — as long as we put in the work. So will you join me in that work by chipping in today? name: Deb Haaland
subject: exciting news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
To win this race, we have to organize everywhere and leave no voice unheard.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3170%2E400544%2EmVslvI)
Hi, it’s Deb. I’m writing personally to share some exciting news:
**Our campaign just launched the Lift Up New Mexico Tour!** In the coming days and weeks, I’ll be traveling across our beautiful state once again to meet with more voters, listen to their stories, and understand how I can best serve the people of New Mexico as Governor.
These stops are a critical part of our grassroots campaign. I firmly believe that to win this race, we have to organize everywhere and leave no voice unheard.
**But in a state as large as New Mexico, this kind of organizing costs a lot of money, and expenses like gas add up quickly! That’s why I’m counting on folks like you.**
**[If you’re able, will you pitch in $5 into our gas fund and help keep me on the road? Your donation will help me reach as many New Mexicans face-to-face as possible.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250711_1_gas?amount=5&refcode=em20250711-3170&refcode2=3170_400544_mVslvI&akid=3170%2E400544%2EmVslvI)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250711_1_gas?amount=5&refcode=em20250711-3170&refcode2=3170_400544_mVslvI&akid=3170%2E400544%2EmVslvI)**
Thank you and stay tuned for updates from the campaign trail!
— Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250711-1&t=2&refcode2=3170_400544_mVslvI&akid=3170%2E400544%2EmVslvI)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3170%2E400544%2EmVslvI)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3170%2E400544%2EmVslvI)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Ben Waldon
subject: We reached our goal—here’s our next task.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250711_julymonthlyask_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250711_julymonthlyask_actrs]
Hi folks, it’s Ben, Michael’s Campaign Manager.
Last week, our campaign hit its first-ever end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. We set the bar high, and thanks to your support and generosity, we were able to meet it!
Let me tell you why this is important:
We know we’ve got a long campaign ahead of us, the results of which will have real-world stakes for the people of Colorado.
We’ve got to ensure we have a ground game that can reach every county in Colorado, the resources to share Michael’s message across Colorado, and the ability to engage with as many Coloradans as possible, as early as possible.
Michael has served and fought for working Coloradans and their children for over 20 years—and he has no plans of letting up anytime soon.
If you’re on Team Bennet, here’s how you can best support us:
As our campaign manager, it’s my responsibility to ensure that all of our campaign operations have the resources they need to succeed—and to plan for the unexpected. While hitting our quarterly deadlines is important, a successful campaign works around the clock.
That is where you come in, team. One of the most effective ways you can support Michael is by becoming one of our monthly donors. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250711_julymonthlyask_actrs&recurring=1]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250711_julymonthlyask_actrs&recurring=1]
Knowing we have supporters with us for the long haul gives us the confidence to map out our campaign investments, not just for the next month, but over the next year and beyond.
Your monthly donation would truly give us a leg up in this race and allow us to bring in as many Coloradons as possible into the big-tent coalition we’re building statewide. If you can, consider becoming a monthly donor today. Even just $10 or $5 makes an impact. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250711_julymonthlyask_actrs&recurring=1&amount=10]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250711_julymonthlyask_actrs&recurring=1]
DONATE ONCE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250711_julymonthlyask_actrs]
Thank you,
Ben Waldon

Michael has served and fought for working Coloradans and their children for over 20 years—and he has no plans of letting up anytime soon. If you’re on Team Bennet, here’s how you can best support us: As our campaign manager, it’s my responsibility to ensure that all of our campaign operations have the resources they need to succeed—and to plan for the unexpected. While hitting our quarterly deadlines is important, a successful campaign works around the clock. That is where you come in, team. One of the most effective ways you can support Michael is by becoming one of our monthly donors. [] DONATE MONTHLY [] Knowing we have supporters with us for the long haul gives us the confidence to map out our campaign investments, not just for the next month, but over the next year and beyond. Your monthly donation would truly give us a leg up in this race and allow us to bring in as many Coloradons as possible into the big-tent coalition we’re building statewide. If you can, consider becoming a monthly donor today. Even just $10 or $5 makes an impact. >> [] DONATE MONTHLY [] DONATE ONCE [] Thank you, Ben Waldon [] [] [] Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore. CLICK HERE TO RECEIVE FEWER EMAILS FROM OUR CAMPAIGN [] By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:

| Trump is threatening _any_ news organization that is willing to speak truth to his MAGA lies — [**_so now we need emergency assistance to save PBS »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250711_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=20550%2E878179%2Ejsxxx4) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250711_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=20550%2E878179%2Ejsxxx4) **Folks, we know Trump will do ANYTHING to stop Americans from knowing the truth about his ILLEGAL overhaul of our government.**

name: Jay Jones
subject: I need you to understand what just happened.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
Team,
I need you to understand what just happened.
The Republican Attorneys General Association — RAGA — just dumped TWO MILLION DOLLARS into Virginia to prop up Jason Miyares.
Let me be crystal clear: This is more money than any GOP committee has spent on ANY statewide race in Virginia this year.
They're not doing this because they're confident. They're doing this because they're terrified .
Here's why: I'm running to be Virginia's next Attorney General, and unlike Miyares — who has pledged his loyalty to Trump at the expense of our families — I'll actually stand up for Virginians.
If you're ready to fight back against this $2 million MAGA money bomb, rush $25 to my campaign right now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=25]
Chip in to Fight Back → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
Look, before I decided to run for Attorney General, I spent my career as a public servant and lawyer fighting for justice for our communities. I've taken on corruption. I've fought for working families. I've stood up to powerful interests who thought they were above the law.
I know what it looks like when the powerful try to buy their way out of accountability.
That's exactly what's happening here.
These MAGA donors are dumping truckloads of money into this race because they know Jason Miyares will be a reliable foot soldier for Donald Trump's agenda.
While Trump weaponizes the Justice Department against his enemies, while he pardons violent criminals who attacked our democracy, while he shreds the rule of law — Miyares isn’t just staying silent – he’s enabling Trump every step of the way.
But here's the thing: We've beaten these odds before.
Here's our path to victory: We're going to out-organize them in every corner of Virginia. We're going to knock on more doors, make more calls, and mobilize more voters than they think possible. But to fight back against $2 million in new attacks, I need your help right now. Can you rush $25 — or whatever you can afford — to my campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=25]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=250]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
Donald Trump is using the full weight of the federal government to hurt states like Virginia. He's already firing federal workers, threatening to withhold disaster aid, and attacking reproductive rights.
Virginia needs an Attorney General who will stand up to these attacks. Not roll over for them.
But first, we have to win this race.
RAGA's $2 million is just the beginning. They'll spend whatever it takes to keep their MAGA loyalist in Richmond.
And you — right now — get to decide whether we fight back or let them buy this election.I know which side I'm on. Please join me.
— Jay Jones
P.S. — They think $2 million can silence our movement. Let's show them how wrong they are. Here’s the link to make a donation: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=25]

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

name: Dr. Maxine Dexter, M.D.
subject: We’re facing a deadly brain drain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Dear Peter,
This news took my breath away:
azcentral.com/story/news/local/arizona-education/2025/07/06/university-of-arizona-cancer-lab-crowdfunding/84439427007/ [azcentral.com/story/news/local/arizona-education/2025/07/06/university-of-arizona-cancer-lab-crowdfunding/84439427007/]
You read that correctly, a university cancer lab, which researches metastatic breast cancer, is asking the community for help keeping the lights on after Trump and the Republicans yanked their funding away.
The University of Arizona alone expects to lose more than $40.5 million in annual National Institute of Health research funding. That means fewer medical breakthroughs, fewer technological advances, and more families left without hope—all because of cruelty disguised as policy.
These scientists have dedicated their lives to saving ours, and now their work and our futures are on the chopping block.
These are lifesaving treatments that could save hundreds of thousands of lives.
Instead, Trump and the GOP are prioritizing tax cuts for their wealthy donors.
But we are not powerless. We can build a coalition of doctors, scientists, and truth-tellers who actually care about people—and push back hard against this inhumanity. If you're with me, chip in whatever you can today to build a movement to fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250711_AZLab_act]
CHIP IN TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250711_AZLab_act]
Enraged,
Dr. Maxine Dexter, M.D.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250711_AZLab_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250711_AZLab_act] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients.
Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.
To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [https://maxinefororegon.com/] .
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250711_AZLab_act]

name: Heidi Hall for Congress
subject: Friend, I wrote an article about this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250711_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250711_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Friend,
Congressman Kevin Kiley is a shameless and spineless rubber-stamper for Donald Trump.
That's what I wrote in an op-ed for the Daily Kos that highlights the harmful ways that toxic D.C. politics is affecting California.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250711_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250711_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
D.O.G.E. and Trump and Elon's war on "waste, fraud, and abuse" has served as nothing more than a misdirection for this administration's cuts to essential services that people here in California, and throughout the country, need to survive.
While finding real waste, fraud, and abuse is critical to holding our government accountable, working to eliminate the Department of Education by starving it of funds, cutting the Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP), cutting wildfire prevention, and cutting Veterans’ benefits does nothing to help—it makes things worse.
After celebrating these cuts, Kiley then doubled down on his support for Trump's Big Beautiful Bill, or as I like to call it, Trump's Big Ugly Tax Scam , and voted to pass it both times it came to the House for a vote.
Friend, there will be victims now and for years to come, with some never recovering. It's not hyperbolic to say that Kiley's decision put the lives of many in our district at risk.
That's why I'm asking for your support today. Spineless rubberstampers for Trump like Congressman Kiley will only continue to cheer as this administration leads us down a dark path. We need someone who will stand up for our communities and deliver results on the issues that matter to us.
I'm running for Congress to be the change that our district deserves.
Friend, EMILY's List has marked our race as one of their key 2026 flip targets. If you can, will you donate to my campaign today and help us unseat Kevin Kiley? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250711_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250711_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Thank you so much,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250711_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250711_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250711_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

[] Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice. After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable. Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to: Heidi Hall for Congress PO Box 729 Grass Valley, CA 95945 SUPPORT HEIDI [] PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS Heidi Hall for Congress PO Box 729 Grass Valley, CA 95945 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Quick email, I promise
body:
| |
---
Team, we all get tired of the jargon and inside baseball speak that is the result of decisions like Citizens United. Decisions that took power from voters and gave it to big-money interests. Dark money this, super PAC that - these are terms billionaire donors and the consultants they pay have forced upon those who simply want public servants who put working people first. We can't lose sight of what really matters. We know what is most important to our communities, and I've been fighting for the same things since day one:
* Lower healthcare and prescription drug costs
* Protecting Social Security and Medicare
* Stronger environmental protections
* An economy that finally works for workers
* More jobs, more benefits, and lower costs

For me, it's that simple. And that's why no matter how much billionaires spend to try to buy this seat, they always fail. **[If you stand with me, friend, please consider rushing a contribution to my re-election campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111323522/556847321/1039792322?refcode=250711_mk_care&ms=250711_mk_care&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmRkZmI3Ny04NzVlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_ZsgVMT9-p_YplkygXHxoYc5iquaRA6EEKvQ9VmsAk=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111323529/556847328/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250711_mk_care&ms=250711_mk_care&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmRkZmI3Ny04NzVlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_ZsgVMT9-p_YplkygXHxoYc5iquaRA6EEKvQ9VmsAk=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111323530/556847329/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250711_mk_care&ms=250711_mk_care&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmRkZmI3Ny04NzVlLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_ZsgVMT9-p_YplkygXHxoYc5iquaRA6EEKvQ9VmsAk=)

name: Heartland Patriots HQ
subject: losing faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
corporate donations → backroom deals → laws written by lobbyists
#
Let’s cut to the chase, Peter:
**Too many politicians are in it for themselves, not the people they were elected to represent.** They take corporate donations. They make backroom deals. And they pass laws written by shady special interest lobbyists that benefit their bottom line by actively stripping our communities for parts.
**It’s no wonder that so many Americans are losing faith in that system.**
If we’re going to take our country back from the politicians exploiting their power and robbing our communities, we need to root out corruption and elect leaders who will actually fight for working people. And that’s exactly what we’re working to do.
**Heartland Patriots is dedicated to electing everyday people who will boldly stand up to the massive corporations corrupting our politics.** We’re committed to helping candidates compete against the corrosive influence of corporate PACs and billionaire elites — all so they can better fight for real communities like yours.
**[So Peter, will you join our movement by chipping in $10 or whatever you can today? Our average online donation so far this month is just $16 — but anything you can give today will make a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91496?refcode=em20250711-9105&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9105%2E614464%2E-nhstT)**

Team, AZ-7 is a solidly Democratic district, but don’t let that fool you. A low-turnout special election is the perfect storm for Republican chaos. GOP operatives are already organizing to flood this race with misinformation, dark money, and dirty tricks. If we don’t act now, they’ll use this election to weaken our majority in Congress and chip away at everything we’ve built in Arizona. We can’t let them. This seat is the heart of Arizona’s progressive values, from immigrant rights to climate justice to affordable health care. And it’s not just about one race. This is our proving ground heading into 2026. If we want to win the big fights ahead, we need to show we can turn out voters, cut through the noise, and win even when the odds aren’t ideal. **[Your donation today helps us do exactly that. We’re training volunteers, organizing in often overlooked communities, and building the digital tools to fight back. But we can’t do it without you. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: I want to share something personal with you
body:
-It all started in a garage with no budget and a dream.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66833&utm_term=lrm-active]

Fellow patriot,

This past May, we wrapped up the Spring Finale of the American
Comeback Tour at UC Riverside...

I wish you had been there to see it.

Another packed campus quad. Students eager to listen. Flags waving.
Cheers for America. Energy you could feel in your bones.

Not in Texas... Not in Florida... California.

The “Deep Blue” stronghold the Left said we’d never touch.

But we did. And we’ll keep going. Because of patriots like you.

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66833&utm_term=lrm-active]

As I stood there looking out at the crowd — hundreds of young
patriots rising up in a place the Left said they owned — I
couldn’t help but think...

13 YEARS AGO, ALL OF THIS FELT... _IMPOSSIBLE._

Back then, Turning Point USA wasn’t the cultural phenomenon it is
today.

It wasn’t an office. It wasn’t a team. _It was just me._

No money. No connections. Just a desk and an old computer in a dusty
garage in the Chicago suburbs.

_But what I did have was a vision..._

It was 2012. The Left controlled every classroom, every campus, and
nearly every corner of our culture.

Their narrative was everywhere: America was evil... Faith was
“oppressive”... Freedom was outdated... The Conservative movement
was dead...

_And most of all, young people belonged to the Left._

I DIDN’T BELIEVE THAT. I COULDN’T ACCEPT THAT. I COULDN’T JUST
STAND BY AND WATCH THE LEFT WIN.

Back then, it was no wonder WHY we were losing young people to the
Left...

The Conservative movement felt stale... Conservative organizations
felt like a snooze... And it felt like no one had an idea of how to
reach America’s youth...

I believed if we were ever going to win young people back for America,
we needed excitement. Energy. Passion. And ZEAL for our ideas.

MY DREAM WAS TO LAUNCH A CONSERVATIVE YOUTH MOVEMENT THAT WOULD
INSPIRE YOUNG PEOPLE TO STAND FOR TRUTH — AND LOVE THIS COUNTRY
AGAIN.

I didn’t know what I was going to call this dream... this feeling...
this movement.

So, I picked up the phone, called my dad, and said, “I think I’m
supposed to start something, but I don’t have a name for it...”

HE REPLIED... _"HOW ABOUT TURNING POINT?"_

And just like that, a fire was lit. Turning Point USA was born. On the
promise that we could TURN this country around, one young heart at a
time.

The early days were brutal.

I remember driving across the Chicago suburbs to small Tea Party
meetings talking about “generational theft”...

I remember my first Turning Point USA speaking event in Peoria,
Illinois during the summer of 2012, where just six people showed up...

AND I REMEMBER THE LOOK IN THEIR EYES — THOSE EARLY PATRIOTS
— WHEN I TOLD THEM THE VISION:

_“We’re going to create a youth movement that LOVES America.” _

_“We’re going to go on campus and win hearts and minds.” _

_“We’re going to push back — and we’re going to WIN.”_

They didn’t laugh... They didn’t walk out...

THEY BELIEVED. AND FRIEND — SO DID PATRIOTS LIKE YOU.

You see, this isn’t my story. This is YOUR story.

Because without patriots like you... _there is no Turning Point USA._

Without you... _there is no American Comeback story._

Without you... _there is no cultural shift happening right now in
schools, churches, homes, and on every campus across our great
nation._

You were there when the campus quads and halls were empty... stood by
us when our signs got torn down.

You had our backs when the mob showed up — when they shouted,
screamed, and tried to wipe us off the map.

YOU DIDN’T GIVE UP. AND NEITHER DID WE.

But we were never supposed to be winning...

The Left thought they owned this generation. They thought their
indoctrination had worked. _But they were wrong._

I remember standing at tables on hostile campuses with nothing but
flyers and hope, praying to have a conversation that would light a
spark.

I went where I was told a young conservative didn’t belong. And I
kept going back.

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66833&utm_term=lrm-active]

AND THEN... SOMETHING HAPPENED... _THE STUDENTS STARTED LISTENING._

They started to question everything, think for themselves, and no
longer be afraid to stand up.

Then, they started showing up. _In DROVES._

And now? We’re not just watching history unfold... you and I are
making it.

FRIEND, JUST LOOK AT THE MOVEMENT WE’VE BUILT:

🔥 A network of 820,000+ conservative student activists

🔥 1,800+ college and high school chapters

🔥 All 50 states. No territory unclaimed.

🔥 16 BILLION+ total views across online platforms.

🔥 5 MILLION+ daily viewers online.

🔥 Over 10 million young people turned away from the Left.

🔥 Students rising up — even in DEEP Blue states.

We’re not just winning arguments and “owning the libs”
anymore...

We’re winning hearts. We’re changing minds. We’re turning the
tide.

This generation wasn’t “lost.” _They were LIED to._

BUT BECAUSE OF PATRIOTS LIKE YOU — THEY’RE HEARING THE TRUTH.
THEY’RE FINDING THEIR VOICES. THEY’RE DISCOVERING THEIR COURAGE.
THEY’RE FALLING IN LOVE WITH THIS COUNTRY AGAIN!

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66833&utm_term=lrm-active]

_Praise God!_

And you know what? This generation is just getting started.

BUT LET ME SAY THIS CLEARLY: THE BATTLE IS FAR FROM OVER.

The Left is on the ropes — but still dangerous.

They’re doubling down with new tactics. They’re more aggressive
than ever in our schools, our media, and our digital spaces.

They’re coming after our students harder than ever before —
because they know we’re winning.

_We cannot give them back an inch._

So now, as we look back on how far we’ve come... It’s time to
fight even harder.

We’re going to press in. We’re going to drive deeper into enemy
territory.

WE’RE GOING TO REACH MORE STUDENTS, TRAIN MORE LEADERS, AND DESTROY
MORE STRONGHOLDS OF LEFTIST CONTROL.

Not with violence. Not with hate. But with truth. With courage. And
with patriots like YOU standing shoulder-to-shoulder with us.

Patriot, I want you to feel proud as you read this today.

Because this movement — the energy, the fire, the growth, the
headlines — belongs to patriots like you...

The grassroots patriots who lit the match... fanned the flames...
stood in the gap.

AND NOW, WE’RE RAISING UP THE MOST CONSERVATIVE, MOST PATRIOTIC,
MOST FIRED-UP YOUTH GENERATION IN 50 YEARS.

That’s not hype. That’s reality. And it’s only possible because
of our proud supporters, people like you, who never gave up.

I CAN’T SAY THANK YOU ENOUGH TO THE PATRIOTS WHO’VE FOUGHT
ALONGSIDE US... THOSE WHO LOVED THIS COUNTRY ENOUGH TO INVEST IN ITS
FUTURE... THOSE WHO BELIEVED THIS COUNTRY WAS WORTH SAVING.

Let’s keep our foot on the gas. Let’s keep changing minds. Let’s
keep winning this culture war.

Because we were never supposed to be winning... And yet... here we
are.

For America,

Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66833&utm_term=lrm-active]

P.S. Friend, thank you for reading what was admittedly a long email.

But I wanted you to know how far we’ve come and how thankful I am
for patriots like you!

And if this message stirred something in you... If you’d be proud to
be a part of the movement that’s going to save our GREAT nation...

If you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God,
and for America...

And if you’ve been waiting for the right moment to take your
stand...

THIS IS IT. THIS IS YOUR CHANCE TO POUR FUEL ON THE FIRE THAT PATRIOTS
LIKE YOU HELPED START.

When you make your generous gift to Turning Point USA today, you
won’t just be supporting a cause anymore — you’ll be powering a
cultural REVOLUTION.

You’ll be reaching students with the truth. You’ll be changing
hearts and minds.

And most of all, you’ll be lighting more young hearts on fire for
freedom and American Greatness!

LET’S CARRY THE MOMENTUM THROUGH TO EVERY CAMPUS, EVERY PLATFORM,
EVERY CULTURAL STRONGHOLD UNTIL WE WIN. JOIN TURNING POINT USA WITH
YOUR GENEROUS TAX-DEDUCTIBLE GIFT TODAY.
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66833&utm_term=lrm-active]

SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA
MAKE YOUR GIFT HERE

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=301427&trkid=772295472&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: John Fetterman
subject: this could mean lights-out for local news stations:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hi Derek,
Trump’s at it again – this time trying to yank over **$1 billion** from the Corporation for Public Broadcasting, which supports PBS and NPR.
That’s not just some D.C. budget tweak. That’s lights-out for local stations – especially in small towns and rural communities that depend on public radio for _real news, weather alerts, and emergency info_.
He doesn’t need a single Democratic vote to pull it off. All it takes is a simple majority – and Republicans have one, just barely. But if we can convince a few of them to do the right thing, we can shut this nonsense down.
**But time’s running out. Congress has until July 18 to approve or reject the cuts. So I need to know what you think by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.[Will you take 60 seconds to answer this quick survey?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51393?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk193-su-fl&t=1&akid=10197%2E434096%2EDM04Ol)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51393?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk193-su-fl&t=2&akid=10197%2E434096%2EDM04Ol)
---
If Trump gets his way, here’s what happens:
👉 Rural stations go dark.
👉 Emergency broadcasts vanish.
👉 “News deserts” grow – and lies spread like wildfire.
It’s a straight-up attack on truth, community, and the little guy. He's counting on folks not paying attention. Let's prove him wrong.
**[Please, let me know where you stand by taking my public broadcasting survey now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51393?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk193-su-fl&t=3&akid=10197%2E434096%2EDM04Ol)**
Thanks, Derek,

John ❤️
| |

clean_body: | | | Hi Derek, Trump’s at it again – this time trying to yank over $1 billion from the Corporation for Public Broadcasting, which supports PBS and NPR. That’s not just some D.C. budget tweak. That’s lights-out for local stations – especially in small towns and rural communities that depend on public radio for real news, weather alerts, and emergency info. He doesn’t need a single Democratic vote to pull it off. All it takes is a simple majority – and Republicans have one, just barely. But if we can convince a few of them to do the right thing, we can shut this nonsense down. But time’s running out. Congress has until July 18 to approve or reject the cuts. So I need to know what you think by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. | | If Trump gets his way, here’s what happens: 👉 Rural stations go dark. 👉 Emergency broadcasts vanish. 👉 “News deserts” grow – and lies spread like wildfire. It’s a straight-up attack on truth, community, and the little guy. He's counting on folks not paying attention. Let's prove him wrong. Thanks, Derek, John ❤️ | | | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: FW: End of the UN Arms Treaty in sight
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xql6qc10ltqufnzgljf4pmjtwyh312v5yqeb951k545yb5wdary1ztrwgmbul1v1q7zwfz1bfcb2v4x05gsobay7tt&__stmp=sz92la&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor, the National Association for Gun Rights.
* * *
|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Dear Fellow Patriot,

The United Nations’ “Small Arms Treaty” has been the Gun Control Lobby’s crown jewel since Barack Obama sent it to the U.S. Senate and insisted we ratify it a decade ago. Year after year, we refused.

_But each and every day, the UN is getting closer to implementing the terms of this dangerous Treaty’s provisions here in the United States even without ratification_.

**And it’s all being done in secret by the UN’s allies in the Washington, D.C. “Swamp.”**

The good news is, with the big changes in Washington due to the 2024 election, you and I have a chance to stop the Gun Control Lobby cold.

But it’s an opportunity that won’t last forever.

That’s why – as Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the message below – **[it’s absolutely critical you and I act now](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=fzh6w62qvybr77yxw9j4cwz7qqqfuz5muubm02k85bh4efhkoaidd08r281mbwh6jy79itat8brrz1qvyor4gx0wb6wg4a2t6pjkdshyz45pus2i6kp7i98fk93o9cllvo4nk968tvu8am2w31ejufdmrm9j4um5cgrnnptmvo8649wp0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz92la&__onlt=h)**!

**Sincerely,

The Hon. Rand Paul
United States Senator (R-KY)**

* * *

Dear Fellow Patriot,

**There is a sword hanging over the head of every American gun owner**.

I’m referring to the UN “Small Arms Treaty” -- the first stage of the UN’s global gun control agenda.

_I’ve stared these global gun banners in the face and told them what they could do with their precious “Small Arms Treaty,” though I knew the UN would NOT like me crashing their “Gun Ban Club” in Geneva_.

**_I told UN bureaucrats you and I will NEVER surrender to their anti-gun schemes!_**

When I told these anti-gun international bureaucrats they were walking in the footsteps of every 20th century murderous dictator who disarmed their citizens to shuffle them off to death camps, I guess my words hit a little “close to home.”

All they could do in response was squirm in their seats and laugh nervously...

But while you or I or even President Trump can tell these gun grabbers what we think of their treaty, only the U.S. Senate can remove the treaty document from the Senate agenda.

**[That’s why I’m counting on you to sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” petition to your U.S. Senators IMMEDIATELY](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=fzh6w62qvybr77yxw9j4cwz7qqqfuz5muubm02k85bh4efhkoaidd08r281mbwh6jy79itat8brrz1qvyor4gx0wb6wg4a2t6pjkdshyz45pus2i6kp7i98fk93o9cllvo4nk968tvu8am2w31ejufdmrm9j4um5cgrnnptmvo8649wp0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz92la&__onlt=h)**.

As you’ll see, this petition insists your Senators act to oppose and reject the UN “Small Arms Treaty” and send it back to the President where it can be formally and finally trashed.

But until they do, the UN “Small Arms Treaty” will remain pending in the Senate, and ratification by a future Senate is all that’s needed for this gun grab to become reality.

_And that’s REGARDLESS of who occupies the White House or their position on the Treaty_!

With this Treaty, the UN’s goal is to DESTROY the legal buying, owning, manufacturing, and selling of pistols, rifles, and shotguns by FORCING: **> > _ALL countries involved in the export of firearms -- including the United States -- to establish a “National Control System_.”** This is nothing more than GUN REGISTRATION, plain and simple -- the first step toward outright GUN CONFISCATION; **> > _ALL firearms manufacturers who seek to export firearms to ask for permission and report on how they believe the guns they sell will be used_.** The UN ultimately wants final say on whether or not any firearms transfer should be allowed. Period. After all, they are fixated on keeping guns out of the hands of the “wrong” people; and **> > _ALL Treaty countries to allow firearms manufacturers to be sued for crimes committed with their products_.** Imagine how outrageous it would be if Ford was sued because an F-150 owner ran a red light and caused a crash! That’s what gun grabbers want to do with firearms because they know this could END gun manufacturing. This is exactly what Mexico is attempting to do in their lawsuit against Smith & Wesson.
**_The UN’s ultimate plan for all civilian-owned guns:_Incinerate them_._**

It’s hard to see how the Second Amendment could survive in the United States were the one-world socialists at the UN to get their way.

Of course, that’s their goal.

_To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand “utopian” designs_.

Meanwhile, enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed, they’re pouring money into the UN “Small Arms Treaty” hand-over-fist.

So, it’s no wonder why they’re hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it!

**[I’m counting on you to help beat the UN by signing your “END THE UN GUN BAN” petition to urge your U.S. Senators to end all support for the UN Gun Ban and send it back to the White House right away](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=fzh6w62qvybr77yxw9j4cwz7qqqfuz5muubm02k85bh4efhkoaidd08r281mbwh6jy79itat8brrz1qvyor4gx0wb6wg4a2t6pjkdshyz45pus2i6kp7i98fk93o9cllvo4nk968tvu8am2w31ejufdmrm9j4um5cgrnnptmvo8649wp0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz92la&__onlt=h)**.

If we don’t dispose of the treaty quickly, the gun grabbers will leap to ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate the moment they have the votes, no matter who the President is or what their stance is on the treaty.

_That’s why we have to mount a massive campaign to send this Treaty back to the President NOW so he can kill the Treaty as promised, before it’s too late_.

The great news is, just doing so puts you and me in a win/win situation.

Either we get the 60 votes we need to finally KILL this Treaty...

... Or anti-gun U.S. Senators will be on record in support of arguably the **WORST anti-gun initiative** to come before either chamber of Congress in decades.

Believe me.

_U.S. Senators who vote to allow international bureaucrats to trample on our gun rights will pay the price at the ballot box_.

Just like they did in 2014 after their all-out push for gun control in the wake of the Newtown tragedy, and in 2016 after Hillary Clinton’s full embrace of every anti-gun policy imaginable, and in **2024 when four anti-gun democrats went down in flames, and four more barely hung on by the skin of their teeth**.

_But if we don’t fight now, it could be the gun grabbers who get the last laugh -- even if it takes them years to regain control of the U.S. Senate_!

After all, gun grabbers have been battling for this scheme since President Bill Clinton’s administration.

_They’re going to do whatever it takes to make their global gun control crown jewel a reality_.

They’re clearly in this for the long haul.

Are you?

**[Click here to sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” Petition and insist the U.S. Senate vote to return the treaty to President Trump so he can send it to the trash where it belongs](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=fzh6w62qvybr77yxw9j4cwz7qqqfuz5muubm02k85bh4efhkoaidd08r281mbwh6jy79itat8brrz1qvyor4gx0wb6wg4a2t6pjkdshyz45pus2i6kp7i98fk93o9cllvo4nk968tvu8am2w31ejufdmrm9j4um5cgrnnptmvo8649wp0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz92la&__onlt=h)**.

Sadly, the UN “Small Arms Treaty” is now only the beginning of the problem.

_Under Joe Biden’s direction, one-world bureaucrats are even now pushing key parts of these gun controls deep into every part of government_.

On top of the Biden ATF’s anti-gun executive actions, a headline from The Hill showed how **“Democrats’ latest backdoor plan to limit gun ownership”** involves new State Department “sanctions” designed to drive the price of ammo up by BANNING imports.

_That’s the same State Department which NAGR caught red-handed restarting the funnel of your tax dollars into funding the UN “Small Arms Treaty_.”

Worse, since day one of the COVID-19 outbreak, our court system has said yes to almost any politician cooking up any unconstitutional idea so long as it’s under the guise of “public health.”

None of us want any more of that.

Still, now the Center for Disease Control (CDC) is pushing a new Euro-centric gun control framework that says _“Using a public health approach is essential to addressing firearm violence and keeping people safe and healthy.”_

_That’s why insisting that your U.S. Senators vote to DISPOSE of the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” is not enough_.

We must insist that the U.S. Senate help President Trump root out anti-gun policies pushed by Joe Biden’s government and ensure that NOT ONE TAXPAYER CENT is spent on implementing any part of this Treaty or what it stands for.

But I’m counting on your help to send that message -- before it’s all swept under the rug by the bureaucrats running for cover.

**[First, please sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” Petition to both of your U.S. Senators at once](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=fzh6w62qvybr77yxw9j4cwz7qqqfuz5muubm02k85bh4efhkoaidd08r281mbwh6jy79itat8brrz1qvyor4gx0wb6wg4a2t6pjkdshyz45pus2i6kp7i98fk93o9cllvo4nk968tvu8am2w31ejufdmrm9j4um5cgrnnptmvo8649wp0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz92la&__onlt=h)**.

Once you have signed your petition, I am counting on your support to help the National Association for Gun Rights: 1) _Contact and mobilize_ up to 10 million pro-Second Amendment Americans using mail, email and phone banks to turn up maximum pressure on the U.S. Senate; 2) _Launch a full-scale online effort_ , including internet ads, op-eds, text messages, and video updates, working highly-trafficked blogs and using social media to generate even more heat to ensure the so-called “Small Arms Treaty” can be returned to the White House where President Trump can finish it off; and 3) _Craft hard-hitting radio_ , newspaper and TV ads, which we’ll be ready to unleash at a moment’s notice if we can raise the resources to fund them. Of course, a program of this scale won’t be cheap.

But as I explained, doing nothing would only play right into the gun grabbers’ hands.

**[So along with your signed petition, could you please consider a generous contribution of $100 TODAY](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=4662xkxba4hb779p5zi7l8v0t7zsujyavt96shijdek6jiltaw81ipbv7aaf7nszpx2nqvly36ou720f02sk5drghjwta7ll70wqf0v1caxwo8pw1yumqn6lrakkje5cy2mdml745067yy7eq56dwo56fpp5fyjb0lp49sbl12ugjwp3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz92la&__onlt=h)**?

I know that’s a lot to ask for, believe me.

But the fight to reclaim our stolen freedoms is here, Fellow Patriot. It’s on. There’s no time to wait.

So please act -- and agree to give generously.

**[But if $100 is just too much -- even given the urgency of the situation -- please agree to $30, or at least $15 TODAY](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=4662xkxba4hb779p5zi7l8v0t7zsujyavt96shijdek6jiltaw81ipbv7aaf7nszpx2nqvly36ou720f02sk5drghjwta7ll70wqf0v1caxwo8pw1yumqn6lrakkje5cy2mdml745067yy7eq56dwo56fpp5fyjb0lp49sbl12ugjwp3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz92la&__onlt=h)**.

_If you and I don’t fight back, they’ll be back again to keep stealing our freedoms one bite at a time_.

Whatever you can do, please act IMMEDIATELY. There’s no time to waste.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights **

P.S. As long as the UN “Small Arms Treaty” is pending in the Senate, ratification is all that’s needed for this gun grab to become reality. And that’s REGARDLESS of who occupies the White House or their position on the Treaty!

**[That’s why I’m counting on you to sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” Petition at once](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=fzh6w62qvybr77yxw9j4cwz7qqqfuz5muubm02k85bh4efhkoaidd08r281mbwh6jy79itat8brrz1qvyor4gx0wb6wg4a2t6pjkdshyz45pus2i6kp7i98fk93o9cllvo4nk968tvu8am2w31ejufdmrm9j4um5cgrnnptmvo8649wp0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz92la&__onlt=h)!**

This petition insists your Senators vote to reject the UN “Small Arms Treaty” and send it back to the President where he can kill it.

**[So will you please sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” Petition IMMEDIATELY and agree to your most generous contribution of $100, $30 or at least $15 TODAY](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=fzh6w62qvybr77yxw9j4cwz7qqqfuz5muubm02k85bh4efhkoaidd08r281mbwh6jy79itat8brrz1qvyor4gx0wb6wg4a2t6pjkdshyz45pus2i6kp7i98fk93o9cllvo4nk968tvu8am2w31ejufdmrm9j4um5cgrnnptmvo8649wp0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz92la&__onlt=h)**?

clean_body: Please read the message below from our sponsor, the National Association for Gun Rights. | | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, The United Nations’ “Small Arms Treaty” has been the Gun Control Lobby’s crown jewel since Barack Obama sent it to the U.S. Senate and insisted we ratify it a decade ago. Year after year, we refused. But each and every day, the UN is getting closer to implementing the terms of this dangerous Treaty’s provisions here in the United States even without ratification. And it’s all being done in secret by the UN’s allies in the Washington, D.C. “Swamp.” The good news is, with the big changes in Washington due to the 2024 election, you and I have a chance to stop the Gun Control Lobby cold. But it’s an opportunity that won’t last forever. That’s why – as Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the message below – ! Sincerely, The Hon. Rand Paul United States Senator (R-KY) Dear Fellow Patriot, There is a sword hanging over the head of every American gun owner. I’m referring to the UN “Small Arms Treaty” -- the first stage of the UN’s global gun control agenda. I’ve stared these global gun banners in the face and told them what they could do with their precious “Small Arms Treaty,” though I knew the UN would NOT like me crashing their “Gun Ban Club” in Geneva. I told UN bureaucrats you and I will NEVER surrender to their anti-gun schemes! When I told these anti-gun international bureaucrats they were walking in the footsteps of every 20th century murderous dictator who disarmed their citizens to shuffle them off to death camps, I guess my words hit a little “close to home.” All they could do in response was squirm in their seats and laugh nervously... But while you or I or even President Trump can tell these gun grabbers what we think of their treaty, only the U.S. Senate can remove the treaty document from the Senate agenda. . As you’ll see, this petition insists your Senators act to oppose and reject the UN “Small Arms Treaty” and send it back to the President where it can be formally and finally trashed. But until they do, the UN “Small Arms Treaty” will remain pending in the Senate, and ratification by a future Senate is all that’s needed for this gun grab to become reality. And that’s REGARDLESS of who occupies the White House or their position on the Treaty! With this Treaty, the UN’s goal is to DESTROY the legal buying, owning, manufacturing, and selling of pistols, rifles, and shotguns by FORCING: > > ALL countries involved in the export of firearms -- including the United States -- to establish a “National Control System.” This is nothing more than GUN REGISTRATION, plain and simple -- the first step toward outright GUN CONFISCATION; > > ALL firearms manufacturers who seek to export firearms to ask for permission and report on how they believe the guns they sell will be used. The UN ultimately wants final say on whether or not any firearms transfer should be allowed. Period. After all, they are fixated on keeping guns out of the hands of the “wrong” people; and > > ALL Treaty countries to allow firearms manufacturers to be sued for crimes committed with their products. Imagine how outrageous it would be if Ford was sued because an F-150 owner ran a red light and caused a crash! That’s what gun grabbers want to do with firearms because they know this could END gun manufacturing. This is exactly what Mexico is attempting to do in their lawsuit against Smith & Wesson. The UN’s ultimate plan for all civilian-owned guns:Incinerate them. It’s hard to see how the Second Amendment could survive in the United States were the one-world socialists at the UN to get their way. Of course, that’s their goal. To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand “utopian” designs. Meanwhile, enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed, they’re pouring money into the UN “Small Arms Treaty” hand-over-fist. So, it’s no wonder why they’re hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it! . If we don’t dispose of the treaty quickly, the gun grabbers will leap to ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate the moment they have the votes, no matter who the President is or what their stance is on the treaty. That’s why we have to mount a massive campaign to send this Treaty back to the President NOW so he can kill the Treaty as promised, before it’s too late. The great news is, just doing so puts you and me in a win/win situation. Either we get the 60 votes we need to finally KILL this Treaty... ... Or anti-gun U.S. Senators will be on record in support of arguably the WORST anti-gun initiative to come before either chamber of Congress in decades. Believe me. U.S. Senators who vote to allow international bureaucrats to trample on our gun rights will pay the price at the ballot box. Just like they did in 2014 after their all-out push for gun control in the wake of the Newtown tragedy, and in 2016 after Hillary Clinton’s full embrace of every anti-gun policy imaginable, and in 2024 when four anti-gun democrats went down in flames, and four more barely hung on by the skin of their teeth. But if we don’t fight now, it could be the gun grabbers who get the last laugh -- even if it takes them years to regain control of the U.S. Senate! After all, gun grabbers have been battling for this scheme since President Bill Clinton’s administration. They’re going to do whatever it takes to make their global gun control crown jewel a reality. They’re clearly in this for the long haul. Are you? . Sadly, the UN “Small Arms Treaty” is now only the beginning of the problem. Under Joe Biden’s direction, one-world bureaucrats are even now pushing key parts of these gun controls deep into every part of government. On top of the Biden ATF’s anti-gun executive actions, a headline from The Hill showed how “Democrats’ latest backdoor plan to limit gun ownership” involves new State Department “sanctions” designed to drive the price of ammo up by BANNING imports. That’s the same State Department which NAGR caught red-handed restarting the funnel of your tax dollars into funding the UN “Small Arms Treaty.” Worse, since day one of the COVID-19 outbreak, our court system has said yes to almost any politician cooking up any unconstitutional idea so long as it’s under the guise of “public health.” None of us want any more of that. Still, now the Center for Disease Control (CDC) is pushing a new Euro-centric gun control framework that says “Using a public health approach is essential to addressing firearm violence and keeping people safe and healthy.” That’s why insisting that your U.S. Senators vote to DISPOSE of the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” is not enough. We must insist that the U.S. Senate help President Trump root out anti-gun policies pushed by Joe Biden’s government and ensure that NOT ONE TAXPAYER CENT is spent on implementing any part of this Treaty or what it stands for. But I’m counting on your help to send that message -- before it’s all swept under the rug by the bureaucrats running for cover. . Once you have signed your petition, I am counting on your support to help the National Association for Gun Rights: 1) Contact and mobilize up to 10 million pro-Second Amendment Americans using mail, email and phone banks to turn up maximum pressure on the U.S. Senate; 2) Launch a full-scale online effort , including internet ads, op-eds, text messages, and video updates, working highly-trafficked blogs and using social media to generate even more heat to ensure the so-called “Small Arms Treaty” can be returned to the White House where President Trump can finish it off; and 3) Craft hard-hitting radio , newspaper and TV ads, which we’ll be ready to unleash at a moment’s notice if we can raise the resources to fund them. Of course, a program of this scale won’t be cheap. But as I explained, doing nothing would only play right into the gun grabbers’ hands. ? I know that’s a lot to ask for, believe me. But the fight to reclaim our stolen freedoms is here, Fellow Patriot. It’s on. There’s no time to wait. So please act -- and agree to give generously. . If you and I don’t fight back, they’ll be back again to keep stealing our freedoms one bite at a time. Whatever you can do, please act IMMEDIATELY. There’s no time to waste. For Freedom, Dudley Brown President National Association for Gun Rights P.S. As long as the UN “Small Arms Treaty” is pending in the Senate, ratification is all that’s needed for this gun grab to become reality. And that’s REGARDLESS of who occupies the White House or their position on the Treaty! ! This petition insists your Senators vote to reject the UN “Small Arms Treaty” and send it back to the President where he can kill it. ? name: Sarah McBride
subject: Can I let you in on a little secret?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
#
I want to let you in on a little secret.
**I wouldn’t be able to do _anything_ without coffee.**
Before I run out the door, I make myself a hot cup of coffee (and yes, I load it up with sugar). And if I’m lucky, I get to swing by Wawa for a second round. 😅
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250711-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250711-2173&refcode2=2173_21716_q7XDgW&akid=2173%2E21716%2Eq7XDgW)
The truth is, it takes a lot of energy to stand up for workers’ rights, fight to protect Medicare and Social Security, and shine a spotlight on MAGA’s corruption and deceit.
**Coffee helps a lot, but your support is what really keeps this campaign going.**
[**So if you’re able, will you chip in $5 or any amount you can spare to help keep me fighting for you? Grassroots donations — even if they’re less than the cost of a cup of coffee — add up quickly when everyone pitches in what they can.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250711-1?refcode=em20250711-2173&amount=5&refcode2=2173_21716_q7XDgW&akid=2173%2E21716%2Eq7XDgW)

Thank you so much!
Sarah ☕

body:

| If this is irrelevant to you, please click **[unsubscribe here](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/zrnrINqJYzOM892W71H9eOEA)** to be removed.

| [****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/gcoktnB5TRQ5H8uS78925Jrg/zrnrINqJYzOM892W71H9eOEA)
[****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/gcoktnB5TRQ5H8uS78925Jrg/zrnrINqJYzOM892W71H9eOEA) Dear Patriot,

For months, I've been **on the front lines** , exposing the dangerous rise of Zohran Mamdani, a radical mayoral candidate whose ties to pro-Hamas groups and Marxist ideologies threatens New York City's future.

My X posts and written reports have been relentless, warning about his lead in the polls since June, when I called out the GOP for ignoring this jihadist communist who is being cheered on by Iranian proxies.

I've been digging into his campaign, funded by over **$1.7 million in private donations** , much of it funneled through Soros-linked groups like the Tides Foundation, which gave $132,000 to his allies at the radical WESPAC. This isn't just a local race--it's a **battle for America 's soul**.

[**I need your help to keep exposing the truth. Will you donate today to fund my investigation?**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/gcoktnB5TRQ5H8uS78925Jrg/zrnrINqJYzOM892W71H9eOEA)

Picture this: I'm in a small Queens diner, meeting a source who hands me documents linking Mamdani to the Palestinian Youth Movement, a group tied to the Muslim Brotherhood.

My heart races as I realize the stakes--his "Not On Our Dime! Act" could strip tax-exempt status from nonprofits supporting Israel, emboldening antisemitic violence.

I've confronted radicals like him before, from Hillary Clinton, Rashida Tlaib, Linda Sarsour to Ilhan Omar, but this fight is personal. New York, is at risk of becoming a haven for Sharia law and communist policies if Mamdani wins.

**My team and I are stretched thin**. We're chasing leads on Mamdani's meetings with Linda Sarsour, a pro-Hamas activist who maxed out donations to his campaign.

I know you must be thinking:_“A major deadline just passed, why are you asking for money again?”_ I’ll be honest, asking you for money is my least favorite part of this job. But the summertime is an especially challenging time for grassroots fundraising. As folks spend time outside with their friends and family — as they should! — online grassroots contributions tend to slow down.**At the same time, Republicans' efforts to enact their far-right agenda are only _ramping up._** Meeting these goals helps us take on Republicans’ billionaire-first agenda AND support Democratic candidates up and down the ballot. clean_body: | | Peter – Last week, I voted against an irresponsible and misguided budget that does nothing to help everyday Americans and working families. Despite bipartisan opposition, the GOP majority rammed their proposal through Congress without regard for the harm it will cause. Now that the president has officially signed it into law, I’m working to ensure I can support our communities as we prepare to face the impacts. | This campaign has always been about putting the people of our district first. Keeping the lines of communication between you and me open is part of how I’m staying true to that promise. And after the Majority’s deeply disappointing vote, staying connected is more important than ever. I look forward to hearing from you. – Marie | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington! = Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, to only receive the most important messages. ** Paid for by MGP Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Marie for Congress, Washington State Democratic Central Committee, and Timber PAC. These cuts pose a major risk to the health of millions. Medicaid is a lifeline for thousands across PA-07, and we won’t stand by while wealthy politicians like Mitch McConnell and Ryan Mackenzie dismiss the struggles of working families.

**Mackenzie voted for the GOP Tax Scam, which cut taxes for the wealthy while cutting the benefits of hardworking Pennsylvanians.**

body:
The liberal mob is after me, and I’ve got nowhere else to turn.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTIwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcxMV9OTS1MUy4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NjcwNjAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MTFfTk0tTFMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjY3MDYwLTI4OTkifQ/-MjP4buChqKoIAIufOyyUA)**I’m bailing out – we’re over the red line.**
It’s Troy Downing. I’m a veteran, a self-made businessman, and a family man. I’ve been fighting against the Democrat mafia in Washington, and I’m not sure I can do it any longer.
**_The liberal money machine is out in full force against us, and I just missed my Quarter 2 fundraising goal. I don’t want to crash and burn out, but that’s the direction I’m headed._**[ RUSH REINFORCEMENTS

I’m not a DC elite. I’m not some media sellout.**
I flew rescue helicopters for the Air Force in Afghanistan. I’m used to doing impossible things under fire. I’m used to doing impossible things under fire. But I would’ve been lost without my brothers in arms.
[If we’re going to keep winning in Washington, then I need someone to have my six. I’m hoping you’ll be the patriot I need to answer the call:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTIwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcxMV9OTS1MUy4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NjcwNjAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MTFfTk0tTFMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjY3MDYwLTI4OTkifQ/KtSWPt1e_ERiybqG7okLXA)[SEND HELP NOW

So I'm humbly asking you today if you'll stand with a combat veteran like me?
I can’t thank you enough, Peter.
**- Troy Downing**| |
